Peter,

Last night, Nevadan GOP caucus-goers chose Donald Trump and his extreme MAGA agenda.

From his mishandling of the COVID-19 pandemic – where millions of lives were lost – to inciting and spreading a dangerous lie that spurred an insurrection, MAGA Republicans refuse to acknowledge that Donald Trump has stood against our democracy time and time again.

**Now, he's gaining momentum and further consolidating support. And there's a real danger of another Trump presidency.**

name: Rick Coplen
subject: Let’s take a moment to honor Black Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
February is Black History Month, an important celebration of the many contributions African Americans have made to our country – and a chance to uplift those who are doing the work today! Our nation’s diversity is one of its greatest strengths.

Today, we see examples of Black leaders in government, business, labor, education, media, and much more. While representation has improved over the years, we must also acknowledge the hardships and systemic barriers the Black community still faces today.

From disparities in compensation, life expectancy and health outcomes, public safety, household wealth, and more, there is still work to do to fight for a more just and equitable society. This month and every month, I pledge to do just that.

Scott Perry cannot say the same.

When I recently visited Allison Hill to hear from voters, I asked a group of Black residents if they had ever seen Perry out in town – they laughed, and told me he’d never visited. Our communities deserve a representative who takes the time to meet with them and listen to their concerns. You can be sure that I will continue to prioritize that connection when I’m in Congress.

So let’s raise awareness of the progress our country has made toward equality, and recommit to the work ahead to ensure we live up to our founding promises of liberty and justice for all.

I hope you’ll join me.

Thank you,
Rick

# Victor Davis Hanson on the show tonight...
In our conversation we discuss all things currently affecting American lives: the recent border bill, past and future elections and the U.S. deficit. Victor shares how a poised, disciplined Trump can bring a Justinian like renaissance to our country. He makes the case for America becoming self-sufficient again with our best and brightest choosing careers in corporate construction, assembly and new products instead of Wall Street and finance. Victor explains the valuable lessons we can take from Rome, Byzantium or early Europe on what will bring America back to a healthy society: physical sobriety, manufacturing, a good trade balance and a strong currency.
Make sure you’re subscribed and have notifications turned on, see you tonight:

Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets.

name: Lynn Peterson
subject: We cannot normalize the foundations of hate

| | Peter, Since the start of the COVID-19 pandemic, we've seen a saddening and alarming rise in hate against the AAPI community. As the darkest depths of the pandemic subsided, the problems of xenophobia and bigotry didn't:**a recent Associated Press survey found that**** _one in three_****Asian Americans reported experiencing an act of abuse on account of their race or ethnicity in 2023.** Our political leaders have a responsibility to act when hate crimes are on the rise – a responsibility to bring people together and extinguish the flames of hate. At the very least, they shouldn't _fan_ those flames. But Congressional Republicans like Lori Chavez-DeRemer don't care about responsibility or duty to constituents, Peter. They've repeatedly engaged in rhetoric that singles out AAPI people, dances with racist conspiracy theories, and serves as a dangerous dog whistle. Donald Trump set an early "standard" for the MAGA set when he denigrated people of Chinese ethnicity throughout 2020, counting on many other Republicans to sink to his level. Now, it's become standard practice for the GOP to play with casual bigotry. Take for example the recent Senate hearing on social media companies, in which – during an exchange with the CEO of TikTok – Arkansas Senator Tom Cotton seemed confused about the difference between Singapore and China. Or consider how Republicans now routinely call for investigations into practices and property of Asian-American businesspeople (while conveniently ignoring others). **It's unacceptable to see our elected officials – our public servants – not only normalize the foundations of hate, but actively exploit them for political gain.** It won't be easy to undo the damage they've done these past few years. But we can start by electing folks who'll show up for our families and neighbors and speak out against bigotry. Having a Congress led by MAGA Republicans isn't the solution. So we need to flip the House and fire members like Lori Chavez-DeRemer who tolerate and amplify the hate coming from within their party. Let's rise higher — together. _Lynn_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | name: =?utf-8?Q?Tristan=20Rader?=
subject: BIG Endorsements & March Fundraiser Announcement
body:
AFL-CIO, WFP & CCPC back Tristan Rader for State Rep, you can too. | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
### March 16th Fundraiser: RSVP Today!
---
| Dear Rader for Council Updates, I hope this message finds you well and inspired. As we move forward, your unwavering support has been the backbone of our journey toward a more equitable and just Ohio. Today, I'm thrilled to share some exciting updates and extend a special invitation to you. **A Milestone Celebration: Our Upcoming Fundraiser** First and foremost, we're gearing up for an event that promises not only to be a memorable evening but also a crucial step forward in our campaign. We're hosting a fundraiser that will bring together passionate individuals, dedicated activists, and key stakeholders in our community. This is more than just an event; it's a rallying call for those who believe in the power of collective action and shared dreams. 🗓 **Mark Your Calendar!** Please join us at our upcoming fundraiser. Your presence will make a world of difference as we bolster our resources to protect and defend the rights and progress we've fought so hard to achieve. A special thanks to our awesome hosts, Dr. Matthew and Sarah Badgett, who have volunteered their Lakewood home for the occasion. The event will be held on March 16th, 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM. For details and to secure your spot, please visit: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rader_march](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=d07311bfc5&e=869bcf0641)

[](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=9bcf818163&e=869bcf0641) **Unwavering Support: Celebrating New Endorsements** We're honored to announce the first waves of endorsements from important organizations committed to the advancement of labor rights, community welfare, and progressive values. These endorsements not only symbolize a shared vision for Ohio but also strengthen our resolve to fight for the rights and dignity of every Ohioan. We're proud to have the backing of:
* **North Shore AFL-CIO Federation of Labor**
* **Lakewood Firefighters Local 382**
* **Bakery, Confectionery, Tobacco Workers and Grain Millers' International Union (BCTGM) Local 19**
* **Ohio Working Families Party**
* **Cuyahoga County Progressive Caucus**

[](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=a1df51331e&e=869bcf0641) These organizations stand with us because they believe in our mission to uphold reproductive rights, labor rights to organize and collectively bargain, Universal Healthcare, and so much more. Their support is a testament to the strength of our collective efforts and the importance of our cause. **Together, We Stand Stronger** With your support and the solidarity of our endorsers, we are more equipped than ever to face tomorrow's challenges head-on. The upcoming fundraiser is not just a means to gather resources; it's an opportunity to unite, celebrate our achievements, and prepare for the work that lies ahead. [Your contribution](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=fdb674863a&e=869bcf0641), whether by attending the fundraiser, spreading the word, or continuing to champion our cause in your circles, is invaluable. Together, we can safeguard the progress we've made and continue to fight for a future where everyone's rights are recognized and respected. Thank you for standing with us. Let's make this event a turning point in our campaign and a beacon of hope for Ohio. In Solidarity

Tristan Rader
Candidate for State Representative
Ohio House District 13
(Cleveland & Lakewood)

name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: This is serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

Gun violence is the number one cause of death for children in America. American families are riddled by the possibility of a gun violence incident everywhere they turn.

We have a public health crisis on our hands while Republicans refuse to take the steps necessary to curb gun violence and reinstate the assault weapons ban.

**_[Will you add your name to show your support for gun violence prevention with common sense reform? Take action and be one of the 1,000 signatures I need by Sunday night.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78732031/454305643/-872666029?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240209_PT_1.1_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_gvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VhYzBlZS1hYmM3LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RHmOqrCdjHtM_O8nXT2nkCsDjvG8S54NdDfbtoVgoz4=&emci=eeeac0ee-abc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=f3eac0ee-abc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=32394541)_**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78732032/454305644/-872666029?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240209_PT_1.1_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_gvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VhYzBlZS1hYmM3LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RHmOqrCdjHtM_O8nXT2nkCsDjvG8S54NdDfbtoVgoz4=&emci=eeeac0ee-abc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=f3eac0ee-abc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=32394541)**
Next week is the anniversary of the Parkland school shooting. The loved ones of victims and the survivors of Parkland, Uvalde, Oxford, the 656 mass shootings in 2023 and countless others will live with that trauma forever.

**The last time meaningful gun violence legislation passed Democrats had the majority.** The Bipartisan Safer Communities Act strengthened background checks, funded school safety & mental health, and supported red flag laws.

Elected officials have a duty to address the gun violence epidemic but the GOP leadership ignores the crisis plaguing our communities to appease the gun lobby. So we’re taking action now:

**_[Stand up for gun violence prevention, Peter. Call on the GOP to cut their ties with the gun lobby and put the necessary measures in place to end the senseless violence in our communities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78732033/454305645/-872666029?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240209_PT_1.1_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_gvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VhYzBlZS1hYmM3LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RHmOqrCdjHtM_O8nXT2nkCsDjvG8S54NdDfbtoVgoz4=&emci=eeeac0ee-abc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=f3eac0ee-abc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=32394541)_**

clean_body: | Peter, Gun violence is the number one cause of death for children in America. American families are riddled by the possibility of a gun violence incident everywhere they turn. We have a public health crisis on our hands while Republicans refuse to take the steps necessary to curb gun violence and reinstate the assault weapons ban. Next week is the anniversary of the Parkland school shooting. The loved ones of victims and the survivors of Parkland, Uvalde, Oxford, the 656 mass shootings in 2023 and countless others will live with that trauma forever. The last time meaningful gun violence legislation passed Democrats had the majority. The Bipartisan Safer Communities Act strengthened background checks, funded school safety & mental health, and supported red flag laws. Elected officials have a duty to address the gun violence epidemic but the GOP leadership ignores the crisis plaguing our communities to appease the gun lobby. So we’re taking action now: Be well, Ami Bera If you’d like to receive less email from our team If you'd like to stop receiving our emails, Paid for by Bera for Congress Bera for Congress PO Box 582496 Elk Grove, CA 95758 United States **

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: This is out of our control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race this year, there are some things we can control and other things that are completely _out_ of our control.
One example is our campaign’s fundraising goals. We do our best to control what we can, like determining what we’ll need to raise if we’re going to win in November. And then we do everything in our power to meet those critical goals.
**But as this race heats up, things are bound to get more unpredictable.**
**[HELP LUCAS STAY PREPARED](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43676?refcode=em20240209-4786&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4786%2E614464%2EHLNpv2)**
Even before multiple polls showed Lucas Kunce and Josh Hawley in a _statistical tie_ , national insiders were spending BIG to keep this Senate seat under their thumb.
So with that new information, we know they’ll only dump more money into our race.
It’s not a matter of if, but _when._ Their timing isn’t something we can control — and we need to be prepared for it to happen at any moment. **That’s why we’re asking:**
**[Will you help us stay prepared for the unexpected by adding a donation of whatever you think is best toward our campaign today? Your support, no matter the amount, is critical if we’re going to stay on track with our goals and stand up to the inevitable onslaught of money and attacks headed directly at Lucas this year.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43676?refcode=em20240209-4786&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4786%2E614464%2EHLNpv2)**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This is a symptom of a very real illness within the MAGA and Fox News ecosystem.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The GOP has a new conspiracy theory about Taylor Swift, but that isn’t their only belief that’s way, way out there.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1917%2E4032634%2EypMke8)
---
Have you heard the GOP’s new conspiracy theory about Taylor Swift? Stephen Colbert asked me this week about it on the Late Show. He (jokingly) wanted to know if Taylor Swift winning big at the Grammys was “Phase 1 of Democrats’ Deep State Plan” to raise her profile (come on) before she might endorse Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. Some of Donald Trump’s allies have been hyping this conspiracy theory, to which I had this to say: haters gonna hate, hate, hate, hate, hate... Obviously, their idea is absurd. But this is a symptom of a very real illness within the MAGA Republican and Fox News ecosystem that replaces reality with conspiracy. They also spread theories like...
* A vote for Joe Biden is a vote for Hillary Clinton, or Michelle Obama, or Barack Obama — people who are not Joe Biden.
* There’s a war on Christmas. And masculinity.
* The idea that countless abortion patients are getting “late-term” abortions — in fact only a tiny fraction of abortions take place after 21 weeks or later and the reasons are heartbreaking.
* LGBTQIA+ educators, or educators who acknowledge LGBTQIA+ rights, are somehow indoctrinating students with a hidden agenda.
* Climate change is a hoax.
* Even if it isn’t a hoax, fossil fuel companies have nothing to do with it.
* If an election yields results that you don’t agree with, it must be because of voter fraud and not because you lost.
* Related, they believe Donald Trump won re-election.

I could unfortunately go on and on, but you get the point. Trump’s GOP is out of touch and out of control — and it’s being enabled by right-wing media. They’re intending to confuse and scare people in exchange for power, and we have to call it out like it is. We can’t let them come back into power and make real-world decisions based on conspiracy theories. We’ve got to work our tails off between now and November to hold them off at the ballot box — and that’s what I’m intending to do. [**If you’re with me, will you pitch in $28 or anything you can to support my re-election campaign, fight back against MAGA extremists, and fight for plans that will actually help working families?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1886?amount=28&t=8&akid=1917%2E4032634%2EypMke8)

---

name: Team Frisch
subject: we drove Boebert out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado

Hello,
**We officially drove Lauren Boebert out of Colorado’s 3rd congressional district!**
__**FIRST:**__ Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert in 2022 – losing by just 546 votes in what was the closest race in the entire country.
__**THEN:**__ With help from grassroots donors like you, Adam Frisch out-raised Boebert month after month after month – and the polls showed us leading!
__**AND NOW:**__ Rather than face defeat to Adam, Lauren Boebert has run off scared and is no longer running in Colorado’s 3rd congressional district!
**We completed stage one of replacing Boebert in Congress – but we have now entered an even harder stage of this campaign...**
After he drove off one of their favorites, the Super PACs are now going to come after Adam with millions of dollars in attacks to try to elect another far-right extremist to this seat.
**We’ve set a goal of raising another $25,000 before midnight tonight to help Adam fight back against the lies, but we’re counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win this seat:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help Adam Frisch win and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress? Adam’s not taking money from corporate PACs, so every dollar you can give goes a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78732238/454316022/1610638071?refcode=em20240209pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=c1538b62-aec7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTUzOGI2Mi1hZWM3LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kX3WpLAeFjd-z857wvrFhPF6uklSQUApiKC9ee6FE1E=)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. | | Friend, Special Counsel Robert Hur was investigating the latest instance of Joe Biden jeopardizing America's national security, and after a thorough interview, this is what he found:
---
| | **["We have also considered that, at trial, Mr. Biden would likely present himself to a jury, as he did during our interview of him, as a sympathetic, well-meaning, elderly man with a poor memory," Hur wrote.](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cadfda9ac64444399db12216418726ac&_e=fiN4LcJXUeHS0vg6tqkRJ0tFPgHucNSe9nXzlPBPjsk32wdRtgpoVhlMzFIGpIyKGGl_yKPEGDoEMDkulC90abFUSs2ayENR_0r80RrUnsM8irMxhIPnGSEz7eFozkgWiXXzs_10ych-S1ql5uPlHj8D51tPvNVSnZIwCvhvQHVW_IJUbsr5MMWA8wvERv8OejHcrN-RzQfzSQLnYcPH8qROhzsfltYwiflsJ8V37c9fthHu6ffflJ7TmD2UpVrJTip6pF1AGYGD2r9ttpoNGxGP7QOdUrhY2ba9IdvDRUd6Zf0mqhbdzjMRgi1QEjv4WU1rCucsPEPsgLwTBRmNXivRjmQQ9SQ-4FRQ7Ygu6Zeo3wYpOJeeHs5ZBXsy90uODOWEeXxnWkMSw6LnwfWxj2CFrM4AHRTXaktC0T42Tl2RUioTk0s1BFKVb2S12G4WdFCZaC59BVUsJp2cAg9VHA%3D%3D)**

| | I won't mince words about this: _**[_**If Joe Biden is too incapable to be held accountable for mishandling classified information, then he is undoubtedly unfit for the Oval Office.**_](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cadfda9ac64444399db12216418726ac&_e=fiN4LcJXUeHS0vg6tqkRJ0tFPgHucNSe9nXzlPBPjsk32wdRtgpoVhlMzFIGpIyKGGl_yKPEGDoEMDkulC90abFUSs2ayENR_0r80RrUnsM8irMxhIPnGSEz7eFozkgWiXXzs_10ych-S1ql5uPlHj8D51tPvNVSnZIwCvhvQHVW_IJUbsr5MMWA8wvERv8OejHcrN-RzQfzSQLnYcPH8qROhzsfltYwiflsJ8V37c9fthHu6ffflJ7TmD2UpVrJTip6pF1AGYGD2r9ttpoNGxGP7QOdUrhY2ba9IdvDRUfO57I25WGyl3dYdOVSwKcZs1ALDyeoBa-B_EYTB2dsjeEhJ32KGAuXiPvQ0CvluSuqg_N7P4vGHz6wWUjVqS7mdYc4DFZHvhLsmYoqb-jVZPPhTwHero5lY575y-OKKYZQ_WC8zRdZv0XbKcHM9dor1fYJ8XR-Qb2n1RqKkKoAsg%3D%3D)**_ Knowing that he and he alone holds the key to America's nuclear codes is terrifying.

You mean to tell me that a man essentially determined to be unfit to face trial, is somehow fit to be the LEADER OF THE FREE WORLD? **[That's why Republican leaders like myself are doing what the liberal Democrats and mainstream media won't: Taking Joe Biden to task, and working to ensure that he is evicted from the White House in November. ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cadfda9ac64444399db12216418726ac&_e=fiN4LcJXUeHS0vg6tqkRJ0tFPgHucNSe9nXzlPBPjsk32wdRtgpoVhlMzFIGpIyKGGl_yKPEGDoEMDkulC90abFUSs2ayENR_0r80RrUnsM8irMxhIPnGSEz7eFozkgWiXXzs_10ych-S1ql5uPlHj8D51tPvNVSnZIwCvhvQHVW_IJUbsr5MMWA8wvERv8OejHcrN-RzQfzSQLnYcPH8qROhzsfltYwiflsJ8V37c9fthHu6ffflJ7TmD2UpVrJTip6pF1AGYGD2r9ttpoNGxGP7QOdUrhY2ba9IdvDRUdI2JrkNgV-p3hza3kTSAJvq-MkF3WCboXlprXM_ScQqMJDg-Dtu9B9wBDZWBUoEPfHKWDaCRLa3GuwL1JzVjJrPkocSFdH_FB4t4ECv82QUdiBI7mUkWAGXCtHmWppTBWc2evpbfmigDL8rUUwYrOyuHDp3uNOaRax-G9_QKr-gA%3D%3D)** But we sure could use your help. It might sound silly, but this is a David vs. Goliath scenario. Breaking through the power, favor, and endless amounts of cash that come with the Democratic machine is a steep hill to climb. But we are not slowing down.

Right now, House Republican leadership is working day-in and day-out to build the most effective grassroots conservative operation this country has ever seen.

From Connecticut to California, we are investing in candidates, in congressional districts, and in hard-working Americans like you, Friend to make sure that we grow the House majority and get this unfit President out of the Oval Office.

Will you join our movement, by clicking the link attached _**[_**HERE**_](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cadfda9ac64444399db12216418726ac&_e=fiN4LcJXUeHS0vg6tqkRJ0tFPgHucNSe9nXzlPBPjsk32wdRtgpoVhlMzFIGpIyKGGl_yKPEGDoEMDkulC90abFUSs2ayENR_0r80RrUnsM8irMxhIPnGSEz7eFozkgWiXXzs_10ych-S1ql5uPlHj8D51tPvNVSnZIwCvhvQHVW_IJUbsr5MMWA8wvERv8OejHcrN-RzQfzSQLnYcPH8qROhzsfltYwiflsJ8V37c9fthHu6ffflJ7TmD2UpVrJTip6pF1AGYGD2r9ttpoNGxGP7QOdUrhY2ba9IdvDRUceteNS2DTagVgzFhGOBZszl4G2XaxPb-xobn48yfY3clFmhruBqYZ78M5VNr77wQkfDMLl-Do0GI08KyTI1bNpcYg5ufTmZIZybI1O0GiBXw6xNSD5pgmCJ2QsLTxJRxGnmXj_zzIlc-1n9uwOR3PBilG9NAo4dlsisfzbEPkhmw%3D%3D)**_? Will you trust one to help save it? | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=3174ec9a0097457fb1d9e06f4065788c&_t=k96pnnq3ywNBYSL-9AgIHWyym78nEwDasiOw5tebnEn1ie4cy1TrJNm4N2e1x6tnVbTGJu7LKvVHkAjuzCJExvcPP16-Z6Z-IRPjI0kTqa4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=3174ec9a0097457fb1d9e06f4065788c&_t=k96pnnq3ywNBYSL-9AgIHWyym78nEwDasiOw5tebnEn1ie4cy1TrJNm4N2e1x6tnVbTGJu7LKvVHkAjuzCJExvcPP16-Z6Z-IRPjI0kTqa4%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3174ec9a0097457fb1d9e06f4065788c&_e=IwuRsj4TPIsfZhnEj2_gtUdd4fW5fltkz-UgKEphlsSgKw49CJHp_CMyPej14cTXbJoqwbLB3BhgjKyxdaBjWVsqa8PQuBP5ufB15ig6ouR4yLoT7bCjEOQ-RCeU2RSPXLtv2x02lRLOvY8TCqxmuYmd-95YriNTXitc7PkG4f7U4D8jaPbnx1vbDZrvHzZiqYQG0l1XBsl0UeFNekPWzlP5AUqRP3RO-DVgu6uLEG2W1IGdb0UaR19qassnwZbuejlB18zrpFjMDDMVRj3tGb-xC3_lnCVmxTI5JS3iwqM0LFOoXxKGN2yh1rlP6OMeMdq5hsswakEgCsDQKESD4a7Kd-kHZSCE2RnyIMbWpcCYNKC2VVcaXafOW-BmKG7l)
Fellow patriot,

If you’re fortunate enough to know a Marine, you know we carry our identity as a Marine with us to the grave.

My service in the United States Marine Corps was a life-changing commitment, and it has continued to shape mine as I have returned to civilian life.

**Even now, as I’m fighting to win a seat in the United States Congress, I’m doing so with Honor, Courage and Commitment.**

I don’t back down from a fight, and when there is a fight, I make sure I’m there first.

When I saw my city suffering from economic hardship and rampant crime due to poor leadership, I took on an entrenched & well-funded incumbent and won election as Mayor.

Now, I see the country that I served to protect suffering from the exact same crises _and worse_ , [**so I’m jumping into the fight to fix it.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3174ec9a0097457fb1d9e06f4065788c&_e=IwuRsj4TPIsfZhnEj2_gtUdd4fW5fltkz-UgKEphlsSgKw49CJHp_CMyPej14cTXbJoqwbLB3BhgjKyxdaBjWVsqa8PQuBP5ufB15ig6ouR4yLoT7bCjEOQ-RCeU2RSPXLtv2x02lRLOvY8TCqxmuYmd-95YriNTXitc7PkG4f7U4D8jaPbnx1vbDZrvHzZiqYQG0l1XBsl0UeFNekPWzlP5AUqRP3RO-DVgu6uLEG0HjXIRwuJe4ATDRDy4Ww0tnf71hbqtpyOjFeHNuWDIjOpAUCV8QMYPqDw0k3e70Rk_u7Ms2hvRb8ORRuwYaaxuBkGYZz0qBPM2CFb2atHVS55Nmnz3hEJELHxC3UbuP5R9djN_9kzS4Gq14zOfGIAz)

**But no Marine goes into battle alone** , which is why I need your support in my fight to win one of the most competitive Congressional seats on the ballot in 2024 – California’s 9th District.

[**Will you send a Marine and conservative patriot to Congress by chipping in anything you can to my campaign today?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3174ec9a0097457fb1d9e06f4065788c&_e=IwuRsj4TPIsfZhnEj2_gtUdd4fW5fltkz-UgKEphlsSgKw49CJHp_CMyPej14cTXbJoqwbLB3BhgjKyxdaBjWVsqa8PQuBP5ufB15ig6ouR4yLoT7bCjEOQ-RCeU2RSPXLtv2x02lRLOvY8TCqxmuYmd-95YriNTXitc7PkG4f7U4D8jaPbnx1vbDZrvHzZiqYQG0l1XBsl0UeFNekPWzlP5AUqRP3RO-DVgu6uLEG09fZFvAEGnLLu9uqz8e2VuQcLc_icDr4Kbu1FCTjpKEnGW1LJHV9_7yvB-LfQZ6gUST8l3VScD0n3yk4D4MNKB9b-w6mtlBzTH-x4N6LoLT-YATeHlR1sghAENQ4zzvSyuwqLJ6kzUAoztAgA-3kTA)

Our current leadership has failed to secure our borders and compromised our national security; they’ve allowed drugs & crime to take over our communities; they’ve been reckless spenders – driving up our national debt and burdening families with out-of-control inflation; they’ve abandoned our military & veterans; and they’ve made our nation weaker.

**It’s the work of politicians, and it’s time we relieved them of their duties.**

I need your help to win this seat so we have leaders in Washington who will serve our country and our people, instead of their own agendas.

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

Friend, I need you to understand this: _The path to defending our Senate majority runs directly through Florida._
This is not an election year where we can afford to just play defense. Make no mistake, I'm not giving up on _any_ of our Democratic seats. But after the news that Sen. Manchin is not seeking reelection, our chances of defending every single blue seat just got even slimmer.
**That means flipping a red state to blue is the only option left if we want to guarantee a Democratic Senate majority in 2024. And now that polling data shows Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is already tied with Rick Scott in Florida, ****[I need every Democrat who cares about defending our Senate majority to invest in Debbie's race _right now_. Debbie is giving us a huge opportunity here in Florida, and we cannot afford to waste it, friend.
Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country. And that's not just coming from me — the analysts at _CNN, Roll Call_ , and _FiveThirtyEight_ all agree. He only won this seat by 10,033 votes in 2018, and that's _after_ he spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune.
**Now, his approval ratings are tanking, and Debbie's campaign is shaping up to be one of our best chances to save our majority this year.** She has a strong record of results and a winning message that will speak to voters all across Florida. Recent polling data shows that her grassroots campaign has already made this race a statistical tie.
We've put Rick Scott on notice — but he's not going down without a fight. He's already shelled out $3 million on attack ads smearing Democrats like Debbie with baseless lies.
This race will be one of the most expensive Senate races in the entire country. Debbie has what it takes to win, but only if she can build a grassroots warchest that's capable of taking on Scott's millions. **That starts with hitting her critical $25,000 goal.[Time is running out to make sure that Debbie hits this goal, so please, friend, can I count on you to rush a donation right now? This $25,000 goal is one of Debbie's most important goals yet, and she'll only hit it with your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78733479/454327679/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk787-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMThhMjFiZTctYjNjNy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6j91o81S9vDSrmiQywpbo9Y5bE15BzDwIFSSDlVIFJ4=)**

She has a strong record of results and a winning message that will speak to voters all across Florida. Recent polling data shows that her grassroots campaign has already made this race a statistical tie. We've put Rick Scott on notice — but he's not going down without a fight. He's already shelled out $3 million on attack ads smearing Democrats like Debbie with baseless lies. This race will be one of the most expensive Senate races in the entire country. Debbie has what it takes to win, but only if she can build a grassroots warchest that's capable of taking on Scott's millions. That starts with hitting her critical $25,000 goal.= | | = Thank you, Chuck Schumer | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: www.officialderrickgates.com
subject: Impartant
body:
Important update I'm blessed to have had overwhelming support from my friends, supporters, and patriots around the nation and many right here in my D
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=185687.249.1.937d7ff4afeca8da4eb2c3319ba0bbf6)
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=185687.250.1.27efa98cdb218d8a0110c26d4d355737) |
---
# Important update
I'm blessed to have had overwhelming support from my friends, supporters, and patriots around the nation and many right here in my District. After thorough consideration, I have arrived at the decision to suspend any potential write-in candidacy for the upcoming election. Unfortunately, logistical constraints, particularly the unavailability of key figures like General Flynn and Roger Stone for a fundraising event within the next two weeks, would hinder our ability to launch a successful media campaign in the required timeframe. Despite this decision, my unwavering conviction remains unchanged: the endorsed candidate by both the LAGOP and the CAGOP poses a grave threat to our state party's commitment to conservative values. The mere thought of their candidacy sends shivers down my spine, recognizing the potential damage it could inflict upon our party's integrity. The current endorsed candidate's stance on critical issues such as federal funding for Planned Parenthood and other abortion clinics is a glaring red flag. Let me be unequivocal: my contemplation of entering this race was driven solely by the urgent necessity to combat liberal voices on the state party platform, as well as at the behest of esteemed colleagues. I firmly believe that some within the party have veered off course by supporting candidates they deem as the "best runners-up" rather than seeking out the candidates who truly align with our party's values and mostly God. It is disheartening to witness the misguided accusations levied against me for standing firmly for life and advocating against pro-choice voices within our platform. With all of that, I'm still on the ballot for Central Committee and in this position, I will be able to help find qualified candidates moving forward and remember that the 2026 cycle is right around the corner.
---
|
---
## Vote for me also on the 66th Assembly Central Committee
---
|
---
**Vote for me also on the Member, County Central Committee, 66th Assembly District**
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives,
I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee.
As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member.
While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future.
I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond.
Thank you for your support and dedication to our party.
Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates
[officialderrickgates.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=185687.251.1.5de8836174d7b881006a470dac1c8e51)

The mere thought of their candidacy sends shivers down my spine, recognizing the potential damage it could inflict upon our party's integrity. The current endorsed candidate's stance on critical issues such as federal funding for Planned Parenthood and other abortion clinics is a glaring red flag. Let me be unequivocal: my contemplation of entering this race was driven solely by the urgent necessity to combat liberal voices on the state party platform, as well as at the behest of esteemed colleagues. I firmly believe that some within the party have veered off course by supporting candidates they deem as the "best runners-up" rather than seeking out the candidates who truly align with our party's values and mostly God. It is disheartening to witness the misguided accusations levied against me for standing firmly for life and advocating against pro-choice voices within our platform. With all of that, I'm still on the ballot for Central Committee and in this position, I will be able to help find qualified candidates moving forward and remember that the 2026 cycle is right around the corner. Also Vote Derrick Gates for Central Committee | | JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link! We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45 ©2024 South Bay CRA | South Bay CRA == "Share this on Facebook" | == "Web Version" == "Preferences" == "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

subject: Suozzi Volunteer Newsletter: Issue #7
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/542ace03a7f7/suozzi-volunteer-newsletter-issue-12676495?e=2d63ff009b)
---
# Early Voting Going On Now!
**Find Your Early Voting Location**[****](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=3cb015478d&e=2d63ff009b)[**Here**](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=33a15bea1e&e=2d63ff009b)
FEBRUARY 9th, 2024
Hello Team Suozzi!
Isn’t it hard to believe this campaign only started two months ago? Time really flies when you meet incredible people each and every day trying to make a difference in our community. It has been an honor and privilege to stand alongside you all in the fight to restore sanity to NY-03, and I appreciate all the hard work you have done up until this point.

The beginning of early voting means that it is now or never to get folks to the polls. This last week will be critical if we want to take this seat back. All the doors knocked, calls made, and postcards written so far will have meant nothing if we don’t work as hard as we can to bring it home this next week. We don’t want to end this race wishing we made one more phone call or knocked on one more door, so let’s get out there this weekend to ensure we can win!

This election is unique in that it takes place two days after the Super Bowl and one day before Valentine’s Day. I have been a part of campaigns for decades, and can’t remember a race this critical occurring in the dead of winter, let alone sandwiched between these two important days. It requires us to be more active than ever in our direct voter contact to remind folks that after they watch the Super Bowl, and before they have their Valentine’s Day dinner, to go to their local polling place on February 13 to vote!

We have a multitude of opportunities to get involved this weekend, and I hope you will join us. Your one-on-one efforts make a difference, and I am grateful for your support and resilience throughout this campaign.

I look forward to winning this fight with you all. Let’s bring it home this last weekend, and Let’s Fix This!
-Tom Suozzi
|
---
# WATCH THE CONGRESSIONAL DEBATE
[](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=5e56b563f4&e=2d63ff009b)
On Thursday night, Tom Suozzi participated in the FIRST AND ONLY debate for the District 3 Special Election, hosted by Rich Barrabi.

# CONGRESSMAN SUOZZI IN THE DISTRICT
On last Wednesday, Congressman Suozzi attended a telephone town hall where over 6,000 people tuned in! A big thank you to everyone who participated.
Later that day, Congressman Suozzi spoke with new and old friends at Atria on Roslyn Harbor!
On last Friday, Congressman Suozzi gathered with the hard-working folks from the NYC Central Labor Council. A huge thank you to everyone who turned out, especially CLC President Vinny Alvarez.
That night, Congressman Suozzi joined the Nassau County Dental Society for their “Give Kids A Smile” event at the Cradle of Aviation, where the kids received dental treatments and education mixed with some fun!
“Don’t Mourn, Organize!!” On Saturday, Congressman Suozzi celebrated the opening of Early Voting with Doug McCarron, the International President of the United Brotherhood of Carpenters, and the Members of the North Atlantic States Regional Council of Carpenters, and NYC District Council of Carpenters, who came out this morning (more than 1000 strong!) to help him win this special election.
Congressman Suozzi gathered in the sun with more than 400 of his labor friends for the LI Fed Labor Walk. Thank you to the LI Federation of Labor and the Building Trades Council of Nassau & Suffolk Counties for organizing the wonderful event!
Congressman Suozzi spoke at the GOTV Rally on Saturday, which had a powerful show of force and support. Thank you to Town of North Hempstead Councilman Robert Troiano and all the folks who came out to rally the Westbury/New Cassel community to vote for Suozzi!
Congressman Suozzi rallied with a CAPACITY CROWD on Saturday, with supporters from IUOE Local 30, Local #3 IBEW, and Sheet Metal Air Rail and Transportation Workers. In the Suozzi campaign, every day is Labor Day.
Furthermore, Congressman Suozzi had a powerful meeting with Women For Suozzi this past weekend. Thank you to Congresswoman Grace Meng, NYS Assemblywoman Gina Sillitti Clemency, Town of North Hempstead Supervisor Judi Bosworth, former Nassau County Legislator Diane Yatauro, and many others for lending their voices!
|

# SIGN OFF
Thank you for reading and for your continued support of the campaign! This newsletter marks another successful week, as the successful rallies, Union events, and canvassing efforts all contribute to Tom Suozzi’s campaign!
At this time, we have under one week till election day! Our campaign has been incredibly successful so far, and it is incredibly important that we take all we’ve learned these past weeks and use it in full force now! The closer we get to the end, the more influential you are. A big thank you to everyone who attended events, knocked doors, called constituents, and wrote postcards, and let’s keep it up for one more week! Together, we can make the change we want to see in District 3 tangible.
As always, remember to FORWARD this email to other supporters and friends to spread the word!
Thank you all again for your hard work,Sara Castelli

Time really flies when you meet incredible people each and every day trying to make a difference in our community. It has been an honor and privilege to stand alongside you all in the fight to restore sanity to NY-03, and I appreciate all the hard work you have done up until this point. The beginning of early voting means that it is now or never to get folks to the polls. This last week will be critical if we want to take this seat back. All the doors knocked, calls made, and postcards written so far will have meant nothing if we don’t work as hard as we can to bring it home this next week. We don’t want to end this race wishing we made one more phone call or knocked on one more door, so let’s get out there this weekend to ensure we can win! This election is unique in that it takes place two days after the Super Bowl and one day before Valentine’s Day. I have been a part of campaigns for decades, and can’t remember a race this critical occurring in the dead of winter, let alone sandwiched between these two important days. It requires us to be more active than ever in our direct voter contact to remind folks that after they watch the Super Bowl, and before they have their Valentine’s Day dinner, to go to their local polling place on February 13 to vote! We have a multitude of opportunities to get involved this weekend, and I hope you will join us. Your one-on-one efforts make a difference, and I am grateful for your support and resilience throughout this campaign. I look forward to winning this fight with you all. name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: what are they hiding?
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

The news I just heard has the Abortion Lobby’s fingerprints all over it.

Last year, the state of Indiana’s comprehensive abortion law (SB1) that _Students for Life Action_ fought hard for finally went into effect, ending elective abortions and forcing abortion facilities to close down!

Unfortunately, the law was riddled with exceptions, which – _as we warned_ – are always used by abortionists to commit any abortion they want – _all secretly._

Now, the Indiana Department of Health (IDOH) is helping them by announcing it will no longer release individual terminated pregnancy reports (TPRs), citing “patient confidentiality.”

Don’t be fooled, Pro-Life Friend. . .

This decision to stop reporting abortions has **_NOTHING_** to do with “patient confidentiality” and **_EVERYTHING_** to do with the Abortion Lobby trying to hide the illegal abortions they commit in the Hoosier State.

_In fact, it leaves the door wide open for abortionists to simply ignore the law and continue to butcher little babies while backs are turned!_

**[So, could you please sign your “ENFORCE PRO-LIFE LAWS” Petition to Indiana Governor Eric Holcomb (R) right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sduwo-duchtdja-y/)?**

As you’ll see, this petition insists that Governor Holcomb forces the Indiana Department of Health to come clean on the abortions STILL being committed in the Hoosier State.

If we’re able to stop this madness in Indiana, it’ll send a powerful message to the Indiana General Assembly that they still have work to do – _AND help ensure other states with abortion prevention laws not to follow down this path._

**[And, after you sign, please consider making your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ so we can fight back against the Abortion Lobby’s dirty schemes in Indiana](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sduwo-duchtdja-j/)!**

You see Pro-Life Friend, my biggest fear is that if this decision remains, down the line I’m going to see a blood-curdling abortion horror story that could have been prevented. . .

In recent years, we’ve seen plenty of what the abortion industry does behind closed doors come to light, including:

• A _Project Veritas_ video just released this past December exposing Planned Parenthood for shipping teen girls across state lines to get abortions behind their parent’s backs;

• Documents detailing how the _University of Pittsburg_ conducts human-animal experiments with aborted baby tissue, such as grafting their skin onto the backs of rodents; and

• An undercover video showing a Planned Parenthood executive discussing payments for harvested preborn baby organs, even saying, _“I want a Lamborghini,”_ when talking about the profits she stood to make from the sale of body parts taken from recently-aborted babies.
The list goes on. . . _and this is just what we’ve been able to discover._

It’s no secret that the Abortion Lobby loves to hide the unspeakable acts they commit.

Right now, they’re trying to cover up illegal abortions in Indiana by hiding the Department of Health’s abortion reporting.

And I’m not the only one who sees through their slimy ploy either!

Former Indiana Attorney General Curtis Hill had this to say on the matter:

_“The IDOH is a bloated bureaucracy trying to avoid scrutiny for its lack of oversight of abortion providers and procedures. The idea that data could be “reverse engineered” to identify a patient is no more true now than it was before the passage of SB1 and is simply a cooked-up scheme to hide transparency.”_
**I couldn’t have said it better myself. . .**

Pro-Life Friend, I don’t want to imagine what horrors will take place if we let them get away with this.

We need to stop them **_IMMEDIATELY_!**

**[So, could you please sign your “ENFORCE PRO-LIFE LAWS” Petition to Indiana Governor Eric Holcomb right away insisting that he force the Indiana Department of Health to report the abortions STILL being committed in the Hoosier State](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sduwo-duchtdja-i/)?**

**[Then would you please consider making your most generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even $10 to _Students for Life Action_ so we can fight the Abortion Lobby in Indiana](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sduwo-duchtdja-d/)?**

I know you don’t always get to see or hear about the lives you save with your support. . .

But I promise you, stopping this decision by the IDOH will save countless lives and prevent so much unnecessary death and suffering.

And it will make sure other state health departments aren’t emboldened to try this same trick to allow dangerous illegal abortions to become easier!

That’s why the support of good folks like you is so crucial.

**[So, please be as generous as you can](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sduwo-duchtdja-h/).**

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

Last year, the state of Indiana’s comprehensive abortion law (SB1) that Students for Life Action fought hard for finally went into effect, ending elective abortions and forcing abortion facilities to close down! Unfortunately, the law was riddled with exceptions, which – as we warned – are always used by abortionists to commit any abortion they want – all secretly. Now, the Indiana Department of Health (IDOH) is helping them by announcing it will no longer release individual terminated pregnancy reports (TPRs), citing “patient confidentiality.” Don’t be fooled, Pro-Life Friend. . . This decision to stop reporting abortions has NOTHING to do with “patient confidentiality” and EVERYTHING to do with the Abortion Lobby trying to hide the illegal abortions they commit in the Hoosier State. In fact, it leaves the door wide open for abortionists to simply ignore the law and continue to butcher little babies while backs are turned! ? As you’ll see, this petition insists that Governor Holcomb forces the Indiana Department of Health to come clean on the abortions STILL being committed in the Hoosier State. If we’re able to stop this madness in Indiana, it’ll send a powerful message to the Indiana General Assembly that they still have work to do – AND help ensure other states with abortion prevention laws not to follow down this path. ! You see Pro-Life Friend, my biggest fear is that if this decision remains, down the line I’m going to see a blood-curdling abortion horror story that could have been prevented. . . In recent years, we’ve seen plenty of what the abortion industry does behind closed doors come to light, including: • A Project Veritas video just released this past December exposing Planned Parenthood for shipping teen girls across state lines to get abortions behind their parent’s backs; • Documents detailing how the University of Pittsburg conducts human-animal experiments with aborted baby tissue, such as grafting their skin onto the backs of rodents; and • An undercover video showing a Planned Parenthood executive discussing payments for harvested preborn baby organs, even saying, “I want a Lamborghini,” when talking about the profits she stood to make from the sale of body parts taken from recently-aborted babies. The list goes on. . . and this is just what we’ve been able to discover. It’s no secret that the Abortion Lobby loves to hide the unspeakable acts they commit. Right now, they’re trying to cover up illegal abortions in Indiana by hiding the Department of Health’s abortion reporting. And I’m not the only one who sees through their slimy ploy either! Former Indiana Attorney General Curtis Hill had this to say on the matter: “The IDOH is a bloated bureaucracy trying to avoid scrutiny for its lack of oversight of abortion providers and procedures. The idea that data could be “reverse engineered” to identify a patient is no more true now than it was before the passage of SB1 and is simply a cooked-up scheme to hide transparency.” I couldn’t have said it better myself. . . Pro-Life Friend, I don’t want to imagine what horrors will take place if we let them get away with this. We need to stop them IMMEDIATELY! ? ? I know you don’t always get to see or hear about the lives you save with your support. . . But I promise you, stopping this decision by the IDOH will save countless lives and prevent so much unnecessary death and suffering. And it will make sure other state health departments aren’t emboldened to try this same trick to allow dangerous illegal abortions to become easier! That’s why the support of good folks like you is so crucial. . Thank you for everything you do for Life. For Life, Kristan Hawkins President, Students for Life Action Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization. |

name: Tom Fitton
subject: NEW! Election Integrity Lawsuit!
body:
MORE Biden Abuses!

[INSIDE JW]

Secret Service Ordered Staff to Not Respond to Head of RFK Jr.’s
Private Security

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31356&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2JpZGVuLXdoaXRlLWhvdXNlLWNyaXNpcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a48109fedef675e73a13f54af34c4cd70fe327dcf679a0e5789a57f8d2a103b3]
In September 2023, we received Secret Service records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=30343&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmZrLWpyLWRlbmllZC1wcm90ZWN0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=91afbcabca3ea5c769719b9bb3cd09dea7f79ebe947cfd979c55325cf56a8d6d]
detailing
the denial of protection to presidential candidate Robert F. Kennedy
Jr., despite having received numerous threats from “known
subjects.”

This week we released 63 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31331&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtcmZrLXByb3RlY3RpdmUtZGV0YWlsLTAyODQ2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=d78f4da6a81fefdff61fd640208278ef204f7fb36b6366750b6e4621c1a57dc0]
of new records from the Secret Service that show Assistant Director
Michael Plati ordering his staff not to respond to a request for
information from Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s head of security.

These documents confirm the bureaucratic and political runaround the
Biden administration went through to ultimately deny Robert F. Kennedy
Jr. the requested Secret Service protection.

They also confirm that Department of Homeland Security Secretary
Alexander Mayorkas and President Biden both have the discretion to
provide Secret Service protection to Kennedy at any time.

We received the records through a September 26, 2023, FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=30323&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXJvYmVydC1rZW5uZWR5LWNvbXBsYWludC0wMjg0Ni8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c9ea8a9fa8d865feceb0728a2a0eb5ad90eec00f51b0713d8b443abed4d03fa9]
filed against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) after it
failed to respond to a July 31 request for records regarding the
decision to decline Secret Service protection for Kennedy (_Judicial
Watch v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=30323&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXJvYmVydC1rZW5uZWR5LWNvbXBsYWludC0wMjg0Ni8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c9ea8a9fa8d865feceb0728a2a0eb5ad90eec00f51b0713d8b443abed4d03fa9]
(No. 1:23-cv-02846)).

The records include a completely redacted June 2, 2023, report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31332&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtcmZrLXByb3RlY3RpdmUtZGV0YWlsLTAyODQ2LXBncy0yNy0zMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=049b0ad64024a46825b0328fe2bb8e68e77c0c9826f98c7e570fce1e688c42fd]
titled “Protective Intelligence Assessment – 2024 Presidential
Candidate Robert F. Kennedy Jr.”

On May 17, 2023, an individual, whose name is redacted, from the
protection company Gavin de Becker Associates
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31333&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9nZGJhLmNvbS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=35cc3b16eb9b4e34b95302b5c46a8b09f143e240e37980c6e8d48679565e726b],
which Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. disclosed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31334&F=T&&hash=8729c7af20f127f2b788eb5b65bbdb33d4e6b66a385bb4232d7857d6cbbe6de6]
is providing him with protection, sends an email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31335&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtcmZrLXByb3RlY3RpdmUtZGV0YWlsLTAyODQ2LXBncy05LTExLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=29cce646be06f21483db65bfbac153f8eacc9c4d0213eb06064918c081754c61]
to officials in the Office of Protective Services with the subject
“From [redacted] quick question and heads up ...” The body of the
message is redacted except for the greeting and closing.

The message is forwarded to Deputy Assistant Director William Glady
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31336&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlua2VkaW4uY29tL2luL2JpbGwtZ2xhZHktMzQ3Mjg1Mjc1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b53d64c03d577f24bccc701f8cb4047147f5e7e315253ab318bff9cf7e7c5588]
and other Secret
Service officials whose names are redacted. Glady forwards the de
Becker message to Assistant Director Michael Plati
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31337&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VjcmV0c2VydmljZS5nb3YvYWJvdXQvbGVhZGVyc2hpcC9vcG8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=ba8562578784ae516ec32e4bf1a79442147b9647537a233e4948149b639bbd7b]
as a “FYSA [For
Your Situational Awareness].” Plati replies, “No response is
required to be given to this individual IMO [in my opinion].” Glady
replies, “Agree.” Plati then follows up with, “Nor should it.”
Glady responds, “All parties are aware.” Plati replies, “Thank
you.”

The records also include a document
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31338&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtcmZrLXByb3RlY3RpdmUtZGV0YWlsLTAyODQ2LXBncy01Ni01Ny8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=d12491a6d95e51429eb30f1d8934b82fc1b53a7f0c606eda67784da47870a8eb]
titled “Campaign 2024 – Candidate Protection: Who receives
protection?” that describes how the Secretary of Homeland Security
has “broad discretion” when authorizing Secret Service protection
to presidential or vice-presidential candidates:

> Who receives protection?
>
> The Secret Service does not determine who qualifies for protection,
> nor is the Secret Service empowered to independently initiate
> candidate protection.
>
> Under 18 U.S.C.' 3056(a)(7), “[m]ajor Presidential and Vice
> Presidential candidates,” as identified by the Secretary of
> Homeland Security, are eligible for Secret Service protection.
>
> Title 18 U.S.C' 3056(a)(7) authorizes the U.S. Secret Service to
> provide protection for major presidential and vice presidential
> candidates:

> • Protection is authorized by the OHS Secretary after consultation
> with the Congressional Advisory Committee

> • The Congressional Advisory Committee includes: Speaker of the
> House, House Minority Leader, Senate Majority Leader, Senate
> Minority Leader, and one additional member selected by the others

> • Protection under these guidelines should only be granted within
> one year prior to the general election. Protection more than one
> year prior to the general election should only be granted in
> extraordinary, case by case circumstances in consultation with the
> committee, based on threat assessment and other factors.

> Criteria have been established to assist the OHS Secretary and the
> advisory committee in their decision making (as of 2017). Candidates
> must:

> When determining whether a candidate for the Office of President or
> Vice President of the United States qualifies as a major candidate,
> the Secretary has broad discretion and may consider a variety of
> factors. These factors include, but are not limited to:

> 1. Whether the candidate has publicly announced his or her candidacy
> and has filed the appropriate documentation with the Federal
> Election Commission (FEC) and is in compliance with the Federal
> Election Campaign Act of 1971, as amended, and related laws;

> 2. Whether the candidate is actively campaigning on a national basis
> for the office for which his or her candidacy has been announced, as
> demonstrated by operating a national campaign apparatus, regularly
> appearing at public events in multiple states, producing and
> publishing campaign advertisements, and other similar indicia of a
> campaign;

> 3. A threat assessment conducted by the Secret Service of general or
> specific threats directed towards the candidate. (for these
> purposes, "threats" should be defined as explicit threats of bodily
> harm to the candidate or indications of inappropriate behavior
> towards the candidate suggesting potential bodily harm);

> 4. Whether, during and within an active and competitive major party
> primary, the most recent average of established national polls, as
> reflected by the Real Clear Politics National Average or similar
> mechanism, the candidate is polling at 15% or more for 30
> consecutive days;

> 5. Whether the candidate is the formal or de facto nominee of a
> major party for President or Vice President;

> 6. Whether the candidate is an independent or third party candidate
> for President polling at 20% or more of the Real Clear Politics
> National Average for 30 consecutive days;

> 7. Whether the candidate is the Vice Presidential running mate of
> the above independent or third party candidate

> What is the history of candidate/nominee protection?

> Candidate and nominee protection was expanded to include major
> candidates for president and vice president in 1968:

> • Major candidates and their spouses began receiving protection
> after the assassination of Robert Kennedy in 1968. PL-90-331 was
> passed June 6, 1968. (Language since adopted into 3056).

> • Prior to this event, candidates and their families did not
> receive Secret Service protection

> • Protection of a candidate/nominee is designed to maintain the
> integrity of the democratic process and continuity of government
A June 13, 2023, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31339&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtcmZrLXByb3RlY3RpdmUtZGV0YWlsLTAyODQ2LXBncy0yMy0yNi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b3dc8990c352c5a59c1907e6b212a25afdbb9d571adb14a0d8d8705148eb14e6]
includes a “KENNEDY CPAC [Candidate Protection Advisory Committee]
Criteria Analysis.” The document lists the various criteria for
providing Secret Service Protection to a candidate but redacts the
analysis of each point. For example, the agency redacts the analysis
related to:

> A threat assessment conducted by the Secret Service of general of
> [sic] specific threats directed towards the candidate (for these
> purposes, “threats” should be defined as explicit threats of
> bodily harm to the candidate or indications of inappropriate
> behavior towards the candidate suggesting potentials [sic] bodily
> harm);
In a June 5, 2023, email thread
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31340&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtcmZrLXByb3RlY3RpdmUtZGV0YWlsLTAyODQ2LXBncy0zMy0zNC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e35dbe013acf4cf2cf0a3e7c2c7cf919b9e7a039d9635f6ccfec5a8a76531ae7]
under the subject line “Request for Protection received at DHS” a
program manager from the Executive Secretariat of Secret Service,
whose name is redacted, writes:

> [Redacted] DHS has received the attached letter from the RFK Jr.
> campaign requesting protection. The letter references an assessment

Glady forwards the message to Plati, noting, “We received the hard
copy today. The word document is what goes over to the Hill indicating
our recording Secretary recommendation.”

officials in the offices of Senators Chuck Schumer and Mitch McConnell
with the subject “Candidate Protection Advisory Committee
Material:”

> As the Recording Secretary for the Candidate Protection Advisory
> Committee, I write to provide you with the materials compiled by the
> United States Secret Service (Secret Service) to assist in your
> review of the request submitted on behalf of Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
> As set out in the Department of Homeland Security ‘Guidelines for

The records indicate that the Candidate Protection Advisory
Committee, which consists of congressional leaders and the Senate
sergeant at arms, received briefing information on the Kennedy
protection issue.

The Biden administration’s refusal to provide Secret Service
protection to Mr. Kennedy is dangerous and vindictive. Congress would
do well to follow up on these disturbing documents uncovered by our
investigation and lawsuit.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES MISSISSIPPI FOR COUNTING ABSENTEE BALLOTS AFTER
ELECTION DAY

We’re not letting states get away with slippery election practices.

We filed a civil rights lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31309&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2xpYmVydGFyaWFuLXBhcnR5LW9mLW1zLXYtd2V0emVsLWV0LWFsLWVsZWN0aW9uLWRheS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAwMzcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8b17a67db0b78887d0c4e1b32c94a7094cecaf7f1d08afbcdb222102c195103c]
on behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi, challenging a
Mississippi election law permitting absentee ballots to be received as
long as five business days after Election Day (_Libertarian Party of
Mississippi v Wetzel et al_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31309&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2xpYmVydGFyaWFuLXBhcnR5LW9mLW1zLXYtd2V0emVsLWV0LWFsLWVsZWN0aW9uLWRheS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAwMzcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8b17a67db0b78887d0c4e1b32c94a7094cecaf7f1d08afbcdb222102c195103c].
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31309&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2xpYmVydGFyaWFuLXBhcnR5LW9mLW1zLXYtd2V0emVsLWV0LWFsLWVsZWN0aW9uLWRheS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAwMzcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8b17a67db0b78887d0c4e1b32c94a7094cecaf7f1d08afbcdb222102c195103c]
(No. 1:24-cv-00037)).

Our lawsuit details:

> Under federal law, the first Tuesday after the first Monday in
> November of every even-numbered year is election day (“Election
> Day”) for federal elections. _See_ 2 U.S.C. §§ 1, 7 and 3 U.S.C.
> § 1.

> Congress recently reaffirmed a single national Election Day when it
> enacted the Electoral Count Reform Act (“ECRA”). 136 Stat. 5233,
> 525 (enacted as Div. P., Title I, § 102(b) of the Consolidated
> Appropriations Act, 2023, 117 Pub. L. No. 328, Dec. 29, 2022).
> _See_ 3 U.S.C. § 21.

> Under the recent Congressional amendments, no extension of Election
> Day shall be allowed unless there are “_force majeure_ events that
> are extraordinary and catastrophic” that justify extension. 3
> U.S.C. § 21.

> Despite Congress’ unambiguous and longstanding statement regarding
> a single and uniform national Election Day, Mississippi extended
> Election Day by allowing five additional business days after
> Election Day for receipt of absentee ballots. _See_ Miss. Code Ann.
> § 23-15-637(1)(a).

> No “_force majeure_ events that are extraordinary and
> catastrophic” currently exist in Mississippi to justify extending
> the ballot receipt deadline for the November 5, 2024 federal
> election for Presidential and Vice-Presential Electors. _See_ 3
> U.S.C. § 21.
We argue that holding voting open for five days past Election Day
violates the constitutional rights of voters and candidates:

> Counting untimely, illegal, and invalid votes, such as those
> received in violation of federal law, substantially increases the
> pool of total votes cast and dilutes the weight of votes cast by
> Plaintiff’s members and others in support of Plaintiff’s federal
> nominees.
The complaint points out that, based on the reported numbers
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31310&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc29zLm1zLmdvdi9lbGVjdGlvbnMtdm90aW5nL2VsZWN0aW9uLXJlc3VsdHMvMjAyMC1lbGVjdGlvbi1yZXN1bHRzLzIwMjAtZ2VuZXJhbC1lbGVjdGlvbj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=355799eb314b210e48b99080683c9fd3cda83f03b0da69f966c298489aa8cd5c],
as many as 1.7% of votes cast in Mississippi in 2020 were received
after Election Day.

In 2022,, on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two other registered
voters, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=27407&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3c3VpdC1hZ2FpbnN0LWlsbGlub2lzLXRvLXN0b3AtY291bnRpbmctb2YtYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1b8b2e7ef9a18e3f797a44d49d3fad7b007089973d519a020f4f559472dd9712]
Illinois for allowing vote-by-mail ballots (even those without
postmarks) to be counted if received up to 14 calendar days after
Election Day if the ballots are dated on or before Election Day. The
case is now on appeal
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=31311&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2Jvc3Qtdi1pbGxpbm9pcy1ib2FyZC1vZi1lbGVjdGlvbnMtYXBwZWFsLTAyNzU0LTIzLTI2NDQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4502dd59ee253f6808d88197d07a00d2a082c4c44cd09871da1d0d2c171c467c].

The law requires an ‘Election Day,’ not an ‘Election Week.’
Mississippi’s five-day extension of Election Day beyond the date set
by Congress is illegal, violates the civil rights of voters, and
encourages fraud.

We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. We
assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who
stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls
in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=21208&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL252cmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6895639061ab0e9dd273a0f81e79d0c7c0d5d5fea1149f126ef741e00ac8c21d].

Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads our election
law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil
Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting
rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements
in dozens of states.

In December 2023, we sent notice letters
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=30885&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtcmVtb3ZpbmctMTAzMDAwLWluZWxpZ2libGUtbmFtZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e81fbc7d3f8c3674910717882ce9fea86877f982d87ca6a7e38997b95e9101a3]
to election officials in the District of Columbia, California, and
Illinois, notifying them of evident violations of the National Voter
Registration Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67012&L=435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvY3J0L25hdGlvbmFsLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1hY3QtMTk5My1udnJhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f158da4a5ae1de35e565a6a8f53da89cd8322253d93d918bf210c72ca3be414b]
(NVRA) of 1993, based on their failure to remove inactive voters from
their registration rolls. The letters point out that these
jurisdictions publicly reported removing few or no ineligible voter
registrations under a key provision of the NVRA. The letters threaten
federal lawsuits unless the violations are corrected in a timely
fashion. In response to Judicial Watch’s inquiries, Washington, DC,
officials admitted that they had not complied with the NVRA, promptly
removed 65,544 outdated names from the voting rolls, promised to
remove 37,962 more, and designated another 73,522 registrations as
“inactive.”
