name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 2.09.24
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-jt/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-r/) **February 9, 2024** Friend -- This February, don't just settle for a Valentine's Day Card...get an absentee ballot. Early voting has officially begun!Read our latest update below!-Team WisGOP | Special Counsel Robert Hur's [report](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-y/) on Biden's handling of classified information revealed damning information concerning the President's mental fitness and disregard for national security laws. While DOJ policy prohibits sitting presidents from being prosecuted, Special Counsel Hur took an extra step in his report by highlighting how Biden's poor memory and limitations would have made it difficult to convince any jury to convict. The report details how President Biden could not recall his tenure as Vice President during the Obama Administration or the date of his son's death. The Democrat Party and its leaders can't help but show their true colors. This past week, Governor Evers [vetoed](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-j/) new legislative maps, stating they were products of Republican gerrymandering. The catch: Governor Evers was the one who drafted nearly these exact maps only two months ago. Democrats in Wisconsin have no interest in fair maps, protecting democracy or backing up any of their so-called good government rhetoric. They even opposed the Iowa style nonpartisan redistricting process they had spent years promoting in front of the media. Their motivation is simply power. The term "fair maps" is just spin. [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-t/) Early voting officially began this week with voters able to find their ward and voting location at [myvote.wi.gov](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-i/).
---

In a wild turn of events, the Democrat Party is attempting to place blame on Republicans for the crisis at the Southern Border. This Orwellian attempt by left-wing leaders to mislead the American people cannot erase the disastrous policies implemented by the Biden Administration since 2021. Immediately after his inauguration, Biden completely [dismantled ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-d/)President Trump's immigration policy, allowing for [millions ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-h/)of illegal immigrants to enter the country with no legal repercussions. Just last month, DHS Secretary Alexander Mayorkas stated that the administration [would not accept](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-k/) border funding for solely detention and removal purposes. The very idea that the Biden Administration would attempt to fault the Republican Party for the chaos at our border is laughable, but unsurprising. After all, this isn't the first and definitely will not be the last lie told by the Democrat Party. Happy Black History Month from the Republican Party of Wisconsin! This month, we honor the number of Black Americans who heroically served the United States of America and served as leaders of the Republican Party. The future is bright for Black Americans in the Republican Party.

Read [here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-u/) for more information of the impact that Black Americans have had within the Republican Party and what the Republican Party has done to positively impact the lives of Black Americans!
---

# **In Case You Missed It**
**[WisGOP Statement on Janet Yellen Visit to Milwaukee](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-o/)**
"From her 'transitory inflation' debacle to declining wages for working families, Janet Yellen is the last person Wisconsinites want to hear from about the economy. Voters are fed up with Bidenomics and will send Joe and Janet packing this November." - WisGOP Spokesperson Matt Fisher
**[ICYMI: Judge rules against Mayor Genrich's retaliation against poll observer](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-b/)**
In case you missed it, a Brown County Circuit Court Judge overturned a disorderly conduct conviction against a Wisconsin poll observer who was charged at the demand of Green Bay City Hall, and in retaliation to a Wisconsin Elections Commission complaint made against Green Bay Clerk Celestine Jeffreys for improperly accepting absentee ballots.
**[Evers Rejects Evers' Legislative Maps](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-a/)**
It takes some brass to criticize your colleagues for something you created. Today, Governor Tony Evers vetoed his own legislative maps under the presence of Republican gerrymandering.
**[WisGOP Statement on Co-Consultants' Report](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-f/)**
The Consultants' report is a brazen hack job by left-wing partisan actors. Invented terms like 'stealth gerrymander' are nothing more than a thinly veiled attempt to distract voters from the report's true conclusion: Wisconsin Republicans submitted fair maps that met every standard of good governance.
**[Left-Wing Collusion on the Court: Protasiewicz Must Recuse](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-z/)**
If any uncertainty remains concerning the goals of the left-wing majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court, those questions have been answered by the money trail.****
[**WisGOP Statement on Special Counsel Robert Hur 's Report**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-v/)
"The Special Counsel report confirms what every American has known since his inauguration: Joe Biden is not mentally up for the task of serving as President of the United States. If, as the Special Counsel asserts, Biden is far too old with a fading memory to face any legal consequences for violating federal law, then we cannot trust him with the weight of the responsibilities of Commander in Chief." --WisGOP Chairman Brian Schimming

# **Worth the Read**

[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-e/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdrkhit-didthutlhu-s/)

body:
Support her daily newsletter to bring you the latest in the Senate of Virginia
| | |
---
| Support Amanda Chase Donate Today THANK YOU
---
|
Friends, Are you enjoying my daily newsletter and weekly summary?
While the General Assembly is meeting through Saturday, March 9, and is introducing legislation that will effect your quality of life, it's critical that you know what to do to support or oppose certain bills that I've highlighted for you.
While I'm no longer in the Senate of Virginia, I'm putting my 8 years of service to work for you. Would you be willing to pitch in to cover my costs?
It's about $400 a month just to cover my email service, just for starters. Thanks in advance to those who have already given so generously. I want to be able to continue to provide this service to you.
Learn how to participate in the process in which bills become law. Hopefully my newsletter has made that process easier to understand. Many have expressed that they find the updates helpful. I love reading your comments.
Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly?
Thank you in advance for your continued support.
---
|
---
| GET REGULAR UPDATES
---
| After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed.
Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency.
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU1vnDAQQH-NuYEGY2A5cFhlu1JVpYp66dGatQdixR9obFrl31ektOdcZ9486Wl-PutndN7F9TsGmt8Ma846okbjaibv1jrv_IvetQSpapB1C7qt7GwnM-BQ0dyOMPZDO01Qvc5gJyRsL_LRjwRGKiMfZGigkSaySJWbDw_IFmBSfXdpeoW9XOwFFdCilBUK0BOX5o1oMymuTDkzbfvDO4OxMSlUfn4tZcuiuwp5F_KeloU4NxiID8YkjsS5pEhN4lXI-0eIS3uuvXsQl_cz6jjv7nsJ2mDY0K1RdLf_8Mn-Q4eDy2lnQ6K7bZzyRqa4uJ6rQNbtQXQ3Cuj8OTQpFopFdLeXa_3t6Ud95rdCDn9d2iR7CK9PX2UH6ssLQFvxbLffznuXh1EoWA_jR3r57Iv-BAAA___FS536)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU1vnDAQQH-NuYEGY2A5cFhlu1JVpYp66dGatQdixR9obFrl31ektOdcZ9486Wl-PutndN7F9TsGmt8Ma846okbjaibv1jrv_IvetQSpapB1C7qt7GwnM-BQ0dyOMPZDO01Qvc5gJyRsL_LRjwRGKiMfZGigkSaySJWbDw_IFmBSfXdpeoW9XOwFFdCilBUK0BOX5o1oMymuTDkzbfvDO4OxMSlUfn4tZcuiuwp5F_KeloU4NxiID8YkjsS5pEhN4lXI-0eIS3uuvXsQl_cz6jjv7nsJ2mDY0K1RdLf_8Mn-Q4eDy2lnQ6K7bZzyRqa4uJ6rQNbtQXQ3Cuj8OTQpFopFdLeXa_3t6Ud95rdCDn9d2iR7CK9PX2UH6ssLQFvxbLffznuXh1EoWA_jR3r57Iv-BAAA___FS536) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU1vnDAQQH-NuYEGY2A5cFhlu1JVpYp66dGatQdixR9obFrl31ektOdcZ9486Wl-PutndN7F9TsGmt8Ma846okbjaibv1jrv_IvetQSpapB1C7qt7GwnM-BQ0dyOMPZDO01Qvc5gJyRsL_LRjwRGKiMfZGigkSaySJWbDw_IFmBSfXdpeoW9XOwFFdCilBUK0BOX5o1oMymuTDkzbfvDO4OxMSlUfn4tZcuiuwp5F_KeloU4NxiID8YkjsS5pEhN4lXI-0eIS3uuvXsQl_cz6jjv7nsJ2mDY0K1RdLf_8Mn-Q4eDy2lnQ6K7bZzyRqa4uJ6rQNbtQXQ3Cuj8OTQpFopFdLeXa_3t6Ud95rdCDn9d2iR7CK9PX2UH6ssLQFvxbLffznuXh1EoWA_jR3r57Iv-BAAA___FS536)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU1vnDAQQH-NuYEGY2A5cFhlu1JVpYp66dGatQdixR9obFrl31ektOdcZ9486Wl-PutndN7F9TsGmt8Ma846okbjaibv1jrv_IvetQSpapB1C7qt7GwnM-BQ0dyOMPZDO01Qvc5gJyRsL_LRjwRGKiMfZGigkSaySJWbDw_IFmBSfXdpeoW9XOwFFdCilBUK0BOX5o1oMymuTDkzbfvDO4OxMSlUfn4tZcuiuwp5F_KeloU4NxiID8YkjsS5pEhN4lXI-0eIS3uuvXsQl_cz6jjv7nsJ2mDY0K1RdLf_8Mn-Q4eDy2lnQ6K7bZzyRqa4uJ6rQNbtQXQ3Cuj8OTQpFopFdLeXa_3t6Ud95rdCDn9d2iR7CK9PX2UH6ssLQFvxbLffznuXh1EoWA_jR3r57Iv-BAAA___FS536)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: James Comer
subject: Between a rock and a hard place
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
Biden’s presidency is on life support

| | [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/So77JNXUHT9j783VLiDC3Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqdrmP0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jb21lci1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MvamNfZG9uX3BvcGFfZXJfY3ItbWVfcnNfMjAyNDAyMDk_dXRtX3RjPUFGUi0yMDI0MDIxMCZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZVcDc3BjQgplw-5Fx2WPGtwdUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
Friend, **Joe Biden is between a rock and a hard place.** With my investigation heating up and his record low approval ratings sinking even further, _his presidency is on life support_. This month, both Joe Biden’s brother James and his son Hunter will be giving sworn testimony to my committee. We have finally reached the inner circle of the Biden Crime Family, and they have a lot of questions to answer. Before they do, let’s review what my investigation has exposed so far:
* We’ve shown that there was no “wall” between the Biden Vice Presidency and the Biden Family business schemes.

* **We’ve discovered there were 40 FBI informants around the Biden Family over the past 15 years.**

* We’ve exposed the blatant lie that was the “ethics agreement” separating the White House from Hunter’s shady art dealings.

* We’ve collected **170 suspicious activity reports** from bank accounts connected to the Biden Family.

* We’ve found over **20 Biden Family shell companies** that funneled money from all over the world into the pockets of the Biden’s and their associates.

I could go on and on, but I think you get the point... **Hunter and James Biden have a lot to answer for, and the stakes have never been higher.** These depositions pose a massive threat to the Biden Crime Family, and it is absolutely essential we’re ready to weather the barrage of attacks that they will launch in response.
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/So77JNXUHT9j783VLiDC3Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqdrmP0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jb21lci1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MvamNfZG9uX3BvcGFfZXJfY3ItbWVfcnNfMjAyNDAyMDk_dXRtX3RjPUFGUi0yMDI0MDIxMCZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZVcDc3BjQgplw-5Fx2WPGtwdUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
People will do just about anything when their back is up against the wall, and I know the Biden’s are going to come after me with everything they have. [**I’d be honored to have your support as I gear up for the fight of my life.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/So77JNXUHT9j783VLiDC3Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqdrmP0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jb21lci1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MvamNfZG9uX3BvcGFfZXJfY3ItbWVfcnNfMjAyNDAyMDk_dXRtX3RjPUFGUi0yMDI0MDIxMCZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZVcDc3BjQgplw-5Fx2WPGtwdUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) _With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

name: =?utf-8?Q?Stephen=20Miller=20=28America=20First=20Legal=29?=
subject: Bombshell documents exposed
body:
https://secure.winred.com/america-first-legal-foundation/bombshell-cisa-docs-rps?utm_source=RevShare&utm_campaign=AFL_CISA_20240207&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=CISA&utm_agency=PG

Fellow Patriots,

This is an extremely important update.

Last week, we released bombshell documents unearthed through our lawsuit against the censorship arm of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security, the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA).

These never-before-seen documents make it clear that the Deep State apparatus fully understood the risks of mass mail voting and engaged in a concerted effort to hide the truth – censoring these legitimate criticisms as “disinformation” with no basis in fact.

Once again America First Legal has exposed shocking and serious Deep State wrongdoing...

DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >> (https://secure.winred.com/america-first-legal-foundation/bombshell-cisa-docs-rps?utm_source=RevShare&utm_campaign=AFL_CISA_20240207&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=CISA&utm_agency=PG)

By September 2020, CISA knew about the evidence established that in-person voting would not increase the spread of COVID-19.

CISA was also fully aware that mass mail voting schemes being rammed through in various states posed “major challenges” to carrying out free and fair elections.

And yet, CISA never relented in its full support of unprecedented voting policy changes...

These revelations reinforce our prior findings of FEDERAL ELECTION INTERFERENCE.

The CISA’s censorship campaign was primarily focused on shutting down the mass mail voting risk “narrative” – they even contracted Deloitte to help them flag social media posts for the agency’s awareness and attention. President Trump was a top target of this effort, and they went after several prominent conservative pundits and activists as well.

It’s vital that we continue to expose the truth, demand accountability, and ensure that leftist election interference schemes are SHUT DOWN ahead of our 2024 elections.

Please make a special contribution to fuel our fight at AFL >> (https://secure.winred.com/america-first-legal-foundation/bombshell-cisa-docs-rps?utm_source=RevShare&utm_campaign=AFL_CISA_20240207&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=CISA&utm_agency=PG)

Thank you so much for all your support,

Stephen Miller

President, America First Legal

RUSH YOUR SUPPORT HERE >> (https://secure.winred.com/america-first-legal-foundation/bombshell-cisa-docs-rps?utm_source=RevShare&utm_campaign=AFL_CISA_20240207&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=CISA&utm_agency=PG)
Logo
DONATE >> (https://secure.winred.com/america-first-legal-foundation/bombshell-cisa-docs-rps?utm_source=RevShare&utm_campaign=AFL_CISA_20240207&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=CISA&utm_agency=PG)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37a842e4b53c43a49e7b9f13bc2dd0ff&_e=dBk_8lTddNeq9O_WEgz1kA9_WTKLbdE5xcfwO2_EPOYuWcJKASIC6b1xajeXrrWwHQRTsQy2VPUOJpN26OpzBDYKRDYsVpRxgBuAbVLOis2jSJfpwroHwbIoAeSjdRp_UredyRX6N6WGHfvOHhHXYRPCDXPU7SHYSSl0ndYbM-8cjFUxnFmt-ZW-I7EHYzmhjIWYRoW_kzZSu0Dei6yRdErv5AVTyrBYigyDE69orFFbhwIt-_suNtAuX_dDeZWPPG5-bIxff--c_a-7fkMjicopjNXluAyWBIUcvrFD7-AksVibcVoh1fs9_4o4_7LbwyQuCMoHQF9P3EsO6KMpZiG1SI4xzuoubfWdjs8284DFXl0FTwVXgeDSakPw--TcEHIlsMLAE6mQWYA7-B_DRRXDThtaXo8p7WMh5or6qIPIJI7RnirdMYH7pC1klXzf)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37a842e4b53c43a49e7b9f13bc2dd0ff&_e=dBk_8lTddNeq9O_WEgz1kA9_WTKLbdE5xcfwO2_EPOYuWcJKASIC6b1xajeXrrWwHQRTsQy2VPUOJpN26OpzBDYKRDYsVpRxgBuAbVLOis2jSJfpwroHwbIoAeSjdRp_UredyRX6N6WGHfvOHhHXYRPCDXPU7SHYSSl0ndYbM-8cjFUxnFmt-ZW-I7EHYzmhjIWYRoW_kzZSu0Dei6yRdErv5AVTyrBYigyDE69orFFbhwIt-_suNtAuX_dDeZWPPG5-bIxff--c_a-7fkMjicopjNXluAyWBIUcvrFD7-ARuQpg5TUSasRXywOPSYZcApdD_rSHjtuD-gQyG8ZJsgK5fSqgtAwdw_cAKtgNzv4y5Z4Z2T68T25r3nfNRqXGZbLkZDV54rycOyi41SzR-DUMyVaCbE2lu3IGdzsHTsjfZE1yuBWz5-JU9qqommDw)" which you can now own on DVD.

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37a842e4b53c43a49e7b9f13bc2dd0ff&_e=dBk_8lTddNeq9O_WEgz1kA9_WTKLbdE5xcfwO2_EPOYuWcJKASIC6b1xajeXrrWwHQRTsQy2VPUOJpN26OpzBDYKRDYsVpRxgBuAbVLOis2jSJfpwroHwbIoAeSjdRp_UredyRX6N6WGHfvOHhHXYRPCDXPU7SHYSSl0ndYbM-8cjFUxnFmt-ZW-I7EHYzmhjIWYRoW_kzZSu0Dei6yRdErv5AVTyrBYigyDE69orFFbhwIt-_suNtAuX_dDeZWPPG5-bIxff--c_a-7fkMjicopjNXluAyWBIUcvrFD7-Ai2P-BcXGF1gN64vn2oTuLZpliFEn4Ppw0MfiEIaSknIHuCUqtjTUtcfsJ34qcNgbFVWngwrZyh8_JeEC2pNIxqdhH9Pi5o9szMEmuhdcsfzASyXZCj-V014SdaGlUakCFIY7DBSzc6Z2TcGcMA0Cr).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/i4hk8iS9cZM14ZrhPOhYfg~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/i4hk8iS9cZM14ZrhPOhYfg~~/AARclAA~~)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/i4hk8iS9cZM14ZrhPOhYfg~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/i4hk8iS9cZM14ZrhPOhYfg~~/AARclAA~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kCgwT1hiIiytv4WSbCh6uw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqfBYP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmXDcVTHZbtSjTZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xZKErTN488a2yaAJUMLn0Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqfBYP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplw3FUx2W7Uo02UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

# Saturday, February 10, 2024
---|---
**Welcome to the weekend!** On this day in 1940, Hanna-Barbera released "Puss Gets the Boot," the very first Tom and Jerry cartoon. The format was set from the start: Cat chases mouse in a whirlwind of cartoon violence. ([See Cartoon](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vgzAQQH-NvQWdzx_QwUOrii3dqo7I4CNcZDAlDij_vkrnrO9JT3o_5-4cOPFy-Qoz-TLmLgyFd-rwpOCEpjMy-pEISUvyqoba1tY2KCffO9Oggl73QTuFFolGa2MAN76hslGyR0ADqECBddpVNLgGwUXX4xCh1sIARS55q66ZlzLRmB55p60a8iyTn0pZb0K_C2wFtsdxVI98L_eenv5JQhkmodtd6M_rpn55X5f541tuPq4Hp8Q3VwsDlzlw-k-Wl4N_AQAA__8GoVD6)) Here's wishing everyone a victorious Super Bowl Sunday, though we know someone has to lose. ## Biden Fights Memory Loss Issue
The Biden administration immediately [began damage control](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDHPozAMQH9N2IKMSQgMDLdk6603ojQxrauUoCQt6r8_8anjt1hv8LOe_O-yXBxH3m5_3ZPmuqbF-cpvWlB2IFEtqgnzSoTUNzR3Bow2Wo_Y3GelRz-pVcMUrtNqcHBea-zV6LXqVkcNzwioADvoQA_90JIfRoQhDFf0AUwvFFDgmnL7SLzVO63xk96UW5-eTZzvte5F9H8EWoH2OI72VVxNwX3OBYG21JQ_Au1GRxFo9xS5sj-RIvnKaTv5jBBoAc8xndpOnl2UPr22QlFm2lOu8qu7KAMXVypl-Ugkrxxok98jBjVOo1IARqBt8hz2g2PkMhih4PZ0HH_i66-v_B8AAP__zSpyzA) following Thursday's report by Special Counsel Robert Hur describing the 81-year-old President as an "elderly man with a poor memory." A visibly angry Biden pushed back on the report for questioning his mental capabilities, especially memories of his son. However, at the end of the press conference, he also called Egyptian President Abdel Fattah El-Sisi the "president of Mexico." [The video is here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDHPpCAUAH8Ndhh8CngFxTV0e-2VBuGxvI2KAVyz__6yV3_9JDOZv4_l4Wij4_nH7WhazIvzjd64AB8Eh2mZumAiIuDYoRm00FJLOUOXTNSwRpBCRpi9gsGB9FOMetTKhfHX3JEBAZOAQQxCqlH16NUMQgW1gg9Cj2wSGKjl0r8yHS1h3D75jaX3ee82k1o7Kxt_M7AM7H3ffUv4vFwJ5I4vw8BelR94Vwb262JgI64MrJgZ2FdGvlLAg9ernIUq8noi-sTvRA15yldFvuOey6crJpw3bRtVpdkknruj7X9H-_HKvwAAAP__tVtjTw) White House officials questioned Hur's integrity and are calling the report [politically motivated and "inappropriate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u7CAUhJ8Gd1jHx_zsLVzchm7TprQwHNYk2FjArrVvHzl1mtEUM5rR93mf7zamuD8-7EZTC3m2rsUXzcgH4Chm0fkpECGNHU2DBi21lDfs1iksKMJgAy5SBrHA6C2iRquE0pq87OKEgAJwgAGkGlVPTt0QlFcLOg96ZALIx5ZL_5Xj3lYK6Z1fVHqXty5Na2tHZeN_hoahOc-zf1bbsrfvK8DQ1JbLm6HZ6awMzZFTbNFd9hpmaAAv-Xe119iIr_lZiVei78q93eyDuMt7KzlxGxoVXg9y0Sbu8nOvlHihI5fG0GiUApQGAM3QdGXyxxlTilVpJuCx2Zh-X7c_Gf4EAAD__wUQcX0)," while GOP leaders questioned Biden's fitness for office.
## Thieves Steal 200-Foot Radio Tower
No one knows how it was done, but [thieves stole a 200-foot radio ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7tuwzAMQNGvsTcZFPWyBw1dsqVrR0MPKmYhW0EsJMjfF-3c-Q4X5-u6XgNXPm6fYSffS1tD6vykFYUEgXrVY_aFCEmN5KUDZ5wxM46bNxgpBSRdUKnF6eJQO7u4bGICG83IHgE1oAQJxio7UbIzgs02Ysrg1KCBMvf2mL4bH32jUt_tSY8ptX2sfuv9fg7qY8DLgJeDXuf0Dltrv3nAS6ghhj2Is4fO7RCZz0iVqQgEEKW1LuQiFzTzDNPW9zo-fL6_uFY-rRs03PbA9e_V_5X_BAAA__9aVljI)tower from AM station WJLX in Jasper, Alabama, forcing the station off the air. [WJLX's landscaping crew](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvgzAQhX8NbIfOBxgyMDQDW7pWnZCxz-Eqg5Fxg_Lvq2Tu9J70pKdP39dtuhkJst0_zcpD9nEyNsuDJwKFQM3UlG7wzMR1yYPqsGu7tu2pXIZOI6net9pfiHU3s6qVsz01pr5YN-tSBkJqkBQqbHWtK7a6J9ROz2QddnXRIDvJMVU_Uba8sA_P-OBU2biWYVhy3o-i_ihoLGg8z7Naj-21FTTyBr9HQePG5yve3QAhgo8xQzJOIuR4cgLZwAQzm9WAHJB4jymzC084cgy8QV4YbJKVYTEH7DGIZZiN94Hd6zXB9aqEEn6XaXD7KSHIobuiwftqJLxh87_q_gIAAP__Jh5wFw) were the first to notice the tower was missing, and then Brett Elmore, the station's general manager, noticed the transmitter and all the other equipment were missing, too. "I've tried all weekend to figure it out, and I just can't," he said, though he says he suspects the tower was brought down and then cut into small pieces and carried away. Police are baffled as well and have turned to the general public for help. Meanwhile, WJLX expects to be off the air for some time. Replacement equipment [could cost as much as $100,000.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOnDAQhJ_GdIvMGvBPQZG_oLu0KZGxl2MjY5_svUN5-4jUqaYYzejT9-uxPhxHTs-f7qRZ9rw6L_yhFaHTgP3aN2HeiZBMQ3NntR3sMHxhc8zT6IIlNHrXW-dpp6k3e7A4WW82T6bhGTX2Gjvd6WE0Y0t-_EI9hnFDH7Q1qtcUWHJpf2dOctAe_-QPldbns4nzIfKqyvxQuChcrutqz5ruTuFCCd5V4ZLousMXPknhglrDnrNAcYEzVHHCOYHkiwpUyZESXCxHfgs4kOI8ASdw0W3udFA5UvKcnlBPF-O9SxU-mf197gp8f3ds-sk2ZQ6vi2PkOlrV6-fpOP7Dlv9K_BsAAP__4TF0_w) "We don't have that kind of money," Elmore said.

clean_body: The Biden administration immediately following Thursday's report by Special Counsel Robert Hur describing the 81-year-old President as an "elderly man with a poor memory." | | | | | | Saturday, February 10, 2024 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! On this day in 1940, Hanna-Barbera released "Puss Gets the Boot," the very first Tom and Jerry cartoon. The format was set from the start: Cat chases mouse in a whirlwind of cartoon violence. () Here's wishing everyone a victorious Super Bowl Sunday, though we know someone has to lose. Your Editor just hopes it's not his team. (hint: Go Chiefs!) Give us a shout if you have any feedback for The Flyover --just hit reply. Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . is helping us pay the bills today; check them out! | Biden Fights Memory Loss Issue The Biden administration immediately following Thursday's report by Special Counsel Robert Hur describing the 81-year-old President as an "elderly man with a poor memory." A visibly angry Biden pushed back on the report for questioning his mental capabilities, especially memories of his son. However, at the end of the press conference, he also called Egyptian President Abdel Fattah El-Sisi the "president of Mexico." White House officials questioned Hur's integrity and are calling the report ," while GOP leaders questioned Biden's fitness for office. Thieves Steal 200-Foot Radio Tower No one knows how it was done, but from AM station WJLX in Jasper, Alabama, forcing the station off the air. were the first to notice the tower was missing, and then Brett Elmore, the station's general manager, noticed the transmitter and all the other equipment were missing, too. "I've tried all weekend to figure it out, and I just can't," he said, though he says he suspects the tower was brought down and then cut into small pieces and carried away. Police are baffled as well and have turned to the general public for help. Meanwhile, WJLX expects to be off the air for some time. Replacement equipment "We don't have that kind of money," Elmore said. Record High Super Bowl Bets Cover It All Nearly 68 million Americans are expected to on Sunday's Super Bowl between the San Francisco 49ers and Kansas City Chiefs. Both are records. While some bettors will be satisfied with picking the winner, millions flock to "prop bets" not directly tied to the game's outcome. Westgate Superbook in Las Vegas has 500 such bets. People can color of the Gatorade dumped on the winning coach, the coin-toss, the length of the National Anthem, how long Taylor Swift will be on TV, and whether or not there'll be a post-game proposal between Travis Kelce and Swift. | | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf74171721cb44218ec995dc994f41b1&_e=9KZIlnKHFyoIPjx8jCbpjC1XlIFU2pTiyLnthefpVdtcx6uk5kyEIpb-vJcyQXOikLq2pfO9tdzQpbWVqH675TVXWYS5kHShAMckSpYF8uXVbTQpo1DVfG529vwtVga-axFHEWUdvmHCH9cKca6WJ3A8e_XWFSLunXyCUd_gmvPqgCq8Veop65OyBOwNOA4pUJqqc4Ou-bqjrR-Cx6pSXkDzbRgTw7EcfDurQ8IB4Rb7YqMUb4k4cVKzuNyorVp_nRKcpJi0JAfSaCpy_qoMP8oAtZ577p2MKzAOZejNyf3iMpXQKHxOaxwwHENlEaQpUmM_cBXgiGWGJQXVCMTW6Nz9hAz9-iacIkGbjPtXGq9yvYYxWIULJ0z3B6_8b-sDlyiRHGbPO-myv_iUKtu_0-tch7U_SRq2LP-K38-ZMMZ6BujAREPK4YWwyKka135j)" which you can now own on DVD.

* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf74171721cb44218ec995dc994f41b1&_e=9KZIlnKHFyoIPjx8jCbpjC1XlIFU2pTiyLnthefpVdtcx6uk5kyEIpb-vJcyQXOikLq2pfO9tdzQpbWVqH675TVXWYS5kHShAMckSpYF8uXVbTQpo1DVfG529vwtVga-axFHEWUdvmHCH9cKca6WJ3A8e_XWFSLunXyCUd_gmvPqgCq8Veop65OyBOwNOA4pUJqqc4Ou-bqjrR-Cx6pSXkDzbRgTw7EcfDurQ8IB4Rb7YqMUb4k4cVKzuNyorVp_nRKcpJi0JAfSaCpy_qoMP8oAtZ577p2MKzAOZejNyf3AYZSlUTSRFRpAyMKWv8Q9-vgqMq7_8CqRRJsRFIRzuotZCXCuSZHEa1FgeLUUr5UTp2MaNtdyPB8o5fwIXfvjMorldJsBEttWRxf-sWqipBGTWVQAq7tZHDd5cAbTSFOyVj3TMyXQnHc04M6ure0X).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09

Hillsdale College

subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce71e25c4c6d439d9cf8a2bab04f3ba4&_e=pvEiub_s7XOXlWSFBSbk9vbYJRTxgbEBseRMf2_OMUqoiULVFxM2s1Xw3be98IKCssSPO0UVC7SXB9NCxHZVssKWvO_213mgwJINdW4sGOUYGynbddt0XMFmcz4ohtxsBWeYo7c1Kf-DyRRhivArlP2lr4ePrPmSspnrpdRmZRxMDJ-o9mthV2agNLtljz1npa18VetQg4D_ySwPSLUf5IwZrayW7mg4c--zKpdDGV_EAvo1cZHtwyraphQUZlCDO8t6_1vCDGZPOvsKyIBr644PO3JPVBQLx3L1RdOoyYZAQz1qNdqJXzmW_vzOO-VN). | Happy Birthday Tracy!
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
Happy birthday to my wife, best friend, and much more Tracy McGuire. In addition to working on her real estate business, Tracy spent much of the day Friday with legislator spouses that included a trip to [Safe Harbor in Henrico County](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PQvt25ftGoQIvJBkXdwJRoUpBcqH_wUsP38kXQ0zV0VaFueXjurj5Q_yW_dGeIGObhdBewkJHheg8P738Qzr_3KSvyrRe_guoJH2YYZNxQKowv2mqiAHbnSVDCc6FGGmRXjspS1OaaLifxBlw7bmiw==&c=9_7Tb5iD7rvu6qlubfa8WbSwGTPjCFFXmpKK2t9SRid9Fz6L2nTR7Q==&ch=tBAvd_gkbfFYUg11rkt0D6Ulp9AN16KZorhpo-8E1hA6TBw4YSsrMw==), a trip to the Black History Museum, and a luncheon hosted by the First Lady Suzanne Youngkin at the Governors Mansion. I left our house 5am and spent most of the day at the General Assembly, alongside fellow Republican Senators, fighting to kill some egregious bills such as a bill to assist people with suicide. Bills like this in other communities have led to an increase in suicides. I voted no, life is a miracle and must be protected. After my SEAL Team PT workout that night, Tracy and I met up for a late dinner to celebrate her big day. Tracy, our dog Remi, and I are looking forward to Super Bowl weekend. Who will win?
| BIG TRUMP WINS!

| | |
---|---
|
This was a Big week for Trump and democracy:

Unelected pro-Biden activists are trying to toss Donald J. Trump off the ballot in multiple states. But their weak arguments were rejected by every member of the U.S. Supreme Court this week -- a fact that even the New York Times admitted.

Then, yesterday, a Special Counsel appointed by Biden's Department of (In)Justice said that Biden is so mentally incapacitated that he couldn't stand trial.

Amazingly, Biden went out and addressed the nation last night to try and disprove the report. But he gave a feeble, confused speech -- and proved the Special Counsel right.

This is a sad, somber moment for America. Our commander-in-chief isn't functional.

| SB 603 Priority Treatment Jailed Pregnant Women Advances
---
|
---
| My bill SB 603 to give incarcerated pregnant women preferential treatment for drug rehab programs has advanced to the Finance Committee. I have visited the women's jail in Goochland County and I've heard reports around the district about the challenges faced by pregnant women in jail to attend drug rehab programs. Incarcerated pregnant women (those held in federal or state prisons, jails, or juvenile detention facilities) make up one of the most vulnerable segments of society, with higher rates of mental illness, drug addiction, and histories of trauma than incarcerated men. This bill will create a work group to find answers on how to help rehabilitate young and not so young women with the triple threat of being incarcerated, being pregnant, and being addicted.

| "Sage's Law" Radio Interview
---
|
---
| Unfortunately, my bill "Sage's Law" was killed in the Democrat-controlled Senate. This is a tragic story out of Appomattox County, where the high school hid a young girl named Sage's change in sex identification from Sage's mother. Her mother was unable to protect Sage from the evil world of human trafficking. Sage's Mom Michelle Blair told her heartbreaking story to the committee. The bill would have required any school professional, who reasonably suspects a student is at risk of suicide, or "is self-identifying as a different biological sex", to contact at least one of the student's parents, to notify the parent, and to offer counseling. Our kids should be number one! No government entity will ever love a child more than a parent.
[Listen to my interview about Sage's Law on WMAL's O'Connor & Company Radio Show.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PQvt25ftGoQIvJBkXdwJRoUpBcqH_wUsP38kXQ0zV0VaFueXjurj5Q_yW_dGeIGOwygbZqzcPx56fA9SspZQ4JL3301SehY9qcxHevxS0LAIv1J5p8p_nU0S2XX7ASGWm3ngheZ67EuUY0_bGDtYZaSXAOMjthEOkTKaIuvL69lSi5tK5KXxrEl0pt_TcMsrOdmGwMaHvhzdo17gAtCO_m-UF2v3NL2I2RjXr-v9O8W3VDGjjOoS4A==&c=9_7Tb5iD7rvu6qlubfa8WbSwGTPjCFFXmpKK2t9SRid9Fz6L2nTR7Q==&ch=tBAvd_gkbfFYUg11rkt0D6Ulp9AN16KZorhpo-8E1hA6TBw4YSsrMw==) None of us could believe that the Democrats would block this bill. clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | | I'm Running for Congress to "Save America" Christian Conservative | Happy Birthday Tracy! | | | | ---|--- | Happy birthday to my wife, best friend, and much more Tracy McGuire. In addition to working on her real estate business, Tracy spent much of the day Friday with legislator spouses that included a trip to ==, a trip to the Black History Museum, and a luncheon hosted by the First Lady Suzanne Youngkin at the Governors Mansion. I left our house 5am and spent most of the day at the General Assembly, alongside fellow Republican Senators, fighting to kill some egregious bills such as a bill to assist people with suicide. Bills like this in other communities have led to an increase in suicides. I voted no, life is a miracle and must be protected. After my SEAL Team PT workout that night, Tracy and I met up for a late dinner to celebrate her big day. Tracy, our dog Remi, and I are looking forward to Super Bowl weekend. Who will win? | BIG TRUMP WINS! | | | ---|--- | This was a Big week for Trump and democracy: Unelected pro-Biden activists are trying to toss Donald J. Trump off the ballot in multiple states. But their weak arguments were rejected by every member of the U.S. Supreme Court this week -- a fact that even the New York Times admitted. Then, yesterday, a Special Counsel appointed by Biden's Department of (In)Justice said that Biden is so mentally incapacitated that he couldn't stand trial. Amazingly, Biden went out and addressed the nation last night to try and disprove the report. But he gave a feeble, confused speech -- and proved the Special Counsel right. This is a sad, somber moment for America. Our commander-in-chief isn't functional. | We Need Trump! | | | == ---|--- | We need TRUMP -- and Trump needs strong allies, not typical politicians who say one thing in public about Trump and a different thing about Trump in private like Bob Good (CNN Youtube video ==). Make no mistake, when it serves him, Good will betray Trump again. I am committed to the Make America Great Again MAGA movement! I ran into four strangers in a parking lot at the Cracker Barrel in Lynchburg. All four said they enjoyed my WLNI Radio interview and it is being shared around Lynchburg, == Bob Good Votes With Democrats To Kill Aid To Israel (==). | 2024 Session Update Week 5 | | The General Assembly convened on January 10th. I am working hard with Governor Glenn Youngkin, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, and fellow legislators to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. There are so many threats to Virginia: skyrocketing costs, the mess in our schools, the fentanyl streaming across the border. Will the Democrats help us solve these problems? Here is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to: | 2ND Amendment "Shall Not Be Infringed" | == | On Wednesday, I defended VA citizens' gun rights on the Senate floor. I was glad to see local militias visit the Senate Chamber from Campbell County, Appomattox County, and others. == | Breitbart Quotes Senator John McGuire | == | This session, fellow Republican legislators and I are constantly reminding Democrats to leave our 2nd Amendment Rights alone. It is our God given right to protect ourself and our families. What part of Shall not be infringed do they not understand? Thank God, we have Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin! ==. | SB 222 Cybersecurity Advances | | My bill SB 222 on Cybersecurity has advanced to the Finance Committee. With cybersecurity threats on the rise, it is imperative we take action to secure our Commonwealth's infrastructure. | == Dispatchers/ First Responders Advances | == | My bill SB 630 to add law enforcement Dispatchers, including State Police Dispatchers, to the category of First Responders has advanced to Finance. == | SB 603 Priority Treatment Jailed Pregnant Women Advances | | My bill SB 603 to give incarcerated pregnant women preferential treatment for drug rehab programs has advanced to the Finance Committee. I have visited the women's jail in Goochland County and I've heard reports around the district about the challenges faced by pregnant women in jail to attend drug rehab programs. Incarcerated pregnant women (those held in federal or state prisons, jails, or juvenile detention facilities) make up one of the most vulnerable segments of society, with higher rates of mental illness, drug addiction, and histories of trauma than incarcerated men. This bill will create a work group to find answers on how to help rehabilitate young and not so young women with the triple threat of being incarcerated, being pregnant, and being addicted. | HEAV Day at the Capitol | | | I introduced Home Schoolers on Home School Educators Association of Virginia Day at the Capitol. More than 57,000 students are being home schooled in Virginia. == | Many Visitors this Week: | | It was good to see Cliff Williamson, executive director of the Agribusiness Council, Susan Seward, of the Virginia Forest Group, and more at the capitol this week. | | It was nice to visit with Virginia Dairy Maid Hollis Reames and her mom, Lindsey Reames of Amelia County. Hollis attends== in Amelia County. It was an honor to speak at the Amelia Academy High School graduation last year! | | | I attended a reception for Virginia manufacturers at the Capitol in Richmond. | us in the Senate Chamber. | Senator Bill Destef (Virginia Beach) & Senator Travis Hackworth (Tazewell). | | We had lots of debate on the Senate floor this week. Thank God we have Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin and veto pen! | | | | ---|--- | The Virginia Cattlemen Association visited us at the Capitol to advocate for the Cattle Industry in Virginia. They provided fellow legislators with a meal that included a beef sandwich, potato chips, milk, and ice cream; all produced right here in Virginia. | | | | We are meeting some wonderful people. Sunday, I attended == and == in Lynchburg. This makes it 357 different places of worship I have visited in the district. | | I met with Girl Scout Troop 101 with folks from Campbell County and Lynchburg. == | | | | I am having fun meeting you at the door and getting signatures to get on the ballot. We can do better than Good! | | Fellow VFW members visited us at the Capitol. Thank you for your service. | "Sage's Law" Radio Interview | | Unfortunately, my bill "Sage's Law" was killed in the Democrat-controlled Senate. This is a tragic story out of Appomattox County, where the high school hid a young girl named Sage's change in sex identification from Sage's mother. Her mother was unable to protect Sage from the evil world of human trafficking. Sage's Mom Michelle Blair told her heartbreaking story to the committee. The bill would have required any school professional, who reasonably suspects a student is at risk of suicide, or "is self-identifying as a different biological sex", to contact at least one of the student's parents, to notify the parent, and to offer counseling. Our kids should be number one! No government entity will ever love a child more than a parent. == None of us could believe that the Democrats would block this bill. I won't stop fighting to get it passed. | VHDA | | The Virginia Hunting Dog Alliance, with Kirby Burch, the Chief Operating Officer, and many others are working hard to defeat ==, This bill was postponed until Monday. | 2024 McGuire Legislative Agenda | Here is some of the legislation brought to me by constituents and sponsored by me to improve Virginia. Bills: | == == == == == == == == == == == == == == * == == for updates and other legislation we support | Ramona Christian: Volunteer Coordinator Trump Campaign | | If you would like to volunteer, make phone calls, and help with the Trump campaign efforts in Virginia and Nationally please contact Ramona Christian, the Buckingham County GOP Chair, at ramonachristian862@gmail.com or 434-391-4546. | Don't Forget to Vote Trump | | Don't forget early voting for Trump ends soon so GO VOTE! ==. | I'm running for Congress because the enemy isn't at the gate -- the enemy is THROUGH the gate and in our communities. Open borders, fentanyl, lawlessness, out of control spending, and more. Our country is in big trouble. I am running to represent the people of the 5th Congressional District because I am a conservative with a record of building teams to solve problems. We can do better than Good. I've been all over the district and I can tell you the 5th Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda! I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | == | == | | | | | | | For God and Country, Senator John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun (==) Pro-Israel (==) American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.ccsend.com powered by

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f386feee46c4eca9acbc2e83b60b9bd&_e=6ronRc8I6FLbkX3nJnhXwwRaGvRg3f1AIcL_sKfYr9bWyhEJejIYfdTOz6BkTwfnNWMwGPtB53a4YqB_1Ox_GKZnQaqQtCHDZpe4cp5ozeY1LnkOns6Lqq4uhGy5r8NPRNM_jQAUf3NFO7ZfKfK6IMxVsYHZZUYP9FN2e6XzVRGisR4UPahiE2Mf_4CdnYXseWZlT09iRluJ5KckB0UiecjJRmK9Iq4xWAcFPF1DHOJOcdy8qidkkkBPNphoDvWmcmS1qzDUSeb-Sf0Z-iljyj4zxRk8Zy5LosxbFNFmDQqkVf9hNniI2gQCZYD32cQJ). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f386feee46c4eca9acbc2e83b60b9bd&_e=6ronRc8I6FLbkX3nJnhXwwRaGvRg3f1AIcL_sKfYr9bWyhEJejIYfdTOz6BkTwfnNWMwGPtB53a4YqB_1Ox_GKZnQaqQtCHDZpe4cp5ozeY1LnkOns6Lqq4uhGy5r8NPRNM_jQAUf3NFO7ZfKfK6IMh8pSJS3JjrrhYB_AyJhmkGM1mAI5uQVFCa02Q1jZwOdF4TThjT1RjZVeX8O83CohCtiAizaQ0iTO91ieN2TNYl-PK_eiRVwkHFxTSnue88Ks9aTpbbSbaW0oZVKAv8sJ7e_vg6AbzW2dgr-vFQbw8EJnGwkBZL1k_nX3cBpn-m) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f386feee46c4eca9acbc2e83b60b9bd&_e=6ronRc8I6FLbkX3nJnhXwwRaGvRg3f1AIcL_sKfYr9bWyhEJejIYfdTOz6BkTwfnNWMwGPtB53a4YqB_1Ox_GKZnQaqQtCHDZpe4cp5ozeY1LnkOns6Lqq4uhGy5r8NPRNM_jQAUf3NFO7ZfKfK6ILAyWDk9qGNfHzlB9Gu5KzF0PQTDNLR23txRr34NRKVK10xCwlnowZNQp5VqxM40hdELCAkWi4KJRqejGfjjG_RjXIhPsBUeUbMl-V5fg_QuFnefhAj1tZyYfahwzxHruz4oYvezxhIGktyfENc4MHt4c_tHEe-L9b40vqjh-1DG) on these survival food kits while you can.

Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=484325b08ecd4483a2b8ced2acb7bd16&_e=tTdnSjstn1kLip-VsJ7LyERqb5L0nvktpbRL1jbXQ51Iu65tBdIvl7FrPsjlbHAsLY9X3fysKjL-K7HbKVgEt0mJ9nwDnSniZrTQbHlKCLX-X7etMDqVyubOK-RAAAYpA41TB-ITUd7kon2Iuey-O2J-_gkRV-L6fEnjwNd5NbjA7YLhrKV912E33SyZJOmDaWgpiSAUX1G1QU4y3cz_wFXyqHK0Ig_sIIMQXmcJNaeztq6a9PV9W3m4j0gJutsdXynfbk-DGM7RLmfhFjXbCIZ-w_rnVmDkPxQLYVMO-9CDtaeCQokBp58-6OVFI9YaaP2oLZJB1tWdoTDByxpn8icY8VIASisCx28dJc-Sbip3WL0RTf8-fY2DLqjmSFpN0PYAUs5WbEpakf5WdewvGcb_rb3yd2GsICah0cuGrI2vvu0T5RVI3hOn60GlKH5V)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=484325b08ecd4483a2b8ced2acb7bd16&_e=tTdnSjstn1kLip-VsJ7LyERqb5L0nvktpbRL1jbXQ51Iu65tBdIvl7FrPsjlbHAsLY9X3fysKjL-K7HbKVgEt0mJ9nwDnSniZrTQbHlKCLX-X7etMDqVyubOK-RAAAYpA41TB-ITUd7kon2Iuey-O2J-_gkRV-L6fEnjwNd5NbjA7YLhrKV912E33SyZJOmDaWgpiSAUX1G1QU4y3cz_wFXyqHK0Ig_sIIMQXmcJNaeztq6a9PV9W3m4j0gJutsdXynfbk-DGM7RLmfhFjXbCIZ-w_rnVmDkPxQLYVMO-9DY2b-FXuGiNsi7k4r5zrpJSKjDrIcMPCcBYgbkk2fxMUK5NKR1VK9aoUjPTALTHspkNkOrh-aBA_rIGYgUlXaj0gRZEQ6un1AA6_uB-F7c5wjNjLovg1WGLJhKt7jcJ06mxTbv3MCbwjcKTXLtt8Ag)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=484325b08ecd4483a2b8ced2acb7bd16&_e=tTdnSjstn1kLip-VsJ7LyERqb5L0nvktpbRL1jbXQ51Iu65tBdIvl7FrPsjlbHAsLY9X3fysKjL-K7HbKVgEt0mJ9nwDnSniZrTQbHlKCLX-X7etMDqVyubOK-RAAAYpA41TB-ITUd7kon2Iuey-O2J-_gkRV-L6fEnjwNd5NbjA7YLhrKV912E33SyZJOmDaWgpiSAUX1G1QU4y3cz_wFXyqHK0Ig_sIIMQXmcJNaeztq6a9PV9W3m4j0gJutsdXynfbk-DGM7RLmfhFjXbCIZ-w_rnVmDkPxQLYVMO-9CiBt_7DRVtZjjvClE_DNW5cM2phbLM_WpPG2FKYleq1h0y5J6Cq4LbEFvOR4NQkCT27ailpX5IuezRseFsDpVz5HLy2SpCBNCmF86SYNad-AhHbb9STH6M-U6GuxWRUuYh3tMb-PINmotrhZUDOfpq)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=484325b08ecd4483a2b8ced2acb7bd16&_e=tTdnSjstn1kLip-VsJ7LyERqb5L0nvktpbRL1jbXQ51Iu65tBdIvl7FrPsjlbHAsLY9X3fysKjL-K7HbKVgEt0mJ9nwDnSniZrTQbHlKCLX-X7etMDqVyubOK-RAAAYpA41TB-ITUd7kon2Iuey-O2J-_gkRV-L6fEnjwNd5NbjA7YLhrKV912E33SyZJOmDaWgpiSAUX1G1QU4y3cz_wFXyqHK0Ig_sIIMQXmcJNaeztq6a9PV9W3m4j0gJutsdXynfbk-DGM7RLmfhFjXbCIZ-w_rnVmDkPxQLYVMO-9Dms9kuvMgapDPl3n2Qefje2Co4K0teWemvvu5aZh8aEkGYHV98-oP2K5TbhUUr9KlKGREA4kZLeI7-wBP0mWhdhZB6ha4fBhthos_VamzY9Bcn6HyB0p_xXJ-ssjTqLNF-vzvGRzNBnMfKKK3STTve).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

subject: You should probably know

body:
I'm a high school dropout who started out working at Waffle House to pay the bills and put food on the table. Through grit and the American dream, I was the first woman to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets.

|

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wK86LZNONNi7_jElsHTCLg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqf5oP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLW1hY2UvZ3JpdC1wYS1yP3NjPTIwMjQwMjA5X1RFQU1NQUNFX0VFX1BBX0dSSVRfUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjQwMjEwJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZW1haWwmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1yZXYmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdyaXRXA3NwY0IKZcNHYsdlueUkE1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Fellow American - My name is Nancy Mace.

I’m a high school dropout who started out working at Waffle House to pay the bills and put food on the table.

**Through grit and the American dream, I was the first woman to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets.**

In 2020 I took South Carolina’s first district back from the Democrats and I’ve been fighting like hell to keep it in Republican hands.

I’ve proven I’m a tough conservative who isn’t afraid to fight back against the woke liberal agenda.

**I’ve proven to Democrats I’m a threat to their constant lies and shady actions.**

[**Now, they’re attacking me in an attempt to silence me and regain power._But I’ll never stop. I love America too much._**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wK86LZNONNi7_jElsHTCLg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqf5oP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLW1hY2UvZ3JpdC1wYS1yP3NjPTIwMjQwMjA5X1RFQU1NQUNFX0VFX1BBX0dSSVRfUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjQwMjEwJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZW1haWwmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1yZXYmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdyaXRXA3NwY0IKZcNHYsdlueUkE1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[**I know times are tough under liberal leadership, but could you step forward with just one dollar to help me fight back?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wK86LZNONNi7_jElsHTCLg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqf5oP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLW1hY2UvZ3JpdC1wYS1yP3NjPTIwMjQwMjA5X1RFQU1NQUNFX0VFX1BBX0dSSVRfUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjQwMjEwJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZW1haWwmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1yZXYmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdyaXRXA3NwY0IKZcNHYsdlueUkE1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[** INVEST ➞ **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wK86LZNONNi7_jElsHTCLg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqf5oP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLW1hY2UvZ3JpdC1wYS1yP3NjPTIwMjQwMjA5X1RFQU1NQUNFX0VFX1BBX0dSSVRfUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjQwMjEwJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZW1haWwmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1yZXYmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdyaXRXA3NwY0IKZcNHYsdlueUkE1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Thank you for your support and for helping me to save our country.

-Nancy Mace

| |
# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wK86LZNONNi7_jElsHTCLg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnqf5oP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLW1hY2UvZ3JpdC1wYS1yP3NjPTIwMjQwMjA5X1RFQU1NQUNFX0VFX1BBX0dSSVRfUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjQwMjEwJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZW1haWwmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1yZXYmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdyaXRXA3NwY0IKZcNHYsdlueUkE1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1590ab1b88c447ab7bc1d142e3635e4&_e=DE9g4B-4KNA-VkVftCPcCAHwmxfupGl6l8dtsZ3GPPsXzkp7md6Za3d0q4ZgIWxfmj6Q8ypvwjgIy7jdb1G-mTL1J4C1IgnbNs3LqzTQzmEj67i3hTgL_YT-i9byXy-LZ9HCRhE7TX5me0xVmBw4XKAY46ODxb8i0CiTpotwIwlCDnm84684Cv80dj186d4YBqBtEvRcNFLEQp82IhMhVhBEmdZRLuBhqmz3GdvqEdua5OM2IbbskuP4P1gy4uYXk3KOQYxCtYeDwtGJU17AF4keB0U2Y7W20BFQnutdcFJwtPOrvLFHu_3rFrm7bcwDhlR7dDtxhqwn6-PKS3YmyQ4cWSRPCrM106PN6j1BCTx3_chjQ2gNPQai7fjutUjOu7HBGT6XvMw_tNHeybzaO7so-SxMo430daDXrfQwuCp785kVMpgzVGQsg334cYf6)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1590ab1b88c447ab7bc1d142e3635e4&_e=DE9g4B-4KNA-VkVftCPcCAHwmxfupGl6l8dtsZ3GPPsXzkp7md6Za3d0q4ZgIWxfmj6Q8ypvwjgIy7jdb1G-mTL1J4C1IgnbNs3LqzTQzmEj67i3hTgL_YT-i9byXy-LZ9HCRhE7TX5me0xVmBw4XKAY46ODxb8i0CiTpotwIwlCDnm84684Cv80dj186d4YBqBtEvRcNFLEQp82IhMhVhBEmdZRLuBhqmz3GdvqEdua5OM2IbbskuP4P1gy4uYXk3KOQYxCtYeDwtGJU17AF4keB0U2Y7W20BFQnutdcFITb-HOUqMIrDaV6-I_1_UB6ia_5jidD0B38LJevcqYKH_H815yi2b4B8_lvCmcHAYlRqZrUKSEuOgTTLv14op5r9x0RpPZnU575ApoM9dHLwOaRUuEJIkDs8QgaGzqylwUKgeizaWMl-vEpU96bdUM)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1590ab1b88c447ab7bc1d142e3635e4&_e=DE9g4B-4KNA-VkVftCPcCAHwmxfupGl6l8dtsZ3GPPsXzkp7md6Za3d0q4ZgIWxfmj6Q8ypvwjgIy7jdb1G-mTL1J4C1IgnbNs3LqzTQzmEj67i3hTgL_YT-i9byXy-LZ9HCRhE7TX5me0xVmBw4XKAY46ODxb8i0CiTpotwIwlCDnm84684Cv80dj186d4YBqBtEvRcNFLEQp82IhMhVhBEmdZRLuBhqmz3GdvqEdua5OM2IbbskuP4P1gy4uYXk3KOQYxCtYeDwtGJU17AF4keB0U2Y7W20BFQnutdcFJhke2-ivoZXGPAQYGcZPlkL3CcNiy81St4mPvLtFX8fvVllVcyPaAZp0XKQLsIACVpkWo6AlhKSSPfIS9gWibZzLwDobCWseYbQd44_PP-3-4ZWRXm6zDv5UOBf9jw54NTYNHMZv2uRw-RsuaMD9fH)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1590ab1b88c447ab7bc1d142e3635e4&_e=DE9g4B-4KNA-VkVftCPcCAHwmxfupGl6l8dtsZ3GPPsXzkp7md6Za3d0q4ZgIWxfmj6Q8ypvwjgIy7jdb1G-mTL1J4C1IgnbNs3LqzTQzmEj67i3hTgL_YT-i9byXy-LZ9HCRhE7TX5me0xVmBw4XKAY46ODxb8i0CiTpotwIwlCDnm84684Cv80dj186d4YBqBtEvRcNFLEQp82IhMhVhBEmdZRLuBhqmz3GdvqEdua5OM2IbbskuP4P1gy4uYXk3KOQYxCtYeDwtGJU17AF4keB0U2Y7W20BFQnutdcFLB48vnLbgyZDQHf4I6_mcL-6H6U_rCPr3a_aEy1yPFnQmgRpAKTSmrdOf4vpZ4E9Xw1Zc8c97aqFqTzrBwWaUGUPFCHHVVrq3EMOoPmC1rmUaBscxPWJ4l68MwU8xmldzNuK4p4ELA8AfD5xsXm3iV).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |

That’s why I’m heading down to Virginia Beach for the grand opening of our new GOP Battlestation to support Jen Kiggans! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=1391d6680d0ba1b185963ad3ffbd3ad7b42e688983c26b544ca6dd141b029647a84bc42f5e60a98026c0cca7200409012ed4041c6219acbb36cb822bd20ad913 https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=1391d6680d0ba1b185963ad3ffbd3ad7b42e688983c26b544ca6dd141b029647a84bc42f5e60a98026c0cca7200409012ed4041c6219acbb36cb822bd20ad913 SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS For those who may not know her, Jen Kiggans is a rock-solid conservative. She’s a Navy Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom who is shaking up business as usual in Washington. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: More than magic thinking needed to increase workforce participation – update from Mississippi’s conservative voice
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571672?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Not enough people in Mississippi work. **Out of every 100 working age adults in our state, 46 are not in the labor force.

**Nearly half of working age Mississippians are not in formal employment – and they aren’t actively looking for employment either. **

**At the same time, paradoxically, there are a record number of jobs available.** According to the US Bureau of Labor Statistics, in October last year there were 80,000 unfilled jobs across the state.
---
|
---
_Mississippi workforce participation rates have fallen sharply since 2006. Why?_
| **State leaders have woken up to this problem, and it is good that there is now a lot of talk about improving workforce participation.** But how?

Some have suggested that we hire more career counsellors in high schools. I am certain that career counsellors do a wonderful job, but if that is the only policy solution, I suspect labor force participation will remain low.

Others talk about more opportunity. With 80,000 job vacancies right here, right now, it seems to me that there are opportunities to work all around us. **The issue is why some folk aren’t taking the opportunities that are there. **

If we are going to increase workforce participation, we need to ask difficult questions about welfare, and the disincentives welfare creates against work.

Mississippi has a population of 2.95 million. Approximately one in five (19 percent) live below the poverty line (calculated as the minimum income needed to get by with the bare essentials.)

**How the myriad of assistance programs impacts the half a million plus people below the poverty line matters, and needs to be properly understood if we are to improve workforce participation.**

Welfare programs can have unintended consequences, and one of them is the creation of so-called ‘benefit cliffs’. **A benefit cliff is what happens when someone loses benefits if their income increases, but the benefits they lose outweigh the additional income gained.**
---
|
---
_Benefit cliff explained_
| Given the maximum income thresholds allowed, we know, for example, that if someone’s monthly income went from $400 a month to $410 a month, they would no longer qualify for some Temporary Assistance programs.

**If your income rose above $1,215 a month, you could lose the right to claim Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP).** When your income per person goes over $19,392 a year, you may no longer qualify for Medicaid (although the ‘cliff’ cut-off is not always as abrupt as is sometimes supposed).

**Take into account the different benefit cliffs, and you potentially have a powerful range of disincentives.**

**Even if someone were to be marginally better off by holding down a 35 hour a week job, than they would be by living on assistance programs, the investment in time and effort they would need to make might make them feel it was not worth it. **

Some have suggested that benefits do not create a problem of ‘cliffs’, but of straight forward dependency. They point out, for example, that those on food stamps are not those hovering on the edge of the labor market, but full-time welfare dependents.

---
|
---
| **So, what might be the answer?**

**At some point, Mississippi will need to look again at instituting more stringent work requirements for those on welfare programs.** In Arkansas under Sarah Huckabee Sanders, anyone that fails to accept a suitable job within five days of being offered one, or who fails to show up for job interviews without notice, can now lose their benefits.

Something similar may be needed in Mississippi if we are serious about reducing the number of people that have opted out of working all together.

Have a wonderful weekend!

Warm regards,
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=fe32f36c76&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| Ps. **Our ‘I love Mississippi’ podcast** has now been downloaded over 30,000 times! You can listen on Apple, Spotify or wherever you listen to your podcasts. Search for ‘I love Mississippi’.
---
|
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=115cd3235b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=115cd3235b).

_Copyright © 2024 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=b6b57643088d455396faea56f92bf8e9&_e=x8jekYbanuIZfPUeFEguTUQGpdcFZv2T9VtAzRLes5vUw2iZKsiVb_MwIFzU4bYJFMEOMfmExLdAmGOH8NfOdlSfZgBdv1zszRaSG0Z87k5KQXLQYIfr27ZqvHZumCgol7Nn2fm3J7thkIur2CE7UtsARReM8jgpp0BRYzutAjyMMIiHBQlUvIAVTY-WfiCGxndg_LBeUI_0ATFJ9nf-uAjWuL9W2mZsTYZ2LMmWhDAG_8xpMLFD2w0XgCWM0f2aihYAjGfMkvnzL2O0tkSNN3i4DDokN8W75cEP2BgVVBs2EsM0MKuz1KhNVhEY-w1yWdCYzQk9dHMhEzZjwqK7c4uBxcmbYxs_AL2skOdHo9scc7JL2rpLrWwrN1ASDkOw)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=b6b57643088d455396faea56f92bf8e9&_e=x8jekYbanuIZfPUeFEguTUQGpdcFZv2T9VtAzRLes5vUw2iZKsiVb_MwIFzU4bYJFMEOMfmExLdAmGOH8NfOdlSfZgBdv1zszRaSG0Z87k5KQXLQYIfr27ZqvHZumCgol7Nn2fm3J7thkIur2CE7UtsARReM8jgpp0BRYzutAjyMMIiHBQlUvIAVTY-WfiCGxndg_LBeUI_0ATFJ9nf-uAjWuL9W2mZsTYZ2LMmWhDCtGPW7o0Ho4fqGNIg7g4EvcJVASOQftk5w1QBCmIA5firY9CbmDc1IAjCMBvqe4up-thPIRGr9hTFI1kJ6Hy7Swv5tKUPqhJqsNmFNoE2k58NybcaIe75EN3ctsavVp9LAhasfpLvWsP5pVFMqB2IP)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**

What makes [hear.com's](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUUcuOnDAQ_BpzY9TYYJYDh9EgLtFGUbRSjlbbbsBa85AfGs3fR0w2c8shfazqR1X1r3f1js67bf6OK_WfJqgQlaaHdUEthKH03s1L0tlrxYHXJfCyAlUVtredkSgL6qsW2kZ2nEOx9CjbN3wz1ExCSkGyoQl40zWtaHlVT1C4_twDvIKK141oL00NMOlJNNpY4J1hNaCnkC6fRIfZtzlQjIGOrL0zuF3Mvha-X1I6IhNXxkfGx_v9fjnlniTjo2V81BTT04LbZoXORmVdhErhhhygO-fEiCYxMVxvH3CWhErC9fbBuMxpVXHPwRATg37YL2gl6_LKxIDT5LzDRF-EwfVAN29MDDkq2hT687h69Sn9sCdSvvIs7Z61J3XsB5qE6h8qnr7jQkE5y8TwYz-uJiHjMmb9B_p2-1n-zbQIvT3uznsXZctqmFd0_hlZ-o_v_g4AAP__Mo-tlw) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUUcuOnDAQ_BpzY9TYYJYDh9EgLtFGUbRSjlbbbsBa85AfGs3fR0w2c8shfazqR1X1r3f1js67bf6OK_WfJqgQlaaHdUEthKH03s1L0tlrxYHXJfCyAlUVtredkSgL6qsW2kZ2nEOx9CjbN3wz1ExCSkGyoQl40zWtaHlVT1C4_twDvIKK141oL00NMOlJNNpY4J1hNaCnkC6fRIfZtzlQjIGOrL0zuF3Mvha-X1I6IhNXxkfGx_v9fjnlniTjo2V81BTT04LbZoXORmVdhErhhhygO-fEiCYxMVxvH3CWhErC9fbBuMxpVXHPwRATg37YL2gl6_LKxIDT5LzDRF-EwfVAN29MDDkq2hT687h69Sn9sCdSvvIs7Z61J3XsB5qE6h8qnr7jQkE5y8TwYz-uJiHjMmb9B_p2-1n-zbQIvT3uznsXZctqmFd0_hlZ-o_v_g4AAP__Mo-tlw) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUUcuOnDAQ_BpzY9TYYJYDh9EgLtFGUbRSjlbbbsBa85AfGs3fR0w2c8shfazqR1X1r3f1js67bf6OK_WfJqgQlaaHdUEthKH03s1L0tlrxYHXJfCyAlUVtredkSgL6qsW2kZ2nEOx9CjbN3wz1ExCSkGyoQl40zWtaHlVT1C4_twDvIKK141oL00NMOlJNNpY4J1hNaCnkC6fRIfZtzlQjIGOrL0zuF3Mvha-X1I6IhNXxkfGx_v9fjnlniTjo2V81BTT04LbZoXORmVdhErhhhygO-fEiCYxMVxvH3CWhErC9fbBuMxpVXHPwRATg37YL2gl6_LKxIDT5LzDRF-EwfVAN29MDDkq2hT687h69Sn9sCdSvvIs7Z61J3XsB5qE6h8qnr7jQkE5y8TwYz-uJiHjMmb9B_p2-1n-zbQIvT3uznsXZctqmFd0_hlZ-o_v_g4AAP__Mo-tlw) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**
