clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. Get started today. Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Maria
subject: Proud. Republican. Woman.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American,

We might not know each other personally, but you probably know someone with a story like mine - or maybe my story looks like yours. My parents were refugees who escaped from Communist Cuba to America in search of freedom. We didn’t have a lot growing up, but my parents worked incredibly hard and instilled in me the values of faith, gift, and dedication to the country that gave us everything. **Now, I’m carrying on my parents legacy by making sure America NEVER goes the way of Communist Cuba and fighting socialism.** I’m a proud Latina woman, a daughter of refugees, and an unapologetic conservative. It goes against everything the Democrats’ woke narrative says. And that means they’re determined to take me down. **[I’m fighting like hell to protect the American Dream from socialism, and I need your help. Will you join our team today?](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=2c8d226b3594446c82b4b5433a25c2a6&_e=BjEJB21hD0-ubTvvXHqbt3NRG5q--WFJKu0I9fJ4NZlF9sOG8YR15xuxY28RlKGXxXGO5T0Jyf-0JmoA4_l1mSAesVupYClRNuq_q9TFgag8NkYdNM6FavzWrFJNdRxd7iqeH8M6ZBtEsUOo4B2E9wdkKgeaCDXZyNkT4hWX69MC0KNkUyuicADACeLHs54t-bWdA9JmV-9QWSXIpL9gdwIiCrO0lcIPEcQ5dtn8cUOiVb9wNVF_lhhlPe2JWxaYrwBTES4eGrZNeL3hm8rbwweYS_ADMsYwVXFpcfNGIVuQUuaQho8q-UPYF1ypIYgEJAWyok02tGeORg-MoUq_I-mA-dlUfmoNgKA2CArRcKs%3D)**

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Self-Proclaimed Gatekeepers:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
THE LAST THING WASHINGTON INSIDERS WANT IS MY NAME ON THE BALLOT. HERE’S WHY ...

|
---
| | | **[THE LAST THING WASHINGTON INSIDERS WANT IS MY NAME ON THE BALLOT. HERE’S WHY ...](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
The ruling political elites and Big Tech corporations want to stifle not only your freedom of speech, but also all your other civil liberties enshrined in the Bill of Rights.
If the government and the self-proclaimed gatekeepers of information succeed in silencing you, none of your hard-won rights are safe. You’d become a hapless subject in no time.
If elected your next president, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will [stop the assault on your constitutional freedoms](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=3).
The power-hungry operatives of the Deep State know this. That’s why they want to keep RFK Jr. off the ballot.
If you want to safeguard your civil liberties, [please help make sure RFK Jr.'s name is on the ballot](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=4) – not only in your state, but in all 50 states and the District of Columbia. When an independent candidate like RFK Jr. is kept off the ballot, your freedom to choose is taken away.
To oppose the well-funded efforts to keep him off the ballot, our campaign needs to raise $3 million in the next 19 days. [Can you help?](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=5)
[Your gift of $5 ... $10 ... 25 ...$50 ... $75 ... $100 or more is essential if you want to secure your freedom – which is being eroded each and every day.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=6)
[CONTRIBUTE $5 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=7)
[CONTRIBUTE $10 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=10&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=8)
[CONTRIBUTE $24 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=24&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=9)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=10)
[CONTRIBUTE $240 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=11)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=12)
As your President, RFK Jr. will ...
* BREAK the Big Tech stranglehold that de-platforms, shadow bans, and algorithmically suppresses any speech or opinions the government finds objectionable.
* STOP unreasonable searches and seizures.
* END the mass electronic and video surveillance of American citizens.

But that’s not all!
RFK, Jr. will also make sure that the unlawful Covid-era suspension of the right to assembly, trial by jury, and freedom of worship will never happen again. Government overreach during this dark time for our country was directly responsible for the closure of 3.4 MILLION small family businesses – many of which will never reopen.
_A Kennedy administration will respect your rights._
We’ll never treat American citizens like suspects or schoolchildren. We won’t manipulate the public with propaganda and targeted leaks. He will never weaponize the law against political opponents, nor hold our own officials above the law. We will return intelligence agencies to their proper role as protectors – not violators – of your liberty.
[With your help](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=13), RFK, Jr. will make sure that the government will serve the American people – not harass them.
[So please contribute what you can to help me raise the $3,000,000 needed to make sure that your freedom to choose is not taken away.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=14)
Thank you for your support.
Yours for a better America,
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=15)
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=16) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZdMp9-e17RgxqtIk69rUIjeOqT1-oa6z7jeUAIaHEF2m&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=17) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=18) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=19) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWSHecUzjTC_26r6_PMq84pDYNHmKWp713umpU1ZYCPsJg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=20) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=NeYFSHY3wLA-A6ZQ4K_eCvyPLw9XUBWykYMXk8oA7_J_3Q_g_ArGpQEnreGd3k1h&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=21)
---
---
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_2_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=22) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024!
Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House!

name: Team Shrewsbury
subject: Make Zach's Birthday Unforgettable
body:
Let's Surprise Him Together!

| | | [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQdfrxpeS1Qv6eZ9yYztoRu00LLKnbzgdWuqjuvt9RyI-&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=021024_zach_birthday&n=1)
---
Dear Friend, We're reaching out to share something truly special. As Zach's campaign team, we've witnessed firsthand the incredible sacrifices he makes daily. With Joe Manchin retiring, Zach has stepped up, demonstrating an unparalleled commitment to our community and our values: peace, justice, and inclusivity. Zach's devotion knows no bounds. His days are a testament to his passion for this campaign and the people of West Virginia. Sleeping only a few hours each night, Zach spends every waking moment on the road, meeting with community members, listening to their stories, and advocating for real change. His energy and dedication are nothing short of inspiring. But most importantly, he is a good person. His moral compass points straight at human rights, with all his political positions rooted in the belief that every human has equal value and deserves care, compassion, understanding, and support. **Zach is the kind of person you would be proud to see in the U.S. Senate—predictably progressive in his votes, passionate about the urgency of much-needed action, appropriately outraged over injustice, and kind and generous to everyone around him.**
---
| [](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQdfrxpeS1Qv6eZ9yYztoRu00LLKnbzgdWuqjuvt9RyI-&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=021024_zach_birthday&n=2 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQdfrxpeS1Qv6eZ9yYztoRu00LLKnbzgdWuqjuvt9RyI-&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=021024_zach_birthday&n=2)
---
[ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQdfrxpeS1Qv6eZ9yYztoRu00LLKnbzgdWuqjuvt9RyI-&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=021024_zach_birthday&n=3)
---
Zach turns 33 on Saturday, February 10th, and we have a unique opportunity to show him how much his hard work means to us all. This is where we need your help. In honor of Zach's birthday and tireless commitment to the working class, we aim to raise $10,000 for the campaign. This isn't just any fundraising goal; it's a surprise to show Zach our incredible support and belief in his vision for West Virginia. We're inviting you to be part of this special moment by making a birthday contribution to Zach's campaign. **[Whether it's $3.30, $33, $330, or even the maximum of $3,300, your donation will not only bring us closer to our goal but will also send a powerful message of solidarity and support to Zach.](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQdfrxpeS1Qv6eZ9yYztoRu00LLKnbzgdWuqjuvt9RyI-&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=021024_zach_birthday&n=4)**
---
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate: $3.30](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbJ8N1Rp2QpQ37Vg2c5quOl5yL5NC_NQ9tEm3TEn99U2y7dGasX1zHH-EE9ct4C66WQB8egpsfmG1CDwtoAGUVIIu3ifDp8T3GaXiIukvsCI&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=021024_zach_birthday&n=5) [Express Donate: $33](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbJ8N1Rp2QpQ37Vg2c5quOl5yL5NC_NQ9tEm3TEn99U2tztp8FySPlrvAl2g-y21lujIU_x6azxq41sgmQhAlotJ6UHt522iGBfy0VT0tf3Y&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=021024_zach_birthday&n=6) [Express Donate: $330](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbJ8N1Rp2QpQ37Vg2c5quOl5yL5NC_NQ9tEm3TEn99U1490NobWtrGGQFs77yW8HrfGjUFpDAhTD_wHS6r7gOGC8K9QFRT9BdMyQwtsfN7Wo&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=021024_zach_birthday&n=7) [Or, donate another amount](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbJ8N1Rp2QpQ37Vg2c5quOtxoy7GTFAOWHGtH32D42_yUhn9N_Hmq96ZQEmsIZXQdQzDVUX_2yrS68ej0psyi47apKZNmIadjtKrOWRtlMuA&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=021024_zach_birthday&n=8)
---
**[With the primary election just 3 months away, your contribution today is more than a gift; it's an investment in the future of West Virginia and a testament to the collective power of our community.](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQdfrxpeS1Qv6eZ9yYztoRu00LLKnbzgdWuqjuvt9RyI-&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=021024_zach_birthday&n=9)** Let's come together to make Zach's 33rd birthday one he will never forget, filled with hope, encouragement, and the resources needed to carry our shared vision across the finish line. **[Thank you for considering this heartfelt request.](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQdfrxpeS1Qv6eZ9yYztoRu00LLKnbzgdWuqjuvt9RyI-&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=021024_zach_birthday&n=10)** Together, we can make a significant impact and celebrate Zach's birthday in a way that truly honors his extraordinary commitment to our great state. Warmest regards, Team Shrewsbury (Brandi, Danielle, Kaylen, Kayla, Vicki, Jodi, Alicia, Robert, Eva and 232 volunteers) P.S. Let's make this birthday one for the history books!

| Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) is running for the U.S. Senate seat as the only electable Democrat in the race. A native West Virginian, a Marine Corps veteran, and a grandson of a coal miner, Zach has a passion for making a difference in his community. He has seen firsthand the struggles faced by working families who are just trying to get by. Zach's military service experiences and his work as a community and climate justice organizer shaped his commitment to fighting for social and economic justice, and he's dedicated his career to making a difference in people's lives. [**For Democrats to keep the Senate, Zach has to win. Support the campaign today.**](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQdfrxpeS1Qv6eZ9yYztoRu00LLKnbzgdWuqjuvt9RyI-&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=021024_zach_birthday&n=13)

clean_body: Let's Surprise Him Together! | | | Dear Friend, We're reaching out to share something truly special. As Zach's campaign team, we've witnessed firsthand the incredible sacrifices he makes daily. With Joe Manchin retiring, Zach has stepped up, demonstrating an unparalleled commitment to our community and our values: peace, justice, and inclusivity. Zach's devotion knows no bounds. His days are a testament to his passion for this campaign and the people of West Virginia. Sleeping only a few hours each night, Zach spends every waking moment on the road, meeting with community members, listening to their stories, and advocating for real change. His energy and dedication are nothing short of inspiring. But most importantly, he is a good person. His moral compass points straight at human rights, with all his political positions rooted in the belief that every human has equal value and deserves care, compassion, understanding, and support. Zach is the kind of person you would be proud to see in the U.S. Senate—predictably progressive in his votes, passionate about the urgency of much-needed action, appropriately outraged over injustice, and kind and generous to everyone around him. | "DONATE NOW" Zach turns 33 on Saturday, February 10th, and we have a unique opportunity to show him how much his hard work means to us all. This is where we need your help. In honor of Zach's birthday and tireless commitment to the working class, we aim to raise $10,000 for the campaign. This isn't just any fundraising goal; it's a surprise to show Zach our incredible support and belief in his vision for West Virginia. We're inviting you to be part of this special moment by making a birthday contribution to Zach's campaign. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Let's come together to make Zach's 33rd birthday one he will never forget, filled with hope, encouragement, and the resources needed to carry our shared vision across the finish line. Together, we can make a significant impact and celebrate Zach's birthday in a way that truly honors his extraordinary commitment to our great state. Warmest regards, Team Shrewsbury (Brandi, Danielle, Kaylen, Kayla, Vicki, Jodi, Alicia, Robert, Eva and 232 volunteers) P.S. Let's make this birthday one for the history books! | "DONATE MONTHLY" | | Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) is running for the U.S. Senate seat as the only electable Democrat in the race. A native West Virginian, a Marine Corps veteran, and a grandson of a coal miner, Zach has a passion for making a difference in his community. He has seen firsthand the struggles faced by working families who are just trying to get by. Zach's military service experiences and his work as a community and climate justice organizer shaped his commitment to fighting for social and economic justice, and he's dedicated his career to making a difference in people's lives. | | | ---|---|--- Shrewsbury for Senate · PO Box 82, Fayetteville, WV 25840, United States

subject: A Clarion Call for Republican unity.
body:

---
| |
---
| |
# Dear Fellow Republicans,

Our great State is in peril due to authoritarian Democrat leaders. Whether it’s Governor Whitmer’s “War on the Womb,” protecting our children from groomers and gangs, or ensuring hard-working and retired Michiganders can afford their everyday essentials, Michigan Republicans must unite and mobilize to bring about the changes we so desperately need to restore our great State to the Republic as it was founded.

Join the mission by becoming a **Michigan First Member**. Your participation helps ensure that our God-given rights will not be abolished by power-driven Democrat politicians who want to “reimagine” America.

You can become a **Michigan First Member** by pledging a recurring monthly donation of $17.87. Your membership strengthens our fight to preserve and maximize the freedoms bequeathed to us by our Constitution.

Joining is easy. Click here to become a member - [https://secure.anedot.com/michigan-republican-party/michigan-first-member](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=cadfe509b1&e=a2af77507c).

In Liberty,

_Kristina Karamo_
Chairwoman
Michigan Republican Party

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=237879674e5d437995a7c4ab487a09d6&_e=tYOGT_zuP7qLrIOz-VwK-N-_oFpHsd1y7mGuYqOEbz7ZNqEPLdiB1MVDaMuZsM5dNVemK19vnJj1sJIdb6j3R3zPHt8v4NVqTciD5FfIyw8BNeP2ds48WfPbogA9lr7-Qfd4eTelOrBNCZ8lJC52Sd_-FKxgRNzaB2lfZ9W03nN1Bh2HK6UwltbmC6U-6GhUw5z4xD8_iCPAmYrCiGnM1YPCkWwNCAzw0rWZFcO8hw_ON1zIPXArIU2VOfEplBgCeimd_iiRzNveEZcRsVy4w0SqBxO5urlIncRW98xw6IX1c12CrQIGDX5g4Ap1P0o95GCJu1buVtfa43_1VSYw5hhDLtltJTApSB_fARQh8R7Jl68iui-0I605S9meQwuFmmPzaqfb4lHaWtfKmvUXB-jGhBtjpRnCkwHJjD-hsoCjL9qoT2JPzAmFdTYzCQX2)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=237879674e5d437995a7c4ab487a09d6&_e=tYOGT_zuP7qLrIOz-VwK-N-_oFpHsd1y7mGuYqOEbz7ZNqEPLdiB1MVDaMuZsM5dNVemK19vnJj1sJIdb6j3R3zPHt8v4NVqTciD5FfIyw8BNeP2ds48WfPbogA9lr7-Qfd4eTelOrBNCZ8lJC52Sd_-FKxgRNzaB2lfZ9W03nN1Bh2HK6UwltbmC6U-6GhUw5z4xD8_iCPAmYrCiGnM1YPCkWwNCAzw0rWZFcO8hw_ON1zIPXArIU2VOfEplBgCeimd_iiRzNveEZcRsVy4w0SqBxO5urlIncRW98xw6IVCGJqX1lLEk2p6rlr9k1DsOx0oZAIrXmRcrjZ5Bu2RbojPYx4g7RnllM2ulcbkOjtxDX7ZADVnzlwDxkuFYDyeMC323hNJhK7doSIkIu_MN17vkhaSEK-PYLh8uS1TVo9sxZeTvT5xyk6cunAKBW2e)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=237879674e5d437995a7c4ab487a09d6&_e=tYOGT_zuP7qLrIOz-VwK-N-_oFpHsd1y7mGuYqOEbz7ZNqEPLdiB1MVDaMuZsM5dNVemK19vnJj1sJIdb6j3R3zPHt8v4NVqTciD5FfIyw8BNeP2ds48WfPbogA9lr7-Qfd4eTelOrBNCZ8lJC52Sd_-FKxgRNzaB2lfZ9W03nN1Bh2HK6UwltbmC6U-6GhUw5z4xD8_iCPAmYrCiGnM1YPCkWwNCAzw0rWZFcO8hw_ON1zIPXArIU2VOfEplBgCeimd_iiRzNveEZcRsVy4w0SqBxO5urlIncRW98xw6IW0miBm3CRu_rcOenNicVzaBLJ17ezVOQ3Ltlf4JOxCb6diES5DRgos7MnnY_WHs10hJbUNNuH4QiKIqVmNBsFHAV9O2mtmihZROqbKU_sBuKlpYYGfKUpo27G9pv4wJclLlA8S1X7ugjtaiQQoYtWy)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=237879674e5d437995a7c4ab487a09d6&_e=tYOGT_zuP7qLrIOz-VwK-N-_oFpHsd1y7mGuYqOEbz7ZNqEPLdiB1MVDaMuZsM5dNVemK19vnJj1sJIdb6j3R3zPHt8v4NVqTciD5FfIyw8BNeP2ds48WfPbogA9lr7-Qfd4eTelOrBNCZ8lJC52Sd_-FKxgRNzaB2lfZ9W03nN1Bh2HK6UwltbmC6U-6GhUw5z4xD8_iCPAmYrCiGnM1YPCkWwNCAzw0rWZFcO8hw_ON1zIPXArIU2VOfEplBgCeimd_iiRzNveEZcRsVy4w0SqBxO5urlIncRW98xw6IX9uG5aWcC3o57XUVAQCbOw5XVsQutT_lxOfoukszBHqfWELILHQPxNkGQHmGS7zW96PeJlKSfbrVFSozxop6-tcw92K8MaX6TZqPwOh1cl_RJhIDDVX3v5mfPZQm9GlOrxmZ9QxaCKne7deHpDXTLt).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Fellow Conservative,

I'm sure you've heard it before.

Socialists of America (YDSA) claim these countries are "proof"

Peter,
**Imagine someone who brazenly stormed the Capitol, attempting to topple our democracy, now sitting on your child's school board.** It's happening. Kimberly Dragoo, a self-confessed participant in the January 6th insurrection, is not alone. Numerous insurrectionists are now eyeing roles in our children's schools.
Three years have passed since that dark day when our democracy faced an unprecedented assault. Alarmingly, the very individuals involved in that chaos are now quietly positioning themselves in educational roles, seeking to influence and control the future of our nation.
This year, tens of thousands of school board seats across the country are at stake. Right-wing extremists, flush with funding, are backing these insurrectionists' campaigns, aiming to infiltrate and reshape our schools.
Public education is not just a pillar of society; it's the bedrock of our democratic values. We cannot stand idly by and watch these extremists erode the principles we hold dear. We need you, Peter, to step up and join us in this crucial fight.
[_**Will you chip in $3, $20, or more as a testament to our collective strength and commitment to preserving our democratic ideals? Three years have passed since that dark day when our democracy faced an unprecedented assault. Alarmingly, the very individuals involved in that chaos are now quietly positioning themselves in educational roles, seeking to influence and control the future of our nation. This year, tens of thousands of school board seats across the country are at stake. subject: My husband Hung

body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=9f3f6b51f4f64d5ca94058a88efd69cb&_e=z47AGWEqUXjGzt_WoY6qz8oE5wBaSOq05iBq0dqVoY5hGb1WQCBboW-cdQB_I0x0cvRKqerrrQSx9KazgoilblgpkN03wwOkJXApsE_S3PDioYEZVi1YDxy4yrrL-PBsrZwVWzx2S-71BCxmtk9fpl_5N4jvL-SVzJ0lA9Oi4KMbZDWpE_Jvu9E-gvFs4bilU6iZezvD3qaCbaEHrdwr8MLaMeyuvQhuh3n62GhTVGF7P_qi1BTd-4i3CSmz4k9mQjXjU6K5-B_Wq7G7zOOXE0SgCNMoMBBAEqswGHjg29Wlabnte-CxbtFOGpvs6hl08pH369VPRbtxEgxH7DvdCZoh6Sqb0zS9OqEFmdnJ89oAroNMlRE5NBnou33j-H7x)

Peter, Since day one, Hung has been the best husband and father for our family.
I’m so grateful for his dedication to our family and country.

Now, he’s ready to be the best U.S. Senator for Virginia - and here’s how I know he’s up for the job.

Hung always puts others before himself. Whether it’s the sacrifices he made serving in the U.S. Navy to always making time for our five children, he does everything he can to make sure our country and our family are taken care of.

He always says what he means, and he’s not afraid to make hard decisions. Hung isn’t afraid to get the job done - even when it means ruffling feathers.

I admire his honesty, his bravery, and his dedication to defending the American Dream for our children.

**T[his race is going to be one of Hung’s toughest battles yet, and he needs your help. Will you endorse Hung right now?>>](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=9f3f6b51f4f64d5ca94058a88efd69cb&_e=z47AGWEqUXjGzt_WoY6qz8oE5wBaSOq05iBq0dqVoY5hGb1WQCBboW-cdQB_I0x0cvRKqerrrQSx9KazgoilblgpkN03wwOkJXApsE_S3PDioYEZVi1YDxy4yrrL-PBsrZwVWzx2S-71BCxmtk9fpl_5N4jvL-SVzJ0lA9Oi4KMbZDWpE_Jvu9E-gvFs4bilU6iZezvD3qaCbaEHrdwr8BTOisG0KsAeFjxw94XfNd3nvU-ywuY49Qm3x808oHjyCiQNODGpcTyiMu_6vETY1O5R_87uj9g_5cbscIro0qdaGH3vH08iZKc-d47wyNJRqLbz7f0s6TTGriQbsGYbSEErjdJsdkLl0v7jI54ld2WTTxZo76rk1Tg8zp4Q9iLu)**

This isn’t just about politics for Hung, Peter. This is personal.

Hung knows the American Dream is possible - because he’s lived it.

He came to America not knowing a word of English after escaping Communist Vietnam. By the time he graduated high school, he had a spot at the U.S. Naval Academy.

He owes his life to America, and he’s paid it back every way possible.

But just because his career in the Navy is over doesn’t mean he’s done fighting.

Hung isn’t the kind to stand on the sidelines, and when he saw what Joe Biden with the help of Tim Kaine, was doing to our country, he knew he had to take action.

Now, we need you to take action too.

**[Please, show your support and help send my husband Hung to the U.S. Senate to get our great country back on track.](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=9f3f6b51f4f64d5ca94058a88efd69cb&_e=z47AGWEqUXjGzt_WoY6qz8oE5wBaSOq05iBq0dqVoY5hGb1WQCBboW-cdQB_I0x0cvRKqerrrQSx9KazgoilblgpkN03wwOkJXApsE_S3PDioYEZVi1YDxy4yrrL-PBsrZwVWzx2S-71BCxmtk9fpl_5N4jvL-SVzJ0lA9Oi4KMbZDWpE_Jvu9E-gvFs4bilU6iZezvD3qaCbaEHrdwr8GtqCP2QBVM2OwcJDY-KTyKp1BQFcfIcdiJ4mUfzSeloKmq4nDGP-JrWfrPBJhfTulrSV_BPqownBccseCjGDsaxCCxXiBm1rg4NV5DxZNPlFPIIE52XuSdAWS9qs2gjL-WARhxdTC_eA3AUzMTIorwJ3gh9YdWUPomJgjs0_sll)**

| | | **FROM THE DESK _OF_ SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON**
Friend,

Democrats and the liberal media have made one thing abundantly clear -- there is no length to which they will not go to humiliate, disgrace, and degrade Americans of faith.

Just a few short weeks ago, a Special Election was declared in New York, and Mazi Pilip became our GOP nominee.

Within minutes of the news breaking, Joe Biden and the Democrats handed her opponent a blank check.

They're now spending millions to ruin a good woman of faith who just wants to serve the community and country she loves so deeply.

Just like how they attacked me for my faith when I became Speaker of the House - they've attacked her ethnicity, her character, and her faith relentlessly.

And that's why I'm asking you to stand with me in supporting Mazi today against the disgusting attacks of the liberal media, and the radical left.

Hi Friends, Our campaign is working hard right now to schedule some exciting events all across the state in the coming months to meet you and other supporters in your community! But Tennessee is a big state, and there are tons of logistics that go into planning these events. One of our biggest needs right now that you can help with is supporter housing! We are looking for folks with a spare room or two who would volunteer to host campaign staff and volunteers as we travel to every part of Tennessee. **If you are interested in helping,****[please fill out this form](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78743052/454341480/1670580324?usp=sf_link&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzE1NTQxZi0xY2M4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e2GDY5x2oa65W3G6A0F7uzClxVWrYQCBIwRGfpH3v5Y=&emci=2e79739f-9cc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=9715541f-1cc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=46764483).** Thank you so much for all of your support and we can’t wait to see you out on the campaign trail! -Team Gloria
| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

| | Peter,

Empowering parents to make decisions about their children's education, health, and overall well-being is essential for the future of our communities. Parents know what's best for their children, and we must champion their fundamental role in shaping the next generation.

With your help, we can ensure that parents have the freedom and support to make the best choices for their families. Will you stand with me in defending parents' rights?

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78743446/454342965/38783913?refcode=em-2.10.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmY1NjhhZC0xY2M4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eR0M3MRo6aZ2qwlOtgNZ63K2iD5EMAnA4u92kzkVxYs=) The Arizona Republican Party is COMPLETELY unhinged, folks... With just months to go until the general election, AZ Republicans just introduced a bill that would let legislators OVERRULE voters in presidential elections. Republicans are trying to do now what they couldn’t in 2020: ignore the will of the voters, and overturn election results they don’t like. **Folks, ****if this law had existed in 2020, extreme MAGA Republicans could have thrown out President Biden’s win – and picked electors for Donald Trump instead.** The GOP will scream “VOTER FRAUD” one second but then commit fraud themselves by trying to overturn free and fair elections. This isn’t your grandfather’s Republican Party. It’s an un-American and un-Democratic circus. My friends at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State are monitoring these threats and are gearing up for the long fight ahead, but they need the support from grassroots Democrats like you. With just months to go until the general election, AZ Republicans just introduced a bill that would let legislators OVERRULE voters in presidential elections. Republicans are trying to do now what they couldn’t in 2020: ignore the will of the voters, and overturn election results they don’t like. Folks, if this law had existed in 2020, extreme MAGA Republicans could have thrown out President Biden’s win – and picked electors for Donald Trump instead. The GOP will scream “VOTER FRAUD” one second but then commit fraud themselves by trying to overturn free and fair elections. This isn’t your grandfather’s Republican Party. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Remember the DCCC blacklist against us?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Remember a few years ago when the DCCC (House Democrats’ fundraising arm)
blacklisted anyone working to support progressive candidates challenging
moderate, anti-choice incumbents in the Democratic primaries?

When everyday working-class people were challenging corporate-backed
incumbents, the DCCC made an entire blacklist to prevent our party from
looking more like the people that elect them.

Now, as AIPAC threatens to spend $100 million against progressive
Democratic incumbents with Republican megadonor support, the DCCC is
silent.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240210.wQqaKB&refcode=em20240210-33249&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=33249%2E1203867%2ErBM0NX ]We’re pulling out all the stops to go up against this GOP-funded
outside group and re-elect every Squad member in 2024: chip in now to fuel
our fight.

AIPAC is building a war chest worth tens of millions of dollars largely
funded by millionaires, billionaires, and right-wing extremists who also
contribute to the likes of Donald Trump, Nikki Haley, and other GOP
candidates.

The right-wing backed, anti-Palestinian lobby group has “publicly declared
war on progressive congressmembers” and is planning to spend big money to
unseat them in this year’s primary elections.

Just look at New York’s 16th district, where AIPAC is the single-largest
donor to Jamaal Bowman’s moderate challenger, George Latimer. He received
$600,000 from AIPAC after they hand-picked him to run against Jamaal.
Latimer is also using anti-union consultant Global Strategy Group (GSG)
for polling support.

As The American Prospect noted, “GSG taking on Latimer as a client shows
that the Democratic Party’s top corporate consultants are willing to help
unseat Democratic incumbents—a strategy that progressives were excoriated
for just a few years ago by the very same people when the dynamic was
reversed.

Apparently, it’s okay to challenge Democratic incumbents when they’re
pro-peace progressives, just not when they’re corporate-backed
establishment Democrats.

It goes to show that we can’t sit back and rely on the Democratic
establishment to protect Squad incumbents like Jamaal, Cori, Ilhan, and
Rashida. That’s where you come in.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240210.wQqaKB&refcode=em20240210-33249&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=33249%2E1203867%2ErBM0NX ]If you can afford to, please pitch in $3 or more to
directly support Justice Democrats’ work to re-elect the Squad and stop
AIPAC’s right-wing infiltration of our Democratic primaries in 2024 →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240210.wQqaKB&refcode=em20240210-33249&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=33249%2E1203867%2ErBM0NX ]Contribute $3

If the Democratic Party truly cares about protecting incumbents who fight
for our shared values and democracy, they would create an AIPAC blacklist
and demand candidates stop taking their right-wing megadonor money.

We won’t hold our breath. Instead, we’re going to keep building the
resources necessary to fight back and protect our young, diverse,
working-class bloc of leaders committed to creating progressive change for
the people.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=33249%2E1203867%2ErBM0NX ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=33249%2E1203867%2ErBM0NX ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240210-33249-footer&t=1024&refcode2=33249_1203867_rBM0NX&akid=33249%2E1203867%2ErBM0NX

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=33249%2E1203867%2ErBM0NX

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Jon Tester
subject: before my morning coffee
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds)
---
Good morning, Folks.

Sorry for reaching out first thing in the morning. I’m up early looking over our fundraising numbers while drinking my coffee.

My team just crunched the numbers, we’re still $13,758 short of our mid-month goal—and we only have until 11:59PM to make things right.

We’ve done a good job of closing the gap over the past couple of days, and I truly appreciate how this team showed up for us. But truthfully, I’m worried about hitting our goal.

Record-breaking amounts of money are being spent in Montana’s Senate race. If we don’t turn things around now, it’ll be a big sign that our grassroots campaign is falling behind.

**To hold our own amidst the mind-boggling amounts of spending, we’ve got to hit every single goal leading up to Election Day—and that’s why I have to ask:** [**Will you split a donation of any amount between my campaign and Fight for Reform to help us reach our critical mid-month goal and help them fight to elect state and local Democrats? You can click here or the buttons below to add your support:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37049?t=7&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Jon Tester will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37050?t=8&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37051?t=9&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37052?t=10&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37053?t=11&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37049?t=12&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds)
Thanks for having my back during stressful times like this one. And sorry again for reaching out at the crack of dawn.

Hope you enjoy your morning coffee like I’m about to.

—Jon
Jon Tester is only asking for contributions of up to $5,000 from individuals, federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. Jon Tester is not asking for contributions in excess of that amount or any contributions from corporations, unions, or other federally prohibited sources.
---
| | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035.
Authorized by Jon Tester for U.S. Senate.
Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors.
Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible.
fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds).**

[Click here](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails/?t=4&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?t=13&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Fight for Reform »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26914?t=5&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26915?t=6&akid=20761%2E4449941%2EHPY9ds)

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ff0cc3a1d5e74b939d0193f4077a550a&_e=RWW26f_M1pFqCNwxBkVLIpcU6dfwN7C7QpvSnMxdu7h1QV9a4Pe11AWL3CDarw1d8cwfPcjJ_zqjZ7f4jyr1daBIKSriJlN-Oqsf995TK4Nux72kjeASCPw-7BYO76zsuuNgX4boStE-fb1B85CnZuyBUKbI_wF3mDV1mqFzifHjgQxUsIwALrP8RXP24B2CX9EzJjm4cRSPtcHXOucSfzIBD6pGdyNFpcQ8qqYFtcsHw_i3FhgHOYbqTWBZrl8nKUb-ERkcHAKnLgWvpjkr0D2t1d4dDLDt9uqixBU4K9VJKa_gkkZ1m8dH_qHRuvEa8q7oNlI_exFy9iKCKmw87NR3oFQW50F-CrjG8NHyHgEckbggQTe7b7wEXEPpupySy2TAAA2tTXnEsHrmhLBa82ah6NN3Xmf_0CyA19p-0-q1mgSjnqcMQzck5taanTmrrHxgcEYHlAISmY8N6wXoOg4nZCb-jm0aaPxiQfBKGHY%3D)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ff0cc3a1d5e74b939d0193f4077a550a&_e=RWW26f_M1pFqCNwxBkVLIpcU6dfwN7C7QpvSnMxdu7h1QV9a4Pe11AWL3CDarw1d8cwfPcjJ_zqjZ7f4jyr1daBIKSriJlN-Oqsf995TK4Nux72kjeASCPw-7BYO76zsuuNgX4boStE-fb1B85CnZuyBUKbI_wF3mDV1mqFzifHjgQxUsIwALrP8RXP24B2CX9EzJjm4cRSPtcHXOucSfzIBD6pGdyNFpcQ8qqYFtcsHw_i3FhgHOYbqTWBZrl8nKUb-ERkcHAKnLgWvpjkr0D2t1d4dDLDt9uqixBU4K9VJKa_gkkZ1m8dH_qHRuvEa8q7oNlI_exFy9iKCKmw87JVIzRyBPPN646eFQVXqQmDNObunjMey_H53gxxjeqQ4M5KPrCPI65-Us6BavhIceZgSfmzssFdjMLMB7RNDLOS4fFjWxpYxq6ra3dLUr6c0hWqhjyrt0hSZTomwPcurfQO6N4zPTYuLMGSg6IIR1ks%3D)
---

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ff0cc3a1d5e74b939d0193f4077a550a&_e=RWW26f_M1pFqCNwxBkVLIpcU6dfwN7C7QpvSnMxdu7h1QV9a4Pe11AWL3CDarw1d8cwfPcjJ_zqjZ7f4jyr1daBIKSriJlN-Oqsf995TK4Nux72kjeASCPw-7BYO76zsuuNgX4boStE-fb1B85CnZuyBUKbI_wF3mDV1mqFzifHjgQxUsIwALrP8RXP24B2CX9EzJjm4cRSPtcHXOucSfzIBD6pGdyNFpcQ8qqYFtcsHw_i3FhgHOYbqTWBZrl8nKUb-ERkcHAKnLgWvpjkr0D2t1d4dDLDt9uqixBU4K9VJKa_gkkZ1m8dH_qHRuvEa8q7oNlI_exFy9iKCKmw87LQzwbsN0534G36Iccitlxldjw8j6OAVNYb1gBFiD-FZJjUmMaTuuQlb2q5QxZWOAudPB0tveAVgqwlnhXp44_-PzIL81_yCiyYyO3aRQ-VxySMdPGsfap0fWWw7MEcMDwziIguAO4E4nihqELb6Uh4%3D)
---

And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word.

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
Special Election NY-03

**April 5, 2023.**

That was the day I launched my reelection campaign, friend. In all honesty, I was a bit nervous. I was confident in this grassroots team, but I knew that one of the biggest challenges would be raising the kind of money we need to win.
**10%.**

That's the percentage of people who open emails like this – and you're one of them. I hope I can count on you to take the next step by chipping in today. Because every donation – no matter the amount – makes a difference.
**$20,000.**

That's what we need to raise before our midnight deadline to hold onto Nevada's battleground seat.
_CNN_ is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, and polling shows me neck and neck. We're one misstep away from losing Nevada to Mitch McConnell and his allies – and Senate control along with it. That's why we can't risk missing crucial goals like this one.

I was confident in this grassroots team, but I knew that one of the biggest challenges would be raising the kind of money we need to win. 10%. That's the percentage of people who open emails like this – and you're one of them. I hope I can count on you to take the next step by chipping in today. Because every donation – no matter the amount – makes a difference. $20,000. That's what we need to raise before our midnight deadline to hold onto Nevada's battleground seat. CNN is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, and polling shows me neck and neck. We're one misstep away from losing Nevada to Mitch McConnell and his allies – and Senate control along with it. That's why we can't risk missing crucial goals like this one. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0a3bbb3f8ef4e86bbf9082ab9962a1f&_e=BIrdo0j1-1DpYNeSOcEISOIZvwNCtPQn3UVLpiPOq9UUTOrcxFPJzz-Kee4-6-IjUBNfBWTmY7fmtTjYOpGJRUGuxXg7cHDnLDgeKj7dxS821geobCW8zyRu3xoelaO7N8zURkvTRAeo6DPL00kRD-qzMoCpJFJn_gOmaGgxiXU1MlxfHLiL-1NJC7duJBT-TiCyy6NB2kL3y9x6wdIA_Ab6B5xymbCBiMx4Zd8Efl3hEjBsymUNWzFnUssYmO7Wi9YLzENHZe80JCLZDU2HPF-9OxRi7m1eB7D_cvqr5ctJI-TrvXFEih6jP5KTkCnCR_-lSoDPJ1zYyxYhGMXZyj6F9E05RC4ixi7wGWMtdv4Hfi0seOo0dXfjqY-LYJvH7x0iqLtoaXqknoLGFy9QzKmSnznP1mAAQTBXQZdHHZ468xcm1oE2Xs42cAFooPZJ)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0a3bbb3f8ef4e86bbf9082ab9962a1f&_e=BIrdo0j1-1DpYNeSOcEISOIZvwNCtPQn3UVLpiPOq9UUTOrcxFPJzz-Kee4-6-IjUBNfBWTmY7fmtTjYOpGJRUGuxXg7cHDnLDgeKj7dxS821geobCW8zyRu3xoelaO7N8zURkvTRAeo6DPL00kRD-qzMoCpJFJn_gOmaGgxiXU1MlxfHLiL-1NJC7duJBT-TiCyy6NB2kL3y9x6wdIA_Ab6B5xymbCBiMx4Zd8Efl3hEjBsymUNWzFnUssYmO7Wi9YLzENHZe80JCLZDU2HPF-9OxRi7m1eB7D_cvqr5cuiRgL6S0xRfQpO2K9H1PPqD3Czs_6hgszPgGTYBNN5ryPSd9Df1Mpf09JfybH7SQNk5SUv0XPhG-1_qg8SDQCW22W2-BJ7046jRT7kBDJD06qkX8xYISRuoJvq4rv2urLIfUg0B5CI3y835u0vEo27)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0a3bbb3f8ef4e86bbf9082ab9962a1f&_e=BIrdo0j1-1DpYNeSOcEISOIZvwNCtPQn3UVLpiPOq9UUTOrcxFPJzz-Kee4-6-IjUBNfBWTmY7fmtTjYOpGJRUGuxXg7cHDnLDgeKj7dxS821geobCW8zyRu3xoelaO7N8zURkvTRAeo6DPL00kRD-qzMoCpJFJn_gOmaGgxiXU1MlxfHLiL-1NJC7duJBT-TiCyy6NB2kL3y9x6wdIA_Ab6B5xymbCBiMx4Zd8Efl3hEjBsymUNWzFnUssYmO7Wi9YLzENHZe80JCLZDU2HPF-9OxRi7m1eB7D_cvqr5csRa1vr-RSLuN_rLn6kUFIggXddOXd4hhw_hluBRiG0alp619_jXh0uYXQXurD6nVDhj9RoRbcIRg3cyDvPWcLWPLCI6gKF2smBZbZrw2J9PXjRwSo3gYxlYBE0Nlzaqd3QwOvEd0Y6rydkgJEmgvbG)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0a3bbb3f8ef4e86bbf9082ab9962a1f&_e=BIrdo0j1-1DpYNeSOcEISOIZvwNCtPQn3UVLpiPOq9UUTOrcxFPJzz-Kee4-6-IjUBNfBWTmY7fmtTjYOpGJRUGuxXg7cHDnLDgeKj7dxS821geobCW8zyRu3xoelaO7N8zURkvTRAeo6DPL00kRD-qzMoCpJFJn_gOmaGgxiXU1MlxfHLiL-1NJC7duJBT-TiCyy6NB2kL3y9x6wdIA_Ab6B5xymbCBiMx4Zd8Efl3hEjBsymUNWzFnUssYmO7Wi9YLzENHZe80JCLZDU2HPF-9OxRi7m1eB7D_cvqr5ctCLm65NSLshlx0eysj_q0rGZRoC7Y6ZQEAWToHzwsFZ_zgK8E8_XEkCSMCF1ZBVs4i2UCbq3qx0CW4M4OcxjLZo8PEUhnf5SmrDgR4T6Mfv2bfkvjWcjFR9D4x2nApffCLt3TvTeFwyBHb1cg-jZ4E).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:
Biden’s presidency is on life support

| | [ ](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyM0D-P4yAQBfBPgztb_DPEBcVJkbtccYp0JSIwdtgFYw1Y-forb7T99qN5v_f-3-zNxRS39a_LYBo2i9W-XHbWlwzYY_GfllMue8p7Ri3rgpGaB6E6MExTPeppkqp7mkVIpx_eBx8mLkblRsflYwl6YUyGoLpozj-UM8qkHKUcHMASwkWpi59UEJRI6hJgq0N7AsJ-PFL0bmvg8uBL7pJ5trZXIv4QPhM-V_AHwvCKG0I4Lwif3-qlYO_LtiLUSvj84W0om93L7iyg9dhnOHu-PXQiYj5ats0Tcb3_u_P-B0q4wjME47YScW14QIcm7K-YUqxKE0nX7GL65rXfzPcVAAD__03GdoM)
---
Friend, **Joe Biden is between a rock and a hard place.** With my investigation heating up and his record low approval ratings sinking even further, _his presidency is on life support_. This month, both Joe Biden’s brother James and his son Hunter will be giving sworn testimony to my committee. We have finally reached the inner circle of the Biden Crime Family, and they have a lot of questions to answer. Before they do, let’s review what my investigation has exposed so far:
* We’ve shown that there was no “wall” between the Biden Vice Presidency and the Biden Family business schemes.

* **We’ve discovered there were 40 FBI informants around the Biden Family over the past 15 years.**

* We’ve exposed the blatant lie that was the “ethics agreement” separating the White House from Hunter’s shady art dealings.

* We’ve collected **170 suspicious activity reports** from bank accounts connected to the Biden Family.

* We’ve found over **20 Biden Family shell companies** that funneled money from all over the world into the pockets of the Biden’s and their associates.

I could go on and on, but I think you get the point... **Hunter and James Biden have a lot to answer for, and the stakes have never been higher.** These depositions pose a massive threat to the Biden Crime Family, and it is absolutely essential we’re ready to weather the barrage of attacks that they will launch in response.
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyM0D-P4yAQBfBPgztb_DPEBcVJkbtccYp0JSIwdtgFYw1Y-forb7T99qN5v_f-3-zNxRS39a_LYBo2i9W-XHbWlwzYY_GfllMue8p7Ri3rgpGaB6E6MExTPeppkqp7mkVIpx_eBx8mLkblRsflYwl6YUyGoLpozj-UM8qkHKUcHMASwkWpi59UEJRI6hJgq0N7AsJ-PFL0bmvg8uBL7pJ5trZXIv4QPhM-V_AHwvCKG0I4Lwif3-qlYO_LtiLUSvj84W0om93L7iyg9dhnOHu-PXQiYj5ats0Tcb3_u_P-B0q4wjME47YScW14QIcm7K-YUqxKE0nX7GL65rXfzPcVAAD__03GdoM)

name: Elissa Slotkin for Senate
subject: A great rebuke to Betsy DeVos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1119%2E135344%2EFlPc7F)

If everyone reading this donated $3 to Elissa Slotkin’s Senate campaign, we would not only have a huge number of donations, but we would reach the incremental goals we need to hit in order to win this race and keep Michigan’s Senate seat BLUE.
Unfortunately, not everyone gives. And the fact that Elissa rejects corporate PAC money makes things harder than they could be. [**So she's relying on people who understand how important this race is -- and Michigan is -- to chip-in before the end of February.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240210-1-680k&t=2&akid=1119%2E135344%2EFlPc7F)**
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240210-1-680k&t=3&akid=1119%2E135344%2EFlPc7F)
Friends --
The DeVos family has supported opponents of Elissa in the past, and it looks like they’re ready to double down on this Senate race.
Republican Mike Rogers' latest FEC report was filled with donations from a bunch of members of the DeVos family -- contributions totaling $46,200 all made on one single day.
By contrast, the majority of the donations we receive come from people contributing significantly smaller donations than the DeVos family made to Mike Rogers.
And what you may not know is that one of the single greatest sources of individual donations to our campaign is the response to emails like this.
That’s why Elissa would love to earn your support today. [**Your help using this link to make a contribution to Elissa’s campaign for United States Senate would be a great rebuke to the DeVos support.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240210-1-680k&t=4&akid=1119%2E135344%2EFlPc7F)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-feb24.c-Lk1f&refcode=em240210-1-680k&t=5&akid=1119%2E135344%2EFlPc7F)**
---
****
| **[Donate $10](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/700?c0=ebs-em-feb24.WBsANY&refcode=em240210-1-680k&t=6&akid=1119%2E135344%2EFlPc7F)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-feb24.kYsf1_&refcode=em240210-1-680k&t=7&akid=1119%2E135344%2EFlPc7F)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-feb24.pAXxly&refcode=em240210-1-680k&t=8&akid=1119%2E135344%2EFlPc7F)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-feb24.XXfcj1&refcode=em240210-1-680k&t=9&akid=1119%2E135344%2EFlPc7F)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-feb24.PidIwI&refcode=em240210-1-680k&t=10&akid=1119%2E135344%2EFlPc7F)**

****
Thank you,
Elissa Slotkin for Senate

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=11&akid=1119%2E135344%2EFlPc7F).

---
| [**BREAKING: Former Republican Maryland Gov. Larry Hogan announces Senate bid**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78750050/454366290/1032953989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg0YzVhMy0yNGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TqQUw4aWZP8-nW8LZtotowsnSIHDiuvQkoop96dzb6s=&emci=a983f932-d6c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c984c5a3-24c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160)

[**Mitch McConnell now has a strong candidate who can flip this deep-blue Senate seat in November.

If Larry Hogan wins, Democrats could lose our Senate majority. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78750061/454366294/1032953989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg0YzVhMy0yNGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TqQUw4aWZP8-nW8LZtotowsnSIHDiuvQkoop96dzb6s=&emci=a983f932-d6c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c984c5a3-24c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160) **[10,000 Maryland Democrats Needed:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78750080/454366314/1032953989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg0YzVhMy0yNGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TqQUw4aWZP8-nW8LZtotowsnSIHDiuvQkoop96dzb6s=&emci=a983f932-d6c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c984c5a3-24c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160)****[_Pledge to Vote for David Trone for Senate →_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78750083/454366325/1032953989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg0YzVhMy0yNGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TqQUw4aWZP8-nW8LZtotowsnSIHDiuvQkoop96dzb6s=&emci=a983f932-d6c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c984c5a3-24c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160)** | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78750087/454366330/1032953989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg0YzVhMy0yNGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TqQUw4aWZP8-nW8LZtotowsnSIHDiuvQkoop96dzb6s=&emci=a983f932-d6c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c984c5a3-24c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160)
---

Peter – this race is heating up.

We’ve been building a grassroots team that we couldn’t be more proud of to defend Maryland’s Blue Senate seat and keep the Senate Majority out of Mitch McConnell’s hands.

But now the stakes are sky high.

With Republican former Gov. Larry Hogan in the race, we need to know if you’re all-in to defend this battleground seat, abortion rights, and our Democratic Senate majority along with it.

**[If we can count on your support, will you sign your name next to thousands of other Democrats across the state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78750091/454366335/1032953989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg0YzVhMy0yNGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TqQUw4aWZP8-nW8LZtotowsnSIHDiuvQkoop96dzb6s=&emci=a983f932-d6c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c984c5a3-24c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160)**
[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78750094/454366339/1032953989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg0YzVhMy0yNGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TqQUw4aWZP8-nW8LZtotowsnSIHDiuvQkoop96dzb6s=&emci=a983f932-d6c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c984c5a3-24c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160)
---

Larry Hogan would be the key vote Mitch McConnell needs to ban abortion nationally.

We simply can’t afford to lose this seat.

**[So we need to know: Can we count you among the supporters who have pledged to vote for our campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78750097/454366342/1032953989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg0YzVhMy0yNGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TqQUw4aWZP8-nW8LZtotowsnSIHDiuvQkoop96dzb6s=&emci=a983f932-d6c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c984c5a3-24c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160)**
[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78750101/454366345/1032953989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg0YzVhMy0yNGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TqQUw4aWZP8-nW8LZtotowsnSIHDiuvQkoop96dzb6s=&emci=a983f932-d6c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c984c5a3-24c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160)
---

Knowing we have your support makes all the difference in this fight.

Thank you,

David Trone for U.S. Senate
Mitch McConnell's super PAC is preparing to spend hundreds of millions to flip the Senate in 2024, and we need to be ready to fight back with everything we've got.

**David Trone knows that the path to holding our Democratic Senate majority runs right through Maryland – that's why he needs our support.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78750105/454366349/1619840349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg0YzVhMy0yNGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TqQUw4aWZP8-nW8LZtotowsnSIHDiuvQkoop96dzb6s=&emci=a983f932-d6c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c984c5a3-24c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160) | [Sign up to volunteer >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78750113/454366352/-1171722684?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg0YzVhMy0yNGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TqQUw4aWZP8-nW8LZtotowsnSIHDiuvQkoop96dzb6s=&emci=a983f932-d6c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c984c5a3-24c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=25681160)

name: Team Freedom VA
subject: Happy Lunar New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
| | |
---
| | The Freedom Virginia team extends warm wishes to all celebrating the Lunar New Year! This vibrant festival is cherished in various Asian cultures, with unique celebrations in each community. While traditions may differ, the essence of Lunar New Year is universally centered around the joy of familial bonds. At Freedom Virginia, we hold the importance of family dear, recognizing that the opportunity to share moments with loved ones is invaluable. As we usher in the Lunar New Year, may you experience the warmth of family and create beautiful memories. Happy Lunar New Year!

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Public Service
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Time after time after time, Republicans in Washington show us that the only reason they are there is to do the bidding of Donald Trump.
#

Peter,
What happened last week pissed me off. I’ll come right out and say it.
The GOP in the House and Senate demanded a bill that secures our southern border in exchange for military and humanitarian aid to our allies and partners.
They got the bill. It wasn’t perfect, but it was a compromise. I supported it because Arizona needs some help at the border, and our allies need aid that only we can give.
Then the GOP killed that bill — the one they demanded, the one they negotiated. They did it because Trump told them to.
Time after time after time, Republicans in Washington show us that the only reason they’re there is to do the bidding of Donald Trump.
I’m trying to go to the Senate to solve problems. That’s what people send us there to do.
And I’m more convinced than ever that the only way we’re going to do that is by holding the line in the Senate and expanding our majority by as many seats as we can.
It’s why I’m running. And it’s why your support is so important.
[**So please, if you can, make a donation to my campaign. Arizona will determine control of the Senate and what we’re able to get done over the next four years. I need you with me to win.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240210-1-120&t=1&akid=1941%2E734936%2EJlvoXR)

clean_body: | | Peter, we have an urgent request for you: = Not convinced? Let us explain why we need your immediate support today. Since the very beginning, Brian's campaign has relied on thousands of supporters like you chipping in a few dollars at a time – our average contribution is less than $100. The collective power of your donations allows us to spread Brian's message to voters in person, through ads, by mail, and in so many other ways. Your continued support is crucial if we’re going to win on March 5. TX-32 has one of the earliest primaries in the country – it’s 24 days away! – and Brian’s running in a very crowded field. As we’re finalizing our campaign budget ahead of our primary, $32 can make a huge difference on if we can continue to fund our field team during the final stretch. body:
Joe is running to deliver on the promise of a freer, fairer, and more prosperous America. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/94ejtxKhx0qNdkch_i3mjw2?unsubscribedata=9L1MLL9rXxtd4tW9aesgkIsNmfC7aDuVdmRFQ00xLMtiIYlyjHP7Kc68ZkeEmQaZTqxxCAYbfxKbPuQpsgtxReaVcKdBECek0mDQwp4l5oOKCj0Us0nnvjOz6g6Z3sTiuSMknLshHeTW37oTC%2F6a4vIj5TVgaXiZROWAt8SJ9frSMS4KnPXvPunTCWxvLmgj4Y1Wlm%2FIy64%2FBVe40iCFg9dRyOEN1Z7Dij9%2Fn46I%2FpIK9UosLbWyJjVEwAF6ELSwnSojDMrBuBWRP0%2Fy%2BU1vyPVUCbJ5UC9zv9LZJuTdWyZsY6xA5e0GD3xQKl905MJDWQpjfSoZ3UevdTzdx2w0CDMMcoKHeLnB3xPdlPvxBgtmCiMlZAgSXv0Mq7mUuFohAlS5S1%2FyQzdYeO1wJp%2FUrD9TzPXAA6hHFMeGerER9j3iNv45PvHeCvPjWe3A4sTq]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jsfc-em-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jsfc-em-footer]
Hi Peter, it’s Joe Salerno. I’m running to unseat Representative Jeff Van Drew in Congress.

My team and I have some strategy sessions coming up this week, and it’s time for us to make important decisions about where we’ll be focusing our efforts throughout the rest of this campaign. That’s where you come in.

Will you take 30 seconds to fill out this quick priorities survey to let me know what you want to see from my campaign in the next few months? I’d really appreciate your input→ [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZbRcxtKpgU6FQU2SHNPf_Q2]

TAKE SHORT SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZbRcxtKpgU6FQU2SHNPf_Q2]

As a lifelong Jersey resident, I’m always inspired by the resilience of the people in this state. The extremism plaguing Congress is doing nothing for the people of South Jersey, and it’s time our district has someone ready to fight for and represent ALL of this district — not just those voting blue or red.

Rather than putting South Jersey first, Jeff Van Drew has had other priorities:

*
❌
Switched
parties
for
the
sole
purpose
of
keeping
his
job
*
❌
Voted
to
overturn
the
2020
election
*
❌
Voted
AGAINST
critical
investments
in
infrastructure
and
job
creation
(including
$20
MILLION
for
infrastructure
projects
IN
HIS
OWN
DISTRICT)
*
❌
Voted
AGAINST
the
PACT
Act
for
veterans
*
❌
Voted
AGAINST
protecting
women’s
reproductive
rights

Your priorities are my priorities, Peter. That’s why I’m running, and that’s why I want to hear from you. So, if you have 30 seconds, please fill out the following short survey and let me know what issues are most important to you and your family: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZbRcxtKpgU6FQU2SHNPf_Q2]

BEGIN SHORT SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZbRcxtKpgU6FQU2SHNPf_Q2]

I really appreciate you taking the time to help me out, Peter.

— Joe
https://www.facebook.com/JoeSalernoforCongress/?show_switched_toast=0&show_invite_to_follow=0&show_switched_tooltip=0&show_podcast_settings=0&show_community_review_changes=0&show_community_rollback=0&show_follower_visibility_disclosure=0</ [https://www.facebook.com/JoeSalernoforCongress/?show_switched_toast=0&show_invite_to_follow=0&show_switched_tooltip=0&show_podcast_settings=0&show_community_review_changes=0&show_community_rollback=0&show_follower_visibility_disclosure=0</] https://twitter.com/joesalernoNJ [https://twitter.com/joesalernoNJ] https://www.instagram.com/joesalernoforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/joesalernoforcongress/]
We all want leaders to deliver for our families. But today, too many of our leaders spend their time fighting just for the sake of fighting.
As your Congressman, I will use the skills I learned during a lifetime in business to deliver for the people of South Jersey.

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: History doesn’t just happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We are the ones who create and shape it
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78751725/454371857/-3547583?refcode=EM_20240210_FR_12T_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5ZjdiMzc0LTI2YzgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bnMgGn-yXsnSPJuT9fsjHQzuVaxfQmic0jg16-Ddbdg=&emci=ae8053b1-74c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=59f7b374-26c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=8431045)
---

February is a month of milestones for me. It marks the anniversary of my confirmation to become the first Black Attorney General of the United States. It’s also Black History Month — a time to celebrate the Black changemakers who built and shaped this country. One of the key lessons I took away from my six years in President Obama’s administration is: **History doesn’t just happen. We are the ones who create and shape it. ** So as we celebrate the changemakers who came before us, we must also remember that our work to secure the freedoms many literally gave their lives for is far from over. We must recognize the unique challenges that we face when it comes to creating fair maps for marginalized communities. Over and over again too many of our fellow citizens have been denied an equal say in our government. And we must work to ensure that no matter how the forces of ignorance and bigotry might try to erase, ignore or minimize our shared history, that we continue to shape our stories with purpose and pride. Some people these days would love nothing more than for you to be cynical about politics, about government, about the possibilities for our future. They want you to think that all of this is out of your control — that history is essentially pre-determined and that our hands working together can’t help, to paraphrase Dr. King, bend the moral arc of the universe toward justice. I implore you: _Don’t believe them. _ **We’re in the middle of an existential fight for our democracy, to secure those fundamental values of freedom and fairness for all._None of us can do it alone, but WE can do it together._** The NDRC will never stop working towards a better, fairer democracy with better, fairer maps — for all. We’re in it for the long haul, the extended effort, and we need you with us. Thank you, Eric H.
