| | How do some folks stay active well into their 70's, 80's, and even 90's... enjoying all kinds of activities like hiking, gardening, and golfing... ...while others find themselves hobbling down stairs... or needing to rock back and forth just to get out of a chair? Well, according to a new breakthrough discovery by Harvard University, scientists now know it comes down to a single mistake... A mistake, that... when avoided, not only reverses joint discomfort and everyday aches... but can actually make joints healthier than they've been in years. And here's the best part: avoiding this mistake is easy. There's just one problem... Doing this defies common sense. In fact, it's so counterintuitive, a recent survey found that up to 77% of folks with sore joints are making this mistake every day because they think it's helping. When, in fact, it does just the opposite. That's why when they stop making this mistake, their recovery can be quite dramatic. To date, more than 180,547 people have tried this with life-changing results... Ordinary folks who were once couch-bound are now walking a few miles per day again... Others have resumed exercise classes they were once forced to give up. And some have even started long-distance jogging after decades of sitting on the sidelines... A Boston medical doctor recently recorded a short presentation which shows you this [#1 mistake and why you should avoid it at all costs](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJyEkr9y3CAQh58GdbpBi_5AoSKxfMWN3bhwy3CwkrgDSQF0zvnpM1IumUkaD9237LK_b1B-cba_t6T5TgBGayIBIOwbARjeb5f1DT5fUx7Y7SN_vvgXulXhiQCk-4J_rz6mHNAr6zbadJlpzxXXtciwLRraVAIqVmdjK0qlS2E0VRXVPTeosRaq54JzA5yXmW2BQkmhoEW1nUPRa0oF44w3uuFnRUrq78pjsFpNi0rBzukwhyFz7ZjSEvedjgSOKSh9PaiQxjB_4oQHPXsCR1MIFMDLnAlh8rJnTc6hb_Kq6BGZoUYpQ9hxcUqjxykR1g3jHNMNp7QGjDLObpYprH7RkkJRQEmgVsYawrrC25jUFWV0gkCddmhsQJ3O8qsx8r_uNXnp0djVE9Y95O4wzmvQSFg3aScf9h8lrfyi7DAR1m0WKc9HVC6NcgnzEJSP_zwiA3p1xT-985R-B560yxPGVAAjUMvJ7Tni0-X-ejq9Dacd7t-Fdef3n8-6_mFestCa5cM6Z2PdkJIO28ab9F8BAAD__3yGx-M). His video quickly went viral, racking up more than seven million views. And thousands of folks around the country are singing the praises of this method across social media. Karen Potter from Tremont, Pennsylvania said, _"I can hardly believe it. I have been able to start back walking daily and I have not been able to do that in months and months."_ Kay Gilbert from Athens, Alabama wrote, _"I'm 73 and feel like running all over the place again. My kids say I outwalk them in Walmart."_ And Robert Henninge from Castle Rock, Colorado exclaimed, _"Back to walking the dog and hiking... 81 years old."_ Now, what about you? Could your joints use some relief? How would you like to take back control of your life? [If so, click here to learn more about this mistake and put an end to those everyday aches stopping you from living your best life.](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJyEkr-O3CAQh58Gd17B4L-FiyS-rS5FLtK1CMPY5haMA3j39p4-srOJlDQR3TfMML9PSLdaM947Un8mALPRkQAQ_okATK_Xt-0FPr6mPPDrLX96c890r8IXApDuK_65-phyQieN3WndZ7obykZVbYYdq2ldtlDyKps7DcVIGcJIK1pBybTEgrdDgQPFgtaQmQ4oFBQYZeV-TmxUlLa84U2t6maQpKDuLh0Go-SyyhSMTycfpsx2c0prPHY6EzinINXlJEOag__ABU_KOwJnzVpsoSly3rY6L0Ze5w2MdV6yEZFrqqXUhJ9XKxU6XBLh_TT7mK64pC1gFNFbL1LY3KoEBcagIFBJbTThPXMmJnlBEW1LoEoH1CagSoP43xjxT_eWnHCozeYI7x9yDxj9FhQS3i_Kiof9R0lJt0ozLYT3u0Xa5DNKm2axBj8F6eJfj4iATl7wd69f0q_Ai7J5wpgYcAKVWOyRI2rdf79VL9_eD3h8F94Pr-9Pqvqhn7PQ6fVmrDWxqklBp33jXfrPAAAA__8NI8c9)

body:
Derek, did you
see Tony’s message about Donald Trump being tied with President Biden here
in Wisconsin?

Despite his unpatriotic attacks on American democracy and important

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: stick to the plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=1048%2E52803%2E5beLr3)

| | Peter, Larry Hogan jumping into the race this late in the game throws a huge wrench into our plans to defend our razor-thin Senate majority. This has the potential to turn the 2024 election cycle entirely upside down, because the stakes couldn’t possibly be any higher. Everything we care about — _abortion access, affordable health care, climate justice, everything_ — hinges on our ability to maintain our narrow Senate majority. **That’s why we need to stick to the plan, Peter: Reach Maryland voters where they’re at and talk to them about a better future for our state.[Will you please consider donating to my campaign to help us do that?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10506?t=10&amount=25&akid=1048%2E52803%2E5beLr3)** | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10506?t=11&amount=25&akid=1048%2E52803%2E5beLr3)
---
Hogan’s involvement complicates things, but we had a plan in place before he announced, and it’s still the plan now:
**We need to counter our opponents’ spending advantages by getting our Maryland-first message in front of voters by reaching them at their doors, on the phones, and in their communities.**
_If we stick to that plan, Peter, and leave it all on the field to reach as many voters as possible, I’m confident that we can handle this and any other hurdle we come across._
**But that means ramping up our field operations sooner than expected, which is why I need your help TODAY:[Can I count on your support, Peter? If you could chip in $25 right now, it would go a long way in our efforts to winning this race and holding the Senate.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10506?t=12&amount=25&akid=1048%2E52803%2E5beLr3)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

name: Begala, Paul
subject: simple math:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Florida is our only viable path forward
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78754095/454379316/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk788-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTFlYzJkZjItMjljOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SRrHk_XJOScOwhtWemxRAfDORQD41AlciqN26vOKzWU=)
Hi there, it's Paul Begala. You might've seen me talking politics on TV. I've spent my life helping Democrats win tough elections alongside folks like my buddy James Carville. So you can trust me on this: **If you care _at all_ about defending our Senate majority this November, you need to invest in Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's campaign right now to help flip Florida blue.**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78754096/454379317/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk788-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTFlYzJkZjItMjljOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SRrHk_XJOScOwhtWemxRAfDORQD41AlciqN26vOKzWU=)
---
It's simple math: Democrats have a narrow 51-49 Senate majority — and now that Joe Manchin is retiring, we're all but guaranteed to lose our seat in West Virginia. **That means that even if we defend _every other Democratic seat_ (and I'm talking about incredibly tough states like Montana and Ohio), we could STILL lose our majority. Our only viable path forward is flipping a red seat blue. **
I know we can do that here in Florida. Rick Scott is ranked as one of the top 10 most vulnerable senators in the nation, and polling shows that this race is already neck and neck. **[So please, if you care about defending our Senate majority, will you rush $5 or more before 11:59 p.m. to help my friend Debbie flip this seat blue and save our Senate majority? This is already shaping up to be a tough — _but winnable_ — race, so Debbie needs people like you on her team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78754097/454379318/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk788-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTFlYzJkZjItMjljOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SRrHk_XJOScOwhtWemxRAfDORQD41AlciqN26vOKzWU=)**

It's hard to overstate just how vulnerable Rick Scott is. He's made a name for himself in Washington by pushing policies that are way out of touch with voters — everything from banning abortions to ending Social Security and Medicare. He only won this seat by a mere 10,033 votes — just 0.12%. _(And that's after he outspent his Democratic rival by $50 MILLION!)_ In fact, he's never won a race by more than 1.2%.
On the other hand, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a proven leader with a strong record for working families. She's got a winning message, has flipped a red district before, and the polling data shows Florida voters are ready to rally behind her.
But unfortunately, it's not that simple: Rick Scott is a self-funded, Trump-endorsed mega-millionaire. He spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat in 2018.

This time around, he's already shelled out a massive $3 million in attack ads against Democrats like Debbie. In all of my years working with campaigns, I've rarely seen that level of spending this early on in a campaign. It means he's scared of Debbie. But it also means he's dead set on stopping her campaign.
**This race will come down to one thing:_cold hard cash_. Experts everywhere know that Debbie can win, but only if grassroots people like you invest in her campaign so that she can go up against Rick Scott. [Please, will you donate $5 right now to make sure that Debbie isn't outspent in this critical race? The entire future of our Senate majority is on the line here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78754102/454379323/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk788-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTFlYzJkZjItMjljOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SRrHk_XJOScOwhtWemxRAfDORQD41AlciqN26vOKzWU=)**

Friend, Democrats are out of control when it comes to the border. They negotiated a “compromise” that would allow thousands of more illegals to pour into the USA every single day. They give migrants benefits that you paid for with your tax dollars. They do nothing as illegal aliens take over the streets of America’s largest city, with some of them attacking New York City police officers (and even flipping off the cameras as they were let back onto the streets without having to pay bail). And 150 Democrats even voted against a bill to deport illegal aliens convicted of drunk driving! [**_MAKE AMERICA WORK FOR AMERICANS, NOT ILLEGALS_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/e3PbSeRgEqCR/TUJYOVFPRmt6a1pEZnlzTFZKQTdQWC9wdDBuV0ZpUjl3aFNRRXRCUExTdmpIYjByTlFlTit0bDM2UXJ2SWJmK2o5eU1OcnUyTEZrVGpyNXFHYUl0TU1kNDZOOUVreFd5eXkxVEtYd2xzZE5zSHZQVjBlTXQ4Zz09S0/)
[** _SUPPORT BRAD FINSTAD FOR CONGRESS_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/j_69tPaEK3Bb/TUJYOVFPRmt6a1pEZnlzTFZKQTdQWC9wdDBuV0ZpUjl3aFNRRXRCUExTdmpIYjByTlFlTit0bDM2UXJ2SWJmK2o5eU1OcnUyTEZrVGpyNXFHYUl0TU1kNDZOOUVreFd5eXkxVEtYd2xzZE5zSHZQVjBlTXQ4Zz09S0/) Their Open Borders agenda is killing our country, and we’ve got to do everything we can to shut them down.
* That’s why I voted in support of the House Republican's border and immigration bill, which passed last May;
* That’s why I voted “YES” to impeach Secretary of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas; and,
* That's why I signed on to a censure motion against Ilhan Omar.

If you agree Republicans must hammer Democrats for their Open Borders Disaster, [_**_please help!_**_](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/rZeNBzRN6xhW/TUJYOVFPRmt6a1pEZnlzTFZKQTdQWC9wdDBuV0ZpUjl3aFNRRXRCUExTdmpIYjByTlFlTit0bDM2UXJ2SWJmK2o5eU1OcnUyTEZrVGpyNXFHYUl0TU1kNDZOOUVreFd5eXkxVEtYd2xzZE5zSHZQVjBlTXQ4Zz09S0/) Brad Finstad

# Midway Reflection
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDYsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYXNlbmF0ZWRlbW9jcmF0cy5vcmcvczQ2LyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMTAuOTAwMjMyOTEifQ.is3arSYS0FC6ZbsmGW6hn60e30PGH7dPYoqev_phO58/s/2950175210/br/236895868926-l)
---
| | | | | The first legislative deadlines of this Session have come and gone. My colleagues and I advocated for a higher quality of Hoosier life, protection of fundamental natural resources, and protection of our children. While we didn't win every battle, we fought tooth-and-nail to represent your voice. Read more below about what exactly went down at the Statehouse over the last week.
---
| |
* * *
---
## Final bill deadline sends legislation to the House
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDcsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2JpbGxzL3NlbmF0ZS8yODQvZGV0YWlscyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMTAuOTAwMjMyOTEifQ.7RWnEuES1nYe5nERKvKngoG1aI8ugLjkXjeQpWuQfy4/s/2950175210/br/236895868926-l)
Tuesday marks the final deadline for bills to pass from the Senate to the House, and vice-versa. Several pieces of legislation that I either authored or co-authored passed to the House.
[SB 10](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDgsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2JpbGxzL3NlbmF0ZS8xMC9kZXRhaWxzIiwiYnVsbGV0aW5faWQiOiIyMDI0MDIxMC45MDAyMzI5MSJ9.ezUc26lGlZ1k2DS5Fuz13q9RMz-adj5MVhri-QMF7SQ/s/2950175210/br/236895868926-l) expands assistance to mobile health care teams across the state of Indiana.
[SB 34](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDksInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2JpbGxzL3NlbmF0ZS8zNC9kZXRhaWxzIiwiYnVsbGV0aW5faWQiOiIyMDI0MDIxMC45MDAyMzI5MSJ9.J8iyrXbHdTMRVBDjy6Uzve0lQDYDCEbpaQegX0_Asvg/s/2950175210/br/236895868926-l) requires the professional licensing agency to conduct a occupational licensing laws in surrounding states.
[SB 287](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTAsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2JpbGxzL3NlbmF0ZS8yODcvZGV0YWlscyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMTAuOTAwMjMyOTEifQ.XzyAN_f2n5vNE1Tvo3gT_1_PBQIE-u5sWL5NMqEZtxg/s/2950175210/br/236895868926-l) includes cursive in elementary student education.
* * *
---
## First Half of Legislative Days Wrap-up
* * *
---
During session companies and advocacy will stop by the statehouse for their Legislative Days. These events exist to inform legislators like myself on the needs of Hoosier professionals and organizations. I have met so many wonderful humans at these events. Whether it be the folks from the Indiana Tenants Association, or the crew from Martin University, each group has something unique to say.
## STORIES SHAPING OUR STATE
[Bills pass to House](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTEsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdGhlY3IuY29tL25ld3MvMjAyNC9qYW4vMzEvYmlsbHMtY2xlYXItY29tbWl0dGVlLyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMTAuOTAwMjMyOTEifQ.fLRIOLakHGKVpDQAi5qYDzS61-hWGvguVmGXTxfny6I/s/2950175210/br/236895868926-l)
Read more about the bills that will impact our great state.
[Literacy bill passes despite bipartisan opposition](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTIsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tLzIwMjQvMDIvMDIvc2VuYXRlLXBhc3Nlcy1yZWFkaW5nLXNraWxscy1iaWxsLW92ZXItYmlwYXJ0aXNhbi1yZXRlbnRpb24tY29uY2VybnMvIiwiYnVsbGV0aW5faWQiOiIyMDI0MDIxMC45MDAyMzI5MSJ9.wcYz4nJAJnhG4ZHk3k1WrZ0nZE76YJb89WsDjk1Ap9A/s/2950175210/br/236895868926-l)
SB 1 received pushback from both Republicans and Democrats over concerns that retention would have a negative impact on struggling third-graders. The bill would act as a hammer, removing the finesse of retention from the control of local districts.
[Senate bills on sexual education and cursive move to the House](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTMsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tLzIwMjQvMDIvMDcvc2VuYXRlLWVkdWNhdGlvbi1iaWxscy1vbi1odW1hbi1zZXh1YWxpdHktY3Vyc2l2ZS1tb3ZlLXRvLWhvdXNlLyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMTAuOTAwMjMyOTEifQ.Y-HzvrLhfnyg1BRH4MsyN-e4Vacdkm8c-fWCuZ9IKI8/s/2950175210/br/236895868926-l)
SB 128 has a lot of noise surrounding it, and rightfully so. The bill would place the instruction of human sexuality in the hands of school boards. I voted no to this bill. If we have statewide curriculum standards for math and reading, why wouldn't legislators do the same for sexual education?

name: Juliana at United We Dream Action
subject: Our pressure is working.
body:
But this fight isn’t over. | | | Peter, our pressure is working. This week, the Senate rejected the hateful supplemental funding package that would have destroyed our asylum system and treated migrants as a political pawn. UWDA had been campaigning against this bill for months, and now we’ve proven once again that immigrant youth have what it takes to create real change. **We can’t stop now, though — Republicans are going to try to sneak some of the worst anti-immigration provisions from the bill into the next version of the bill.** Congress must vote NO on any bill that includes hateful, inhumane amendments. We cannot stand by under the false assumption that this fight is over — it’s far from it. **That’s why we need your support now more than ever, to keep up the pressure on Congress to deliver real solutions and actually invest in immigrant communities instead of sowing fear and division. subject: Is this WSJ Trump headline the most bonkers ever?
body:
Where have they been the last 8 years?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78757286/454388236/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjU2YmQwYWYtMmRjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2wML-oS_k19s7gmkH1tsHEdyMC4CsxvVlMNInpEs61g=&emci=216bd0af-2dc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=256bd0af-2dc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
As Donald Trump gets closer to locking up the Republican nomination, the right-wing media are falling in line.
Case in point? Just look at this bonkers Orwellian headline from the opinion page of the Murdoch-owned Wall Street Journal:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78757288/454388237/-593472309?refcode=20240208_COURIER_EM_WSJTrumpCoverage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjU2YmQwYWYtMmRjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2wML-oS_k19s7gmkH1tsHEdyMC4CsxvVlMNInpEs61g=)
_The Wall Street Journal, February 4, 2024_
That’s right! According to the _Wall Street Journa_ l opinion page, the guy who organized a failed coup attempt on January 6th is actually a champion for democracy!
Peter, this is how Donald Trump’s fascism is normalized by right-wing bad actors.
**[We’re fighting back against anti-democratic, right-wing propaganda by providing free, fact-based coverage of the 2024 election in 10 battleground states across the country. If you’re ready to join the fight, will you chip in $10 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78757289/454388238/-593472309?refcode=20240208_COURIER_EM_WSJTrumpCoverage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjU2YmQwYWYtMmRjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2wML-oS_k19s7gmkH1tsHEdyMC4CsxvVlMNInpEs61g=)**
**The Wall Street Journal has a reputation as a “paper of record,” but the truth is Peter, the paper is owned by the Murdoch family, the masterminds behind Fox News. **
This isn’t the first time the _Wall Street Journal_ has used its massive reach to help normalize Trump. In 2021, the opinion section published a Trump-authored letter to the editor where Trump repeated the same lies and debunked fraud claims that led to January 6th.
Peter, we know their end game. By propping up Trump at all costs, they can keep pushing their right-wing agenda while keeping ratings and profits high.
**It’s the same playbook they used in 2016 to get Trump elected. And it’s the same playbook they used in 2020 to help spread Trump’s lies about Joe Biden and Democrats stealing the election.**
The good news is that COURIER’S newsrooms in ten battleground states are fighting back with high-quality journalism in the online spaces and communities where right-wing lies spread.
Our research-tested model is strong enough to counter right-wing election lies and conspiracies, but we need your help if we’re going to grow and reach more communities that are vulnerable to misinformation.
**[Good journalism takes resources, FIRSTNAME, and we rely on donations from supporters like you to keep the lights on. If you stand with us in the fight against misinformation and propaganda, can you please give $10, or any amount you can afford?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78757290/454388239/-593472309?refcode=20240208_COURIER_EM_WSJTrumpCoverage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjU2YmQwYWYtMmRjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2wML-oS_k19s7gmkH1tsHEdyMC4CsxvVlMNInpEs61g=)**

The good news is that COURIER’S newsrooms in ten battleground states are fighting back with high-quality journalism in the online spaces and communities where right-wing lies spread. Our research-tested model is strong enough to counter right-wing election lies and conspiracies, but we need your help if we’re going to grow and reach more communities that are vulnerable to misinformation. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- In solidarity, The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

body:
Democrats in Washington and their Socialist Super PACS have too many connections and too much money in their fundraising war chest.

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=34dd052ec7824713aee55eb89eae1c43&_e=EMos0wg5kojSvS_qO5JVMixW5Q8OjZnbMDRo-U2C3ldY-YgbAGKCeic62__IM3sAegOJVfl4-ewwbMjw9u5DG-2azOpnRcPAGnp6K4Gd_MnJahdKtJC6BNz3Cr6rdyBz6iuKVrfrK6EX0gNI7nUAMDlhC8aezy2-WvuEneUuQAWeUu6p50TK66Gcmxfu0Gz5A4yEtny7C9Msh73s6c5ieC8J3NLrCIOH2dQO2yh2i-T3NZz6r0mX-y-m4JwCHrbB8hla2Fje78AmNr46Z3TNETkX0ORzezqi5MMjIgsSM-vEHltHgBxJGMB6dYv32k8cuWkx74kITT6InD8LxEJtXXFZysMV7gdYX5ZKd5fkY63NnbEdbzwmgd1EddfjRYEF8ix7yz0QED0-aTpsvxbyD3hUgFALaBlTR2NhxK3RBXA%3D)

Guys.

Democrats in Washington and their Socialist Super PACS have too many connections and too much money in their fundraising war chest. **AKA, WAY TOO MUCH POWER!!** The people don’t tell you how hard it is to start a campaign from Ground Zero. No war chest. No connections. Just you. Chip in to help me keep going.

**[At this point, if I don’t do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my fundraising efforts, but Republicans may never win a race again. Help SAVE AMERICA now!](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=34dd052ec7824713aee55eb89eae1c43&_e=EMos0wg5kojSvS_qO5JVMixW5Q8OjZnbMDRo-U2C3ldY-YgbAGKCeic62__IM3sAegOJVfl4-ewwbMjw9u5DG-2azOpnRcPAGnp6K4Gd_MnJahdKtJC6BNz3Cr6rdyBz6iuKVrfrK6EX0gNI7nUAMDlhC8aezy2-WvuEneUuQAWeUu6p50TK66Gcmxfu0Gz5A4yEtny7C9Msh73s6c5ieC8J3NLrCIOH2dQO2yh2i-T3NZz6r0mX-y-m4JwCHrbB8hla2Fje78AmNr46Z3TNEWwDMcMGL7kvG0m0s8KL9zInqNLyNtbgCXmQnnMns79JZazaRamqJpNEPaZsfmYFcWthSte8UuXcXwgPgwgoHwqp7GLd-whAoPpQcpKu78DXA0ozyLMR7ZijWNr_6XNFSL20gjUIeY7YLy4cmin7Rwc%3D)**
If the Democrats can beat us in November, I can guarantee you Republicans won’t have a chance to beat them for a long time.

**Why? Because as a hillbilly and a Marine, I know a fight.**

I’m one of the toughest Republicans in the Senate. Democrats know that—that’s why they’re dumping money into the upcoming elections to beat conservatives everywhere. If we can’t stop them - no one can.

**[If you chip in just $25 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and derail the Biden-Schumer plan to destroy our nation.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=34dd052ec7824713aee55eb89eae1c43&_e=EMos0wg5kojSvS_qO5JVMixW5Q8OjZnbMDRo-U2C3ldY-YgbAGKCeic62__IM3sAegOJVfl4-ewwbMjw9u5DG-2azOpnRcPAGnp6K4Gd_MnJahdKtJC6BNz3Cr6rdyBz6iuKVrfrK6EX0gNI7nUAMDlhC8aezy2-WvuEneUuQAWeUu6p50TK66Gcmxfu0Gz5A4yEtny7C9Msh73s6c5ieC8J3NLrCIOH2dQO2yh2i-T3NZz6r0mX-y-m4JwCHrbB8hla2Fje78AmNr46Z3TNEUr47Lotq2H7E-UDTeLEA1CmHcJSPVqSECTmzfGs1mYC01RDBcxj01ciNHhBi2ZCHMJyPDlZ46s4GzS_1P7xi-IUJuARGJMBqIWGb36rfeA1ClyvRiKlXFGG9waWJ3-jZ_ro0HbAKTC9Opar5PA9IMs%3D)**
I’m humbly asking you, as someone who has been fighting my entire life, will you help me out?

Thank you,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=34dd052ec7824713aee55eb89eae1c43&_e=EMos0wg5kojSvS_qO5JVMixW5Q8OjZnbMDRo-U2C3ldY-YgbAGKCeic62__IM3sAegOJVfl4-ewwbMjw9u5DG-2azOpnRcPAGnp6K4Gd_MnJahdKtJC6BNz3Cr6rdyBz6iuKVrfrK6EX0gNI7nUAMDlhC8aezy2-WvuEneUuQAWeUu6p50TK66Gcmxfu0Gz5A4yEtny7C9Msh73s6c5ieC8J3NLrCIOH2dQO2yh2i-QfQEcDBL45U-69YkXPA9wvWKEG2_XGUNcNAto6Xf7HOdTrLHjGSKW_EyWmD70OKWxGOHb5XPDqGnlVXvtDhWsQRtTRj7LBRD-k3ju9EeHNhDNnc23JlOtDr14vPSdTZgJ965SZh09gq969ODWEqiCNO5hcKPwpbSfR3xaopC9rSmRRn5dBWhO4MFYtGm1P0yU%3D) | [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=34dd052ec7824713aee55eb89eae1c43&_e=EMos0wg5kojSvS_qO5JVMixW5Q8OjZnbMDRo-U2C3ldY-YgbAGKCeic62__IM3sAegOJVfl4-ewwbMjw9u5DG-2azOpnRcPAGnp6K4Gd_MnJahdKtJC6BNz3Cr6rdyBz6iuKVrfrK6EX0gNI7nUAMDlhC8aezy2-WvuEneUuQAWeUu6p50TK66Gcmxfu0Gz5A4yEtny7C9Msh73s6c5ieC8J3NLrCIOH2dQO2yh2i-RADqe-A_aV5sYZX-X4XqiTL18bvylTArUS27W6zJmV_Aq2YepenB46oX_6426jVCCYQycFAFKEA-wveu8H_1l4ej2Y_xzIGRFjdtB8735l7QjDx2GRlKY2xLkeW-Beccr4Gksgdpd_X3bG1UJJaJlOeOd57Rodx5nNh8gHvwDA0PlfrOiDiDzPT-G0d_0XGqc%3D) | [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=34dd052ec7824713aee55eb89eae1c43&_e=EMos0wg5kojSvS_qO5JVMixW5Q8OjZnbMDRo-U2C3ldY-YgbAGKCeic62__IM3sAegOJVfl4-ewwbMjw9u5DG-2azOpnRcPAGnp6K4Gd_MnJahdKtJC6BNz3Cr6rdyBz6iuKVrfrK6EX0gNI7nUAMDlhC8aezy2-WvuEneUuQAWeUu6p50TK66Gcmxfu0Gz5A4yEtny7C9Msh73s6c5ieC8J3NLrCIOH2dQO2yh2i-T3NZz6r0mX-y-m4JwCHrbB8hla2Fje78AmNr46Z3TNEf4XLGcgFE6c798B37GxbysICUGhpHG6Zj-v4WEBl38g9bWqggI0bcLPIzEfNa-IFnFvOymruXBBvH_7MJ_f5gtwTzMgcWT2dlNoxq2LpYvGNI0xuUsxrmVaCuwjsvExC5Z4aRdrll51F9yBdzdpHmU%3D)

subject: Remember the 70’s?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U

---
| | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---
| [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5e7b08e54dbe4e12abe0bd05c2659fd3&_e=XslyF0wnO5wgxWnUFd3u8OWbZ1gUUFKlWXKgLj2WSqHlf6jqXPfW6mRqcmoTvqGByGruok2o4Xv3CbKyOwUtsaKFcyRyx3_G_kn-CczmwleKeEhCQiasKgOSNaKlxZEJndf222uMfBfulyJTjsrbiwXn_sFmFLdC4z6PPSWpcuwlUo9VFBDM0DBwaKiH4gk7FJ2--9Z-ie2AkIGCzOJFJxtHzGf7zeQtDNvvKxjc2uMH6W8Ysy0NO3xJuoPJ7IzGZTutKCM_DTI75S6pceEWBiw09JGkoJPxGf3xpbqmaDe0JzEn8_nn9b69vFE-Mh8ROqbMZcRD8gYxOdS_NasYkJrGSKZoTN1Vs7IABiC7wwhyg2KXKIESqn8Gv4_AiwzWjk94nv63IhUtigYKSh4Xkw%3D%3D)
---
| | **Today,[I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5e7b08e54dbe4e12abe0bd05c2659fd3&_e=XslyF0wnO5wgxWnUFd3u8OWbZ1gUUFKlWXKgLj2WSqHlf6jqXPfW6mRqcmoTvqGByGruok2o4Xv3CbKyOwUtsaKFcyRyx3_G_kn-CczmwleKeEhCQiasKgOSNaKlxZEJndf222uMfBfulyJTjsrbiwXn_sFmFLdC4z6PPSWpcuwlUo9VFBDM0DBwaKiH4gk7FJ2--9Z-ie2AkIGCzOJFJxtHzGf7zeQtDNvvKxjc2uMP1qlUykore3XLCSdOFX_JcJh2q-yyIkqVMoVpI1v9Zw3nzgFuqOz9C8vFNkhQ4dIgxujz1zACSHYsK34maee3EF2p38uoMTcxnBSdpyDNIFnioIjRDVmwx-mhhDtpD6UkiB6y9pewe-2FLHO7-NxrfWP0e6NGTQoW5WlJYG2Ong%3D%3D)** Today, I'm asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that folks will be talking about for generations to come. Because when you think about it, those 'good-ol' days of the 1970s weren't as good as we tend to first remember. Baseball was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy after another. I'm running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: \- Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. **_Remember?_** \- Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. **_Remember?_** \- Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. **_Remember??_** Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn't blame you if you said, "Steve, I'm afraid America's best days are behind us." But listen, here's something I also want you to remember... **_We Republicans_ ****pulled our country out of that 1970 's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** **We put classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did.** **And America became a shining city upon a hill once more.** _**We can do that again**_**.** **It starts by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California.** **But there 's no way I can pull it off without you.** **That 's why I'm asking you to rush in your $35 donation today** I'm sorry for the urgency but _the primary is in less than three months_ and here's where things stand... In March, I need to be one of the top 2 vote-getters to get to the November general election. Adam Schiff will probably take the #1 spot. And polls have me hot on his heels for the #2 spot. Once we're passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. Second... you know I'm not a career politician. But I do have the one thing a Republican needs to get elected in California... ...name recognition. I'm no Schwarzenegger and I'd certainly never dare compare myself to President Reagan. But California voters know me. And Adam Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race. As I'm writing you this email, there are just a few percentage points separating us. We've got a shot -\- a very real shot -- of landing smack behind Schiff in the primary so we can go on to beat him in the general election. But there are just three months left until the primary. And the giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of that time trying to bury me and our common sense message. **[**When you rush back your _Garvey for Senate_ campaign contribution of $35 or more...**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5e7b08e54dbe4e12abe0bd05c2659fd3&_e=XslyF0wnO5wgxWnUFd3u8OWbZ1gUUFKlWXKgLj2WSqHlf6jqXPfW6mRqcmoTvqGByGruok2o4Xv3CbKyOwUtsaKFcyRyx3_G_kn-CczmwleKeEhCQiasKgOSNaKlxZEJndf222uMfBfulyJTjsrbiwXn_sFmFLdC4z6PPSWpcuwlUo9VFBDM0DBwaKiH4gk7FJ2--9Z-ie2AkIGCzOJFJxtHzGf7zeQtDNvvKxjc2uMb-59GBGTc04EGTfCYc0yglxw2Ol6IXQHRKw_kswVZ-r6PZX2teeLauQBYX61OnokXx2WXBMQJoSyiT62j1GGhbIdytZGh63Nsm3SH0mou5oVaaGZ_9ubHWtS9ibNBDPQnBT1gI-uP0rj91BOGDslnWDOkmjIZNLo4Q5gxpgKP9w%3D%3D)** ...you're helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don 't have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free. _ This race is the toughest in the nation. But they say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball. And you know I've done that plenty of times. Now I'm ready to do the hardest thing in American politics -\- win in California as a common sense Republican. But I can't do it without you. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. It all depends on you! You can do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can **[**step up to the plate with me and take a swing for the thrill of victory**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5e7b08e54dbe4e12abe0bd05c2659fd3&_e=XslyF0wnO5wgxWnUFd3u8OWbZ1gUUFKlWXKgLj2WSqHlf6jqXPfW6mRqcmoTvqGByGruok2o4Xv3CbKyOwUtsaKFcyRyx3_G_kn-CczmwleKeEhCQiasKgOSNaKlxZEJndf222uMfBfulyJTjsrbiwXn_sFmFLdC4z6PPSWpcuwlUo9VFBDM0DBwaKiH4gk7FJ2--9Z-ie2AkIGCzOJFJxtHzGf7zeQtDNvvKxjc2uPLvOYsqXF67LT-Rcw_rPD1JnHmcC5OsbO0UCEeAuijNEqrVKlYKEp5UYO0A454us3M0aAz-TTESvNIKL2K4nwufU-j5ubQgf7YJJnsp3wAXZgBn4Ep4rS7dKn4jA_-dMYFXZgqP4WCP9YV42keDDLo8MWMD-1Zfu9qBy5Sk-i6nA%3D%3D)**. Please join me. Because when we win in California, we're winning for all of America. Thank you and God Bless,

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you. | | | Today, Today, I'm asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that folks will be talking about for generations to come. Because when you think about it, those 'good-ol' days of the 1970s weren't as good as we tend to first remember. Baseball was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy after another. I'm running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: \- Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? \- Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? \- Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn't blame you if you said, "Steve, I'm afraid America's best days are behind us." But listen, here's something I also want you to remember... We Republicans pulled our country out of that 1970 's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. We put classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did. And America became a shining city upon a hill once more. We can do that again. It starts by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California. But there 's no way I can pull it off without you. That 's why I'm asking you to rush in your $35 donation today I'm sorry for the urgency but the primary is in less than three months and here's where things stand... In March, I need to be one of the top 2 vote-getters to get to the November general election. Adam Schiff will probably take the #1 spot. And polls have me hot on his heels for the #2 spot. Once we're passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. Second... you know I'm not a career politician. But I do have the one thing a Republican needs to get elected in California... ...name recognition. I'm no Schwarzenegger and I'd certainly never dare compare myself to President Reagan. But California voters know me. And Adam Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race. As I'm writing you this email, there are just a few percentage points separating us. We've got a shot -\- a very real shot -- of landing smack behind Schiff in the primary so we can go on to beat him in the general election. But there are just three months left until the primary. And the giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of that time trying to bury me and our common sense message. ...you're helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: You don 't have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free. This race is the toughest in the nation. But they say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball. And you know I've done that plenty of times. Now I'm ready to do the hardest thing in American politics -\- win in California as a common sense Republican. But I can't do it without you. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. It all depends on you! You can do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can . Please join me. Because when we win in California, we're winning for all of America. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | P.S. It's the bottom of the 9th and Republicans desperately need a homerun. We simply can't let another election slip through our fingers while Democrats go on destroying our country. With your help, I know we can beat Adam Schiff in California and start the Republican Comeback Rally America needs. But the primary is in just three months. I hope we can build upon this bipartisan win for working families by coming together in good faith to tackle the other urgent issues facing our nation. We know the Republican National Committee is eyeing our seat as they plot their path to preserving their slim majority in November. We’ve got to hold this district: Rhode Island can’t afford to elect a right-wing extremist, and keeping this seat blue is vital to winning a Democratic majority in Congress. | = Thank you for your support, Seth | = PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940 If you’d like to unsubscribe, . You can also =**.

name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: "There sure are a lot of Republican billionaires funding the Democratic primaries"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
"I wonder why!"
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=941%2E791427%2E6H8i4T)

**This is important. Check out the latest from Slate:**
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb24.LBKb43&refcode=em240210-1-t3&t=2&akid=941%2E791427%2E6H8i4T)
Last week, AIPAC's United Democracy Project reported over $40 million in cash on-hand, just a taste of the _**$100+ million_** they're gearing up to spend this cycle.
But the ones bankrolling this effort certainly aren't working people chipping in a few bucks at a time, or even run-of-the-mill big-dollar Democratic donors.
No.
When we talk about these donors, we're talking personal friends of Donald Trump. A Nikki Haley and Rudy Guiliani megadonor. Samuel Alito's luxury vacation sponsor. Billionaire sports franchise owners, hedge fund managers, and corporate CEOs abound.
These right-wing billionaires are hoping to interfere in Democratic primaries all across the country, and are prepared to spend millions trying to defeat our progressive movement.
We've seen their playbook before, and we know it won't be long before dark money starts pouring into Minnesota's 5th district targeting Ilhan.
**If we're going to fight back and win, we need to do it the same way we always have — _together._ That's why we're urgently asking:**
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3, $10, or any amount you can — to stand with Ilhan and our re-election campaign today? It's so important that we have the grassroots resources required to stay in this fight.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb24.LBKb43&refcode=em240210-1-t3&t=3&akid=941%2E791427%2E6H8i4T)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-feb24.zqlx3i&refcode=em240210-1-t3&t=23&akid=941%2E791427%2E6H8i4T)**

| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-feb24.0on1dT&refcode=em240210-1-t3&t=27&akid=941%2E791427%2E6H8i4T)**

Whether or not you're able to chip in today, thank you so much for being a part of our movement.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

name: Rick Scott
subject: Only in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, Late nights in the Senate, weekends meeting with Florida voters, and everything in between, I do to defend the state and country that I love. There is so much work to do to rescue our country from the disaster caused by the Biden Administration. We have to save our country, there is no other option.

I didn’t come from a lot. I grew up in public housing. My family lived paycheck to paycheck.

But there was love, faith, and a hardworking spirit that helped me throughout my life. And of course, my amazing wife and high school sweetheart, Ann, who I married at 19.
---
[](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=e0d7cdd5cb60408e933fb23383db10ca&_e=NKYGwIcxmMLNtUxLLLtXiQJ1iox7HNYmX__ogB4bbxYZmFTMik3qLvpxCh1a7ML1K7IL8dJ35TZ26MaqiZ2wT9b6S7EOjF8svhNeHo9-9V_gU7xOBehEp3oYxMNbAD7_33rMqXmcxP7vAK8kqlidBfE-cMAHRt2rFND5Ol4ujPhjvRH6dWns-akDK8PK7dXhSxxWPFuNkIXucnsCx9zV-hZfTD2AuEO87peuSukL2UfOD5cIjQYNqz3T6grSlhaIfe5AHifZk8fe57Soqe8t4UzJriBx4AuopDzlAyUkNVR5G0EIjtQNZkYKZx6Z9cvy-qlepyi1dajlubgmoYD4_J7Co5aJDy6G6Gs4NPDcQsr_LoCKDKzs5IWnFw6UZwJM)
---
My service to America started right after high school when I joined the Navy as a radar man aboard the USS Glover.
---
[](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=e0d7cdd5cb60408e933fb23383db10ca&_e=NKYGwIcxmMLNtUxLLLtXiQJ1iox7HNYmX__ogB4bbxYZmFTMik3qLvpxCh1a7ML1K7IL8dJ35TZ26MaqiZ2wT9b6S7EOjF8svhNeHo9-9V_gU7xOBehEp3oYxMNbAD7_33rMqXmcxP7vAK8kqlidBfE-cMAHRt2rFND5Ol4ujPhjvRH6dWns-akDK8PK7dXhSxxWPFuNkIXucnsCx9zV-n-NszZgKuZsL9eccHUrgb_CCIzSpCSFtjdbuJGLA5-mWeziRlaRLmclyYnmOZZaKXdv3DlcIA_zXDK10pgKbYgMiXu2qjNlyiP74T2HpfETBq8gP5edhr7zm1suyziknGCWDWtOFuSaZJo3G7oP3lxb6FQmtL5fK5h2wcTWEtTy)
---
And when I bought my first business, a donut shop so my mom could have a job, I was so incredibly proud.

I look back on pictures of that business and I can’t help but be grateful to live in America. Only here can a kid from public housing go on to be successful in business and then be a United States Senator.

I’m so passionate about the American Dream because I’ve lived it, Peter. And, I want to make sure our future generations have the opportunity to live their version of the American Dream.
But right now, our freedoms face a massive obstacle; Democrats. Liberals want to take away our freedom and replace it with a system where government elites decide the winners in society. They want us to be dependable on the government, Peter.

But here’s the truth: With hard work, success is possible for EVERY citizen in the greatest country on Earth.

**[Now, we are all faced with a decision. clean_body: | | | Peter, Late nights in the Senate, weekends meeting with Florida voters, and everything in between, I do to defend the state and country that I love. There is so much work to do to rescue our country from the disaster caused by the Biden Administration. We have to save our country, there is no other option. I didn’t come from a lot. I grew up in public housing. My family lived paycheck to paycheck. But there was love, faith, and a hardworking spirit that helped me throughout my life. And of course, my amazing wife and high school sweetheart, Ann, who I married at 19. My service to America started right after high school when I joined the Navy as a radar man aboard the USS Glover. And when I bought my first business, a donut shop so my mom could have a job, I was so incredibly proud. I look back on pictures of that business and I can’t help but be grateful to live in America. Only here can a kid from public housing go on to be successful in business and then be a United States Senator. I’m so passionate about the American Dream because I’ve lived it, Peter. And, I want to make sure our future generations have the opportunity to live their version of the American Dream. But right now, our freedoms face a massive obstacle; Democrats. Liberals want to take away our freedom and replace it with a system where government elites decide the winners in society. They want us to be dependable on the government, Peter. But here’s the truth: With hard work, success is possible for EVERY citizen in the greatest country on Earth. Thank you, Rick Scott Rick Scott is a retired member of the United States Navy. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: #1 worst fish for your HEART (tuna vs salmon vs...?)
body:
Untitled Document

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Eating wild-caught fish is good
for your heart… right? WRONG.

According to Dr. Sam Walters -
one of America's #1 heart specialists - there's ONE fish you
should avoid like the plague.

This so-called "healthy fish" is
contaminated with toxic chemicals… that are literally
DEADLY for your heart. Yet 97% of Americans eat it at least once
a week.

Try to guess which one it is:

1. Tilapia

2. Tuna

3. Norwegian salmon

4. Sardines

So, click on your
guess…

Or tap below to get the
correct answer from Dr. Sam Walters himself:

>> Never eat THIS fish (it's
DEADLY for your heart)

But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: Good news, good news, great news
body:
Commit today to work in your local elections in 2024. We're all in this together.
| | | February 10, 2024 | [Read Online](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.V3w8YMCG4nRbND5mzNN4kDMB-DsSVFFhDy-o1OwWzil0sU2eBSghSASnlYniXub9lXhR897geJwHGIMWS9i8wJnZVfPnEhWreVLs5mgbupEk3MKb-3hUTrt3Qixuk0Uu6DvRUw3hs2EU78gWZ-nhxoQzy_arwcDrSq7V_U5l_u2fA7vf2S2CYQ6HLpk_BzmhNnd0vyzUECcYJsVYYP2ujoi9Jm2D6w3lygIEGdMtdMjYZpy225C_BVudHK_EVxE6Pj8kxNmandErn8XOigw9omPj6U3P8iFQkxglFpQy5FHGguL5zCHNV6_4oTxz-fwDh2KgmOmoIUBFZBPfrADjnQlwJO9dUorty9tMrZ6-IWw8QwD2MKf3s-11fMZq0NvVoh_uzuNEQSux4xX0T_JeAqpWNdIWRzuQ3TcxhgDLW_1Wldo82iQx1SZA0ugUObWr1dc4tVpwcavBt7fNyZisTIEhAdYbrP0QX3-esq616jSSLBfroBUzPom3nn0pJjz0oN4En2NWXVpVONMcILyFp786rNleaFM2e6EjeEAhoRVjoOu37dP0F-Bc9u0wIns1kGQu-vPj5SrwTIewWtoFAIyDtRP0flDRMCpHFxXY9J1aUAETk1rZh9S-PpgX4J_sKM5CVmYiPMCbf9wNwR1p3k3g37y6UYKG0vfmt8duF7k/43q/462gON84QduQSEYeWOwIxQ/h0/h001.ue7U_t3oUeK4cEsQHHYijKqc1bwMOTR1hqbSWQ_PkH8)

| | We are receiving increasing reports of our emails going to junk/spam. [Here’s an article from Wired magazine describing how to prevent this from happening in any major email platform.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4jehm7KvMtdArwGNFQyXK02AWAnvzNgHO80K3YzzukKJWXpsC-SM395yODJ11hbmSFwenspvgEGHSAFMQMCECKycq_Kp-uP6O_FOiarQxDBlT6SkCt9YsbByxF1Cju28PKgPEb_8JQbO_64H2mo0tdaY_sRChto9ks7Z9r1LZoPup_jHa-SlNbRNLC7jiUdWpj-3QRXzcvr1zy9MPbsFZLZNZWHfwYBU9jFf3Pc_c8_T/43q/462gON84QduQSEYeWOwIxQ/h1/h001.81sx4Et9iMlRLpEPjazII0cVX885Cr3pq9c0GOBf8IM) As media censorship grows, these kinds of problems will increase. Take action now.
---
|
---
Greetings from Philadelphia, where my hotel overlooks beautiful Independence Hall -- that hallowed ground where both the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution were signed.
Today, we are here for the same reason they once gathered in that great hall -- for meetings with pro-liberty allies across the state, where patriots are working non-stop to help secure trustworthy elections. Inspiring is an understatement.

Even as the world around us grows increasingly chaotic, I want to share **good news** , **good news** , and **great news**. Listen for the signal through the noise, my friends. Liberty will win out. Just keep moving forward - and never stop.

**Good News #1.** **This week, after eleven years in court, the True the Vote v. IRS/Lois Lerner et al. lawsuit finally ended.** TTV won the case in 2018, but the IRS fought to avoid paying attorney fees for the following six years. Even though TTV had no financial stake in the outcome, as we’re no longer working with either of the law firms that represented us over the decade-plus battle, we had to engage yet another firm to protect our interests in case things went off the rails on either side, as they so often had in this case. On Thursday, we got word that the U.S. Solicitor General had declined to take up the IRS’s appeal.
_It’s over. Thanks be to God._
If you are new to True the Vote, from 2010-2013, we were targeted for takedown by the IRS, enduring outrageous audits, investigations, and abuse. We sued them in 2013, fought to the bitter end, won in DC Circuit Court, and established a precedent that has helped protect other non-profit organizations from ever enduring the types of harassment we went through under the Obama administration.
If you’ve been around awhile, thank you for supporting this effort over all the many years. Together, we won - and we finished strong.

**Good News #2** , "**Scan. Check. Protect.** " is going viral! Thousands of people have already taken the S.C.P. challenge. The goal? Clean voter rolls!
Have you ever changed your state of residence since registering to vote? Check to make sure you’re no longer on the voter roll in that state(s). If you find you’re still registered (and you likely are), protect your voting record and help clean up the voter rolls by having your record removed. For step-by-step instructions, [check out Scan. Check. Protect at this link!](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6VDKmqL7dnq-Z_xN8QkhdZKgsxsq4umEAocVLBID6l-zNtT8Cdg3GPakOs5Hew5FuYwKbxgNdhoBvt_chMlwvSKCxEaOX0ckgpTb-r1rCfsZ5eOTo2j02Qxe371bqhzfqAej0hC1lol8sL4IqHbFTE-51JkNdxjoelL9ezFrKfUdpJZD7kQh2vuqGP6LWZj-hg/43q/462gON84QduQSEYeWOwIxQ/h2/h001.I06iUplUhg3RqRmssSk2mDQbrTFXgd0DxFnr6lpr7FM)
We’re traveling the country to spread the word. Here’s a sample of the stunned responses we get when people realize they have multiple voter registrations.
| [| | | True the Vote @TrueTheVote |
---|---|---
Scan. Check. Protect!🚨 Thanks to our new initiative to clean the voter rolls, we’ve already talked to tons of people out here in Las Vegas, Nevada who are on voter rolls in States where they no longer live! Please do your part! Check to see if you too are still on voter rolls... twitter.com/i/web/status/1...

Jan 27, 2024

**571** Likes **360** Retweets **19** Replies ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6QJqQm05rJ7NbtXVTxSGvK2KSeIeQv22YYysNZ1ap2CFE4Wo93XY4cJQRzF3lG2woQpx8-pmp3zwzBRocKX9pqrim0yvpfX7NkSO2644Urvxg0qGxYSdqyxpmUzxFJkVR_yUAIlwbzg4cnSU-f4D6UWzUU1b7TYcI0nqrlDy4JFrr_lYYmljgzTegX793XD4XGkavK4jU1xO2bNrdMVK9G1HRthdaozJCmhXPyG4Xi0gsq6bO9hxpUKqWYEdDTKdKQ/43q/462gON84QduQSEYeWOwIxQ/h3/h001.yau3iv6ZsYsrBE2-EO_5dIpmb2ikQvhUGeNcsckdoAI)
And **Great News**. Fair Fight appealed to the U.S. Court of Appeals for the 11th Circuit, asking the court to overturn True the Vote’s recent victory against them in the Federal District Court. [You can read more about the case here. ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6e_tt3v5FcyxfBAwX8eOipG1RfV2slKZYC8SGox98vd-RtZERLCCRH8AJu_RwpdOaDI9CtraTog8Y-RqsoTSDEoM693gsOgtWlol9yqB8KGF3cZzYZPjGeYWg3pm_7qD9j3b0TQqRslJLlhE9lkiKTnE-kiEq5nFb7G44HdiDeNUpsCUa-1Kswt0--cV5hp8miD0BSEqluon5Ff9qIYYvVECaT2chyj0y_3_BXpiq4Zr8MOYE_FLNftcOkqGAzFBokLsO_4k_QZiXJn9Sj8t3W2Ngx00H2K2FlobbZrJz_23IbSbUHCgH1Fk3FL8CtZAKKr8IYtM1QU2HOLA6pfOXmDS0X7_y7SLyWU7XK6XS5_F/43q/462gON84QduQSEYeWOwIxQ/h4/h001.pHJ0_R30bDcyX5BGT9HiQeFwxcuIZEdsuhHpSGf0LcI)
Why is this great news? Though we don’t relish the thought of going back to court, the upside is worth it because **at the Appeals Court, we can establish case law that will impact the nation.**

_Sidebar:_ You may have read recent news stories about Stacey Abrams and Fair Fight’s announcing they were laying off 75% of their work force due to lack of revenue. While it appears true that Fair Fight staff was laid off, make no mistake about Fair Fight’s financial capacity. They are part of a web of organizations with no shortage of financiers. Funding this suit will be no problem for them.

True the Vote does not have a safety net of support like our opposition’s. We are the tip of the spear, the first to the fight. Taking on battles most others can’t or won’t. As we head into the 11th Circuit, we need your help.

**We Will Keep Moving Forward.** From new programs like Scan. Check. Protect., to the relaunch of programs like cleaning the voter rolls with IV3, to online election teams training and on-the-ground outreach, and yes, to the relentless arena of lawfare, where we look forward to going on offense - they all depend on you, and the nationwide network of patriots just like you, to keep it going. Please help us if you can.
| | | [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6UAj3E_p8cNGXIOwo9MdaP4uURHu2CF_xBMsTaXvArHujZCYcWDflXvAHZOdWogeY67YYVzOuRaIaHqb0EQF0i6ti96rrq3S5noXyuTduKaOjqhz7sZ10xBY8Av5zOspGyRo6q4N0ecQdyMaBtdS6OMbgIAkxKEpm4X7l2S0AxHB/43q/462gON84QduQSEYeWOwIxQ/h5/h001.u9Vet8LggnUb5hYEhwUKaA856qtG6mX24mwhAw9dTh4)
---
This work, this movement, is not for the faint of heart - you know this full well.
As the war wages on, we stand firm. We ask for your unabashed support - with strength in our stride and hope in our spirits.
Keep the faith. Never quit.
Ever onward-
|
---
| | P.S. If you are worried about the impact of noncitizen voting in the upcoming elections, we are, too. This is a extremely serious problem. Soon, we will be coming to you with a plan to address it. Stay tuned. It will be the most significant effort we’ve ever undertaken.
---
P.P.S. Please join me this Monday, when I’ll go into greater detail about all these issues and more. I’ll be livesteaming Monday, 2.12, at 7p et. You can join the livestream by going to [onward.locals.com](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.BrHqDBa91m_HiKFVfb4b96q2_NEkcbXyDtYLsr2nvFfzkKANT_fDNgraOcvhcpxxUUK1U4x-wZdvHZTAKvS79Jq27oGXOFTwFHQj5Lcis0PDDu8W5DhMyAIcslzxLTeRxKCiL5mfjJIXxj-Sar2Ttj5FhxYjInpblM1S6PnMBFD8I2Y5xJngqvJ5BYbHXctK/43q/462gON84QduQSEYeWOwIxQ/h6/h001.3vQoAoOtW2NyOztgbX6WXwtm32IRLwubT1APMsZai8Y)

Here’s a sample of the stunned responses we get when people realize they have multiple voter registrations. | And Great News. Fair Fight appealed to the U.S. Court of Appeals for the 11th Circuit, asking the court to overturn True the Vote’s recent victory against them in the Federal District Court. Why is this great news? Though we don’t relish the thought of going back to court, the upside is worth it because at the Appeals Court, we can establish case law that will impact the nation. Sidebar: You may have read recent news stories about Stacey Abrams and Fair Fight’s announcing they were laying off 75% of their work force due to lack of revenue. While it appears true that Fair Fight staff was laid off, make no mistake about Fair Fight’s financial capacity. They are part of a web of organizations with no shortage of financiers. Funding this suit will be no problem for them. True the Vote does not have a safety net of support like our opposition’s. We are the tip of the spear, the first to the fight. Taking on battles most others can’t or won’t. As we head into the 11th Circuit, we need your help. We Will Keep Moving Forward. From new programs like Scan. Check. Protect., to the relaunch of programs like cleaning the voter rolls with IV3, to online election teams training and on-the-ground outreach, and yes, to the relentless arena of lawfare, where we look forward to going on offense - they all depend on you, and the nationwide network of patriots just like you, to keep it going. Please help us if you can. | | | This work, this movement, is not for the faint of heart - you know this full well. As the war wages on, we stand firm. We ask for your unabashed support - with strength in our stride and hope in our spirits. Keep the faith. Never quit. Ever onward- | | | P.S. If you are worried about the impact of noncitizen voting in the upcoming elections, we are, too. This is a extremely serious problem. Soon, we will be coming to you with a plan to address it. Stay tuned. It will be the most significant effort we’ve ever undertaken. P.P.S. Please join me this Monday, when I’ll go into greater detail about all these issues and more. I’ll be livesteaming Monday, 2.12, at 7p et. You can join the livestream by going to | Arizona, Texas, and Pennsylvania on my mind ... onward.locals.com/post/5246047/arizona-texas-and-pennsylvania-on-my-mind]() | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2024 True the Vote PO Box 3109 #19128 Houston, Texas 77253-3109, United States of America

Team,

Today is our very first membership meeting of the year – which means members of all 102 county parties, the staff here at IDCCA, and other Illinois political leaders will be gathered to debrief the previous year and discuss our strategy for this upcoming election.

We’re going to win in 2024, and we’re going to keep Trump’s extremist MAGA candidates from taking office anywhere on the ballot.

But that type of decisive victory means that every one of us here in Illinois needs to be on the same page – and victories like this take resources.

[**Can you make a contribution right now before I give my report? Then I can update my County Chairs and leadership team about where we are financially, and what we can feasibly afford to do this election cycle.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78764915/454403383/-1541719890?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_100224_FR_Membership-Meeting&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNmZjgzZDItMzVjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vThrz7g836DtQeoSQ-QpzD-Fh8mCL5TEYkLG2nxxrBw=)

Today’s meeting is our first step in solidifying things like organizing strategy, staff training plans, and where we are with candidate recruitment.

Your support and investment in us goes directly towards winning local elections and ensuring that far-right extremists can’t get a voice or a foothold in our government.

[**Can you invest in local politics right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78764918/454403385/-1541719890?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_100224_FR_Membership-Meeting&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNmZjgzZDItMzVjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vThrz7g836DtQeoSQ-QpzD-Fh8mCL5TEYkLG2nxxrBw=)

Thanks for everything,

Mark Guethle
IDCCA President

name: Mark Warner
subject: Bob’s opponent is catching up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
and he needs our help.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78765098/454403817/1139855649?refcode=mw_em_240210_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmZmODNkMi0zNWM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSG8baQIqgo_DyT0BeTguvK-hzIYpAem36I7cTkSXfI=)
Derek, A recent poll in Pennsylvania showed my friend, Bob Casey, is only leading his Republican opponent by 3.8% – **that’s the closest this race has ever been.** If we don’t step up today and support Bob’s race, we could very well lose our Democratic Senate majority in November. __[**So I’m asking: Can you split a $5 donation to help give Bob’s campaign the grassroots surge it needs so we can protect this crucial Senate seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78765099/454403818/1139855649?refcode=mw_em_240210_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmZmODNkMi0zNWM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSG8baQIqgo_DyT0BeTguvK-hzIYpAem36I7cTkSXfI=)__ One of my favorite things about Senator Casey is that he’ll do _anything_ to fight past the partisan gridlock in Washington and get things done for Americans. Since he’s been in the Senate, he’s worked to lower costs for seniors and people with disabilities, make child care more affordable, and fought to protect vital programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. But the GOP – who would much rather play political games than deliver for the American people – is spending millions of dollars to defeat Bob and flip this seat red. **And now they’re catching up.** __[**That’s why I’m reaching out on Bob’s behalf and asking if you can split $5 or more between my campaign and his, so we can keep Pennsylvania blue, defend our razor-thin Senate majority, and continue making progress for all Americans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78765100/454403819/1139855649?refcode=mw_em_240210_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmZmODNkMi0zNWM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSG8baQIqgo_DyT0BeTguvK-hzIYpAem36I7cTkSXfI=)__ Thank you for supporting my friend Bob. \- Mark Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78765101/454403820/1139855649?refcode=mw_em_240210_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmZmODNkMi0zNWM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSG8baQIqgo_DyT0BeTguvK-hzIYpAem36I7cTkSXfI=)********

name: Special Election Alerts via Sam Eppler
subject: National Republicans are spending millions to keep Santos’ seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Eppler for Congress
body:
we need to mobilize right now.

| Team,

We’re here with some _**shocking**_ new developments in the special election to replace George Santos, which is just 3 days away.

__**First:**__ Polling showed this race _**within the margin of error**_ and our time to convince voters is rapidly narrowing.

__**Then:**__ National Republican Super PACs launched a $2.3 million ad buy to keep this seat **RED** , which means they’re spending _**thousands of dollars on attack ads every hour of every day!**_

__**Now:**__ National Republicans are pouring _**an additional $2.6 million into this race**_ in the final days, bringing their total to _**nearly $5 million!!**_

**Team, we need to fight back against these lies and correct the record!! With just 3 days until Election Day and early voting underway, we need all hands on deck!**

body:
HAPPY LUNAR NEW YEAR

As we celebrate, l'm wishing you a healthy new year, peace, happiness and everything you wish for. Your support and trust mean so much to me and motivate me to commit myself even harder to serving my community.

Nhân dip Xuân Giáp Thin 2024, tôi kinh chúc quy vi môt nam moi nhiêu súc khoe, an länh, hanh phúc và moi sur nhu y. Su ung hô và tin turong cúa quy vi là niêm dông luc giúp tôi có thêm nghi luc de tiép tuc vûng buöc trên con duòng phuc vu công dông.

- Kim

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kbn-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25]

Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation. The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy.

Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress

Kim Nguyen for Congress
3843 S. Bristol St #604
Santa Ana, CA 92704
United States

If there’s one thing that I (a hillbilly) know how to do best, it’s getting scrappy. I’m not going down without a MAJOR fight. I hope you aren’t either. The Radical Left might be outraising us, but I KNOW that they have nothing to celebrate - and I’m determined to keep it that way this November.

clean_body: It's time. | Friends, It’s time for an honest conversation. The Democrats are outraising me, I’ll state the obvious. Let me be clear: this is still anyone’s election despite the Democrats outraising me and other Republicans across the country last Quarter. If there’s one thing that I (a hillbilly) know how to do best, it’s getting scrappy. I’m not going down without a MAJOR fight. I hope you aren’t either. The Radical Left might be outraising us, but I KNOW that they have nothing to celebrate - and I’m determined to keep it that way this November. Best, JD Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. # MD-06 Republican Candidate
# Field Set 🇺🇸
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=3e432db0de&e=0a12281e0e)

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: February 10, 2024 Frederick, MD – Mariela Roca, a U.S. Air Force Veteran and 15-year resident of Maryland’s 6th Congressional District, is energizing her grassroots campaign to represent the district’s residents. “With the Maryland Candidate Filing deadline behind us and the Republican lineup confirmed, I’m eager to engage with primary voters in the 6th District. I firmly believe I am the sole candidate capable of turning this seat red and advocating for our conservative principles in Congress. Over the past year, our campaign has gained significant momentum. We’ve raised over $185,000, mobilized hundreds of volunteers, and engaged thousands of voters through various outreach methods, including door-to-door canvassing, phone banking, events, and digital platforms. While fellow MD-06 Republican Candidate Tom Royals, a resident of Maryland’s 8th Congressional District, has reported substantial out-of-district fundraising, our campaign thrives on 100% grassroots support within the district. With over 3,238 individual donations and counting, exclusively for the primary election, I remain confident that we lead the pack among Republican candidates. Furthermore, every dollar spent in our campaign has been dedicated to direct voter outreach within the district. Since our launch last April, we’ve made an impressive 380,086 impressions on over 57,773 registered Republicans in Maryland’s 6th district. Our proactive approach ensures we connect with voters consistently, whether through door-to-door visits, text messages, or social media ads. We’re committed to spreading our message and rallying support to reclaim this seat for Republicans, bolstering our House Majority in 2024. Our campaign ethos prioritizes building trust with voters, allowing ample time for them to learn about us, ask questions, and make informed decisions on primary election day. As a mother, Air Force Veteran, and Hispanic conservative, I’m prepared to challenge the far-Left agenda in Washington. Together, we’ll secure our borders, rein in government spending, and safeguard our Constitutional rights. Join us today at [www.rocaforcongress.com](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=e666d318c0&e=0a12281e0e)!” The 2024 Maryland Republican Primary Election is set for Tuesday, May 14th, 2024. For interview requests, please reach out to the campaign at (240) 812-7046 or [info@rocaforcongress.com](MAILTO:info@rocaforcongress.com?subject=null&body=null).###
**LINK TO FULL PRESS RELEASE HERE:**
| [PRESS RELEASE](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=ba7f0c0e2a&e=0a12281e0e)
---
Your continued trust and generosity means the world to us. We are deeply grateful for your ongoing support in this journey towards positive change and progress for our community. Your donation today is an investment in the future of our country, as [**Maryland 6th will single-handedly decide if Republicans keep our majority in the House in 2024 and put an end to the Biden agenda.**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=add456e0fd&e=0a12281e0e)**Donate Today by clicking the button below!**

clean_body: | | | | | | | MD-06 Republican Candidate Field Set 🇺🇸 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: February 10, 2024 Frederick, MD – Mariela Roca, a U.S. Air Force Veteran and 15-year resident of Maryland’s 6th Congressional District, is energizing her grassroots campaign to represent the district’s residents. “With the Maryland Candidate Filing deadline behind us and the Republican lineup confirmed, I’m eager to engage with primary voters in the 6th District. I firmly believe I am the sole candidate capable of turning this seat red and advocating for our conservative principles in Congress. Over the past year, our campaign has gained significant momentum. We’ve raised over $185,000, mobilized hundreds of volunteers, and engaged thousands of voters through various outreach methods, including door-to-door canvassing, phone banking, events, and digital platforms. While fellow MD-06 Republican Candidate Tom Royals, a resident of Maryland’s 8th Congressional District, has reported substantial out-of-district fundraising, our campaign thrives on 100% grassroots support within the district. With over 3,238 individual donations and counting, exclusively for the primary election, I remain confident that we lead the pack among Republican candidates. Furthermore, every dollar spent in our campaign has been dedicated to direct voter outreach within the district. Since our launch last April, we’ve made an impressive 380,086 impressions on over 57,773 registered Republicans in Maryland’s 6th district. Our proactive approach ensures we connect with voters consistently, whether through door-to-door visits, text messages, or social media ads. We’re committed to spreading our message and rallying support to reclaim this seat for Republicans, bolstering our House Majority in 2024. Our campaign ethos prioritizes building trust with voters, allowing ample time for them to learn about us, ask questions, and make informed decisions on primary election day. As a mother, Air Force Veteran, and Hispanic conservative, I’m prepared to challenge the far-Left agenda in Washington. Together, we’ll secure our borders, rein in government spending, and safeguard our Constitutional rights. Join us today at !” The 2024 Maryland Republican Primary Election is set for Tuesday, May 14th, 2024. For interview requests, please reach out to the campaign at (240) 812-7046 or MAILTO:info@rocaforcongress.com?subject=null&body=null.### LINK TO FULL PRESS RELEASE HERE: | Your continued trust and generosity means the world to us. We are deeply grateful for your ongoing support in this journey towards positive change and progress for our community. Your donation today is an investment in the future of our country, as Today by clicking the button below! | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Roca for Congress. All rights reserved.
