name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: The latest: Bernie votes against Israel funding, early voting kicks off in CA, brand new progressive slates, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Bernie Votes NO on Israel Funding | Meet Our New CA Slate
Endorsements! | US Reps. Ro Khanna, Ayanna Pressley Join our LIVE Call |
Barbara Lee Rally/Canvass in SF | Tell Biden: Save Old Growth Forests | &
MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14159?t=1011&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]Your grassroots support has never been more important. If you’re not
already a member of Our Revolution, please consider committing to a
monthly contribution or a one-time donation today!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

This week, Our Revolution kicked off the start of early voting in
California by hosting a [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14644?t=1012&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]LIVE virtual GOTV event with U.S. Reps. Barbara
Lee, Ro Khanna, and Ayanna Pressley, and congressional candidate Lateefah
Simon!

Ballots are arriving in mailboxes, and we’re mobilizing to get out the
vote on behalf of powerful progressive slates across the state with
candidates for Congress, critical state and local offices, and Democratic
committee seats to help transform the party.

We’ve endorsed a total of 95 progressive candidates in California, and
we’re activating our grassroots army to power our massive GOTV operation -
from calling and texting to knocking doors.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14159?t=1013&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]Our Revolution organizers and volunteers have already made 1 million
voter contacts into California. Help us reach our goal of making another 1
million before voting ends on March 5th.

Barbara Lee told us Monday how much love she is feeling from the
progressive movement in this final stretch of her campaign for Senate.

“We got the highest vote in the convention because of all of you, and
we’re going to take the top two on March 5th because of this multiracial,
multigenerational coalition,” she said.

“In the Senate, I’m going to take on the challenge of forging peace,”
Barbara stated. She was the first to call for a ceasefire in this race
because she understands the humanitarian catastrophe taking place in Gaza.

“Peace, poverty, climate, making billionaires pay their fair share — these
are the progressive issues that need a bigger megaphone in the U.S.
Senate,” she said.

She reminded voters that they’ll need to vote for her twice: once to serve
the remainder of the term left by the late Dianne Feinstein, and once to
serve the full 6-year term beginning in 2025. (Yes, this is legal and
correct!)

Want to hit the streets with Congresswoman Barbara Lee?

Join Our Revolution organizers and volunteers in San Francisco as we rally
and go door knocking to GOTV with Barbara Lee for Senate on Saturday, Feb.
17th!

We’ll be there with SF Education Alliance, SF Berniecrats, Bayard Rustin
LGBTQ Coalition, Harvey Milk LGBTQ Democratic Club, CA Working Families
Party, Reproductive Freedom for All, SF Latinx Democratic Club, and other
great friends!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14726?t=1014&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]IF YOU’RE NEAR SAN FRANCISCO, SIGN UP TO JOIN US.

Our Revolution is also proud to join Barbara Lee in endorsing Lateefah
Simon to succeed her as the Congresswoman from District 12.

Lateefah is a veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for
civil rights and social justice. Having lost her husband, she’s committed
to single-payer healthcare for all.

She is also a strong advocate for reducing military spending, putting
peace first, and lifting up priorities of housing, reproductive justice,
and more.

As Barbara said, “Lateefah is from the community and for the community.”

“From her work supporting young women and trans youth to fighting to make
public transit more affordable, she is a fierce advocate and proven
leader,” Barbara continued. “It’s my honor to pass the blue baton to
Lateefah.”

Lateefah told us Monday that during her 30 years of organizing, Barbara
Lee has been a close mentor and she’s honored to follow in her footsteps.

“Congresswoman Barbara Lee’s legacy and decades of service to the people
of our district are incomparable,” said Lateefah. “She has been a voice
for moral clarity in Congress and boldly represented the progressive
values of this district.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14159?t=1015&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]HELP US ELECT BARBARA LEE, LATEEFAH SIMON, AND OUR PROGRESSIVE POWER
SLATES ACROSS CALIFORNIA.

U.S. Rep. Ro Khanna, who is chairing Barbara’s campaign, spoke to us
Monday about the dire need for her strong antiwar voice in the Senate.

“Barbara Lee would make a difference on Day 1 to get equal human rights
for Palestinians and make sure we don’t get into another war in the Middle
East,” Ro said.

“She is a true fighter for transformative change — for racial justice and
reproductive rights, for Medicare for All and housing policy and a living
wage,” he continued.

Ro said there are still around 30% of voters still undecided in California
about the Senate race. “I know that she can win this campaign. If we’re
active, if we’re mobilized, she can be in the top two, and that difference
is going to be all of us.”

U.S. Rep. Ayanna Pressley was celebrating her birthday when she joined our
GOTV Call Monday night to root on her mentor Barbara Lee.

Last time Ayanna was on our call was in September, when she announced her
endorsement for Barbara Lee for Senate alongside fellow progressive
Congress members like Cori Bush, Pramila Jayapal, Rashida Tlaib, Mark
Pocan, and others.

There’s a reason not only the grassroots but progressive leadership are
all in for Barbara Lee:

“Barbara is the OG. She gets things done. She has courage and the strength
of her convictions,” Ayanna said. “I’m so grateful for her example. She’s
an icon, a mentor... she has blazed a trail! The whole country would benefit
from a Senator Barbara Lee.”

Fatima Iqbal-Zubair serves as the Progressive Caucus Chair for the
California Democratic Party - the largest progressive caucus in the
country.

She knows the importance of mobilizing progressives - not just to vote,
but to get active in getting candidates like Barbara across the finish
line.

“We need folks making calls, knocking on doors — that’s how we win, people
power,” Fatima said. “Barbara came in first at the CA Democratic
Convention because progressive delegates organized.”

“I support Barbara Lee for Senate because she is a true progressive who
has always stood with the most marginalized,” she said. “We need
progressives to turn out and work for Barbara and all the way down ballot
as well.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14159?t=1016&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]Organized people can beat organized money, and these races are going to
come down to our grassroots power. Pitch in today to fuel our GOTV
operation in 2024.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution has endorsed a total of 95 candidates in California, and
counting!

You have already met our slates in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13560?t=1017&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]Sacramento - where we can elect Sean
Frame to the CA Assembly and win a progressive majority on the City
Council - and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13792?t=1018&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]San Francisco, where we’ve endorsed two judges facing
right-wing “tough on crime” opponents in addition to many candidates
running to transform the party.

Now, we’re excited to introduce you to the slates of progressive
candidates endorsed by Our Revolution in Alameda and Contra Costa counties
and Southern California!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14159?t=1019&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]We are running a massive GOTV operation on the ground, on the phones,
by mail and through voter to voter conversations. Chip in to help us build
progressive power in California and beyond this election year.

★ ★ ★

In addition to Barbara Lee and Lateefah Simon heading up our Alameda
County Progressive Power Slate, Our Revolution is proud to endorse two
candidates for CA State Senate, Marisol Rubio (D-9) and Jovanka Beckles
(D-7), and Jennifer Esteen for County Board of Supervisors (D-4).

Our slate of champions are taking on anti-union and pro-school
privatization opponents and running on strong platforms of progressive
change.

And, we have 30 progressives (!) running for important seats on the
Democratic Party of Alameda County Central Committee in Districts 14, 16,
18, 20 and 24.

This is how we push back against the establishment and make the party more
democratic, transparent, and responsive to the grassroots.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14282?t=1020&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]Click here to visit our website to learn more about our entire Alameda
County Progressive Power Slate!

★ ★ ★

In Contra Costa County, folks can vote for Jovanka Beckles and Marisol
Rubio for State Senate because of overlapping districts, but they can also
cast a ballot for Monica Wilson for CA Assembly in District 15.

These candidates have a real shot at winning and holding key seats to
build movement power and leverage that advances our progressive priorities
against the political establishment.

We also have great candidates seeking to do just that if elected to the
Democratic Party of Contra Costa County Central Committee:

District 1: Cameron Sasai, Jamin Pursell, Devin T. Murphy

District 2: Marisol Rubio, Alexandria Marisol Rubio-Talavera

District 4: Leslie Baxter, Michelle Simone, Ena Silva, Laura Patch

We need to continue our transformation of the California Democratic Party
from the inside out. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13792?t=1021&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]Click here for more info about this slate on our
new web page!

★ ★ ★

Alex Mohajer is running for CA State Senate in the 37th Senate District,
representing his hometown in Orange County. An LGBTQ+ civic leader, Alex
will make history as the first openly gay legislator elected from Orange
County and the first openly gay Iranian man elected anywhere in the world.

Our Revolution is endorsing Sade Elhawary for CA State Assembly (District
57). An educator, organizer, and foster parent, Sade is the eldest
daughter of immigrants who is deeply committed to transforming underserved
communities.

Our Revolution supports Tina McKinnor for CA State Assembly (District 61).
She has served as Chief of Staff to several Assembly members and led the
passage of over 100 bills, including historic legislation that gave the
California legislative staff the right to unionize and collectively
bargain for the first time in the state's history.

Nithya Raman is the most progressive choice for LA City Council (District
4). Nithya has worked to remedy extreme poverty in India and started a
grassroots volunteer program in her community in Los Angeles which reduced
the number of unsheltered homeless in her district for the first time in
years.

For Pasadena City Council, we’re endorsing Jonathan Horton (District 3)
and Brandon Lamar (District 4), the former 3rd VP of the Pasadena NAACP
and Chair of the Human Relations Commission of Pasadena.

★ ★ ★

As the 2024 elections get into full swing, we’d love to hear from you
about candidates our members are excited about! Email our political team
at political@ourrevolution.com to nominate candidates for Our Revolution’s
endorsement.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

The Senate Democratic caucus just voted in support of $14 billion in
funding for Israel. But not Bernie. Bernie stood firmly against continued
U.S. support for Israel’s war in Gaza, which has killed more than 27,000
Palestinians.

AIPAC is a big reason why support for Netanyahu’s war is so strong on
Capitol Hill and in the White House. And AIPAC has promised to spend $100
million against pro-Peace progressives like Bernie, Barbara Lee, Rashida
Tlaib, Pramila Jayapal, AOC, and Summer Lee in 2024.

AIPAC donates to both corporate Democrats and insurrectionists, and
they’re funded by right-wing billionaires and Trump mega-donors. We have
beat big money before and we can do it again.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14733?t=1022&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]Chip in today to directly support our work to defend and expand the
progressive caucus against $100,000,000 of AIPAC spending. We’re counting
on your support!

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution has joined forces with a coalition calling on President
Biden to use executive action to halt the devastation caused by logging
old-growth forests.

Old-growth forests provide irreplaceable ecosystems to countless
endangered species and are key to climate change mitigation — and 95% have
been destroyed forever.

This is another tragic case of corporate interests dominating all other
stakeholders and capturing government policy to serve their bottom line at
the expense of the rest of us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14741?t=1023&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]Sign your name now to urge President Biden to use his executive
authority to protect these forests before it's too late.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

You can help elect Barbara Lee from anywhere in the country by making
calls as part of Our Revolution’s Phone Bank Team. It’s a lot of fun, but
this is serious business because we know what it would mean to get a
powerhouse like Barbara in the U.S. Senate!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12528?t=1024&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]PHONE BANK FOR BARBARA LEE

★ ★ ★

Every seat matters. That’s why Our Revolution is gearing up NOW for 2024
to expand our organizational capacity and our voter turnout operation for
the crucial battles to come.

Not only must we defeat Donald Trump and the far right, but we have got to
take back the House, defeat enemies of progress like Kyrsten Sinema in the
Senate, and elect amazing progressives like Barbara Lee to turn this ship
around.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13109?t=1025&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]If you can, please kick in a few bucks to help us staff up for the big
elections ahead in 2024 — there’s no time to waste!

★ ★ ★

AIPAC lobbyists are already preparing to spend more than $100 MILLION to
try to unseat some of our strongest peace champions in Congress, including
Pramila Jayapal, Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, and
others.

Progressives are under attack for demanding a Ceasefire and an end to the
killing of thousands of Palestinian civilians and children — and we must
have their back in 2024.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13830?t=1026&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ]Help fund Our Revolution’s voter outreach operation by pitching in any
amount or committing to a recurring contribution. We must make sure our
most powerful anti-war voices are not silenced by big money in 2024.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=revreport&amount=&t=1027&akid=5317%2E5885482%2E50lez5 ][IMG]

From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — we are building an

already a member of Our Revolution, THANK YOU! If you’re not yet an
official member, please consider signing up for a recurring monthly

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: One of my most steadfast allies in Congress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Rep. Casar led a thirst strike for workers’ rights on the steps of the U.S. Capitol. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvrKHOLzQI1rprfrlyyotcBWxAtCFgYtgnIKR9OliFePh_ctOfPyvjYy-jV9ImO4RS2AJpmXA9sQU9DjdszxXpTJL3Pdla38rlHKzG1tbOO_t-yoJWAbYk1371eOfVPli3gAUcDmEEi-hHaHdfordAG5TFuBJcRhXAtcfnNCzf_3G6uj4B4mwfAZS1MOVcV1ak/43q/50xXNxJ1Sm6FlJlrDYEvgw/h0/CYmpjQ___064UyDajCFSBpN3SlKeznRBpNzbKsfFg2k)

Friend, Congressional allies in our ceasefire movement need our help. My colleague, **Congressman Greg Casar (D-TX)** , co-sponsored our Ceasefire Now Resolution early on, and was among the first few members of Congress to demand a ceasefire. He has signed onto letters to President Biden urging a ceasefire, and he recognizes the importance of safety and sovereignty for Palestinians. He found that his constituents overwhelmingly support a ceasefire, and he’s listening to them, unlike so many of our colleagues in Congress who are disconnected from the American people. Like other ceasefire champions, Rep. Casar could be targeted by right-wing, anti-Palestinian groups. [**Will you chip in to support my and Greg Casar’s re-election campaigns today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKPb7Uqg_N-mCvsDSQCKRx17ZUPyYlR0I4hGOGnBDxlpVXp_6ad5nta3pL5dGSfw6fO-23_gch1Qplw06iAbymq6AFO9M3jL9LX7sYt9O2rDLMPN6nei7Ka60FRhJRfgAOwy0g-UVyNGURQyTFq3BD3dMsqsAxftZ1baLIiMpZa2aahM5bW2mmOwcfMhqHDAv4h5NfxSuCHUq3w0LtEtLRrG8OshY25VIprHmzWjd0CCky2Z2Zm5vaRCQRgzuSRO8Vp91czbZWco0MOebBW0brQoaIpZetLg_KufO1GlvVR0IanWYBn3fMAgBgF7WyqE6JjhiyIn1Y6qL579tM0vOGvA/43q/50xXNxJ1Sm6FlJlrDYEvgw/h1/83E9PtphIvha5eIw_lzN_EYUsGu889WKRDoBZJZosEc) **Greg is also a long-time ally in demanding a humane immigration system, fighting back in Texas against cruel anti-immigrant policies.** Remember: most Senate Democrats voted this week to support cruel immigration policies like separating families, ending asylum protections, and mass deportations. That legislation didn’t pass, but it marks a dangerous time for our immigrant neighbors. We need champions in Congress for immigrant rights. **A son of Mexican immigrants and a former labor organizer, Greg also regularly joins striking workers on picket lines.** Last summer, Rep. Casar led a thirst strike on the steps of the U.S. Capitol in solidarity with workers across the country, calling for a federal workplace heat standard. He’s advocating for workers’ wages and well-being over corporate profits. Unlike many of our colleagues in Congress, Greg and I recognize marginalized people as human beings. We know everyone deserves dignity. In a time of rising hate and dehumanization, our voices in Congress are essential. [**From demanding a ceasefire to humane immigration policies to workers’ rights, Congressman Greg Casar is a champion for everyday people, fighting back against an unjust status quo. Join me in supporting Greg’s re-election campaign with a contribution today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKPb7Uqg_N-mCvsDSQCKRx15SDfrKEt86eu5ZzH_KjzpIlRSuojqob835QzJC9EZHEF-YlbjEJR9K0TKKpojKOJKvJmGtuvnmdV85uckcBpioayJXNiFYX8tdMNYdKIsfWO4FYw0UxzX2aLfE2Z5XIsWYUp-jt1R6TQW9CcApbimkwq_uJuNZlMbN5sseqejxDYsYtCSPNXz_ynA6sJJmTlS7mVeRBs9j0eKRqb8RFP0Y_E1_ASXngdI4Ip-Vv5PRjiIhw3dljJgo9_-Pd_RzyQID5_M4u11xTK05EqgeRrTQ96Z1aC-WzkI3EhAkN0eFLZW2_8pxf3c_RFVvVjNVtZg/43q/50xXNxJ1Sm6FlJlrDYEvgw/h2/tXA0sq8AcFuzjN71Z-pZaWsLeq-FugLNwJkSCd-LN0M) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Greg Casar_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKPb7Uqg_N-mCvsDSQCKRx1-1ss7iBKRXk9NU0fNOa1i4Y0RiENPnGj27z9JEFykTemXvATgVICjS6IutVPGn1_dN0TiaxwbTv9xx9SAcgskj30cQR-RhNvG7-FF5C_vghaVcwaBblBhzKqNYHrhDi7mUyMkKGdlL7S2lK9fwrXrMI6Uoa2VFgF6QaIPJV7-5lzVSfbB3Z61pazQYQceHernxXbvttloDj9u1-d8kdOzh_1RcXY979FHzBQjDxKybtUO34G8EXnfaHhxjR6HWuafPNCNk3jDjEVvyu7GIaTxG8X0I3aTFKdidyDB3sjS2YCrUvMJ74oFHpw9NScZ4x4Diabd8VI2oiX82YWxWmXUPy8Q-oGAFkhrE9dtMhhfLG/43q/50xXNxJ1Sm6FlJlrDYEvgw/h3/HJ5ek5ODmoCtoOXkuIrBu4b-hAUdu36V5Z1t6jP_kFw)

name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: Bonnie’s message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78768820/454413624/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20240208_ST_BHM_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_BHM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTAxYzljZC0zY2M4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ug3-yB9ehuSe5iUEzsLt4LI3WskDYDi8e6-uj6-7a7A=&emci=75e12647-cbc5-ee11-b660-002248223848&emdi=8e01c9cd-3cc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=30096098) | We wanted to make sure you saw Bonnie’s earlier message about the importance of Black History Month.

As the first African-American woman to represent New Jersey in Congress, co-founder and co-chair of the Congressional Caucus on Black Women and Girls, and a member of the Congressional Black Caucus, Bonnie recognizes the importance of Black history, both in the past and in the present.

**Read Bonnie’s full message here:**
* * *

We see the legacies of our nation’s rich Black history every single day. Everywhere you look, there are pieces of history forged by brave Black men and women across the country.

In February, we take the time to honor the contributions of Black Americans, celebrating how far we have come. We also take the time to recognize how much farther we have to go, pushing for our great country to live up to its ideals of equality and justice **_for all._**

The best place to start is by teaching our children, however, only 8-9% of history taught in public schools is Black history. This means that students across the country are missing out on critical education about our nation’s history.

This is why I introduced the Black History Matters Act, legislation that outlined an assessment of Black history education efforts in public schools. By showing the next generation of Americans Black history, we ensure that it is not forgotten.

**Black history is American history.**

As we continue to push for critical reforms to our democracy and our systems of justice to revitalize the American spirit, I have great hope for the years to come.

— Bonnie Watson Coleman | | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78768821/454413632/-1456106164?amount=&source=&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTAxYzljZC0zY2M4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ug3-yB9ehuSe5iUEzsLt4LI3WskDYDi8e6-uj6-7a7A=)
---
* * *

---

Peter,

Matt has been hard at work putting people over politics and achieving real results for working families.

Just last week, the House passed a crucial expansion of the Child Tax Credit, and Matt played a key role in making it happen. **This bill is yet another testament to Matt’s commitment to delivering tangible benefits for the hardworking folks in northeastern Pennsylvania and around the country.**

The expansion will bring relief to the working families who need it most. With over **16 million** children across America set to benefit, this legislation will provide vital support, easing the financial burdens of raising children and ensuring that parents no longer have to choose between essentials like putting food on the table and paying their bills.

**Matt is dedicated to listening to the needs of working families, and this is yet another example of how he is making sure they are prioritized in Congress. That’s why we need to keep Matt in Congress: He doesn’t just talk about working for the people, he actually puts it into practice.**

But here’s the thing: we need your help to keep the momentum going. We must ensure Matt has the resources to continue fighting for our community after this November’s elections.

clean_body: We’ve officially kicked off the petitioning process to get Matt on the ballot for November, and we need your help to ensure we can complete this critical step successfully. | | = "House passes bipartisan tax bill that expands child tax credit" \- CNN Peter, Matt has been hard at work putting people over politics and achieving real results for working families. Just last week, the House passed a crucial expansion of the Child Tax Credit, and Matt played a key role in making it happen. This bill is yet another testament to Matt’s commitment to delivering tangible benefits for the hardworking folks in northeastern Pennsylvania and around the country. The expansion will bring relief to the working families who need it most. With over 16 million children across America set to benefit, this legislation will provide vital support, easing the financial burdens of raising children and ensuring that parents no longer have to choose between essentials like putting food on the table and paying their bills. Matt is dedicated to listening to the needs of working families, and this is yet another example of how he is making sure they are prioritized in Congress. That’s why we need to keep Matt in Congress: He doesn’t just talk about working for the people, he actually puts it into practice. But here’s the thing: we need your help to keep the momentum going. We must ensure Matt has the resources to continue fighting for our community after this November’s elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Cartwright In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. name: Joanna Weiss
subject: How $1 can make a difference:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78769946/454415972/1033648996?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM0OGViMzQtM2VjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ejofk8MfanrDvOXuthB3cZ4r7xCTqGHRaQDT6m1ZUsI=)
Peter,

I am about to ask you to chip in $1 to support my campaign.

That’s right -- all I am asking for is four quarters to keep CA-47 blue.

**[Before I explain how your $1 could make a huge impact, will you click this link to help us keep our strong momentum ahead of our March 5th primary?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78769949/454415986/1033648996?refcode=em-2.10.24-all-a&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM0OGViMzQtM2VjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ejofk8MfanrDvOXuthB3cZ4r7xCTqGHRaQDT6m1ZUsI=)**
| ****[Donate $1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78769954/454415988/1033648996?refcode=em-2.10.24-all-a&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM0OGViMzQtM2VjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ejofk8MfanrDvOXuthB3cZ4r7xCTqGHRaQDT6m1ZUsI=)****
---

Here’s why your $1 donation is so important:
* **Every donation -- no matter how small -- powers our campaign.** Your support directly funds our efforts to turnout voters across the district. This race could come down to a few hundred voters, so every dollar could have a game-changing impact in getting our supporters to the polls. (My friend and supporter Rep. Harley Rouda won his primary in 2018 by 125 votes!)

* **Your $1 sends a message.** Every donation (yes even $1) sends an important message about the number of supporters behind us. When more people give, it shows we have widespread support that can sustain us through Election Day.

In the 2020 election cycle, corporate PACs gave more than $400 million to federal campaigns - and that’s expected to grow even bigger this cycle.
**Corporations have too much power over politicians. Just take a look at how much your prescriptions cost and you’ll see how politicians are letting corporations price gouge our families. Government should be about helping people, not increasing corporate profits.**
We believe that you have to put your money where your mouth is. That’s why we’re two of the only members of Congress who refuse to take corporate PAC money - and now we’re leading the charge in Congress to ban the influence of corporate PACs on our elections.
[_**If you agree that corporate PACs shouldn’t be able to donate to politicians, will you pitch in to help us win re-election and ban corporate PACs once and for all?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78770142/454416261/-526186645?&refcode=E6912-20240207-GoldenHarder-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTY0OGViMzQtM2VjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I9uz2bP6NRxuqQyDbdeZMh3VaF28QLJu8KPUgfFakLY=)

Josh Harder & Jared Golden

clean_body: Two districts. One mission. | | = Hi Peter, it’s Congressmen Josh Harder and Jared Golden. You can look in any direction from Capitol Hill and you’ll find a corporation looking to influence somebody’s vote. It's just plain wrong and it has to stop. As Democrats in two of the most competitive races in the country, believe us when we say dark money is a serious problem in our country’s politics. That’s why together we’re reintroducing the Ban Corporate PACs Act to eliminate the power of corporations to influence our elections. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- In the 2020 election cycle, corporate PACs gave more than $400 million to federal campaigns - and that’s expected to grow even bigger this cycle. Corporations have too much power over politicians. Just take a look at how much your prescriptions cost and you’ll see how politicians are letting corporations price gouge our families. Government should be about helping people, not increasing corporate profits. We believe that you have to put your money where your mouth is. That’s why we’re two of the only members of Congress who refuse to take corporate PAC money - and now we’re leading the charge in Congress to ban the influence of corporate PACs on our elections. = Thank you for taking a stand with us against dark money in politics, Josh Harder & Jared Golden *

| | Friend,With the rampant corruption in our government and elected officials constantly attacking voting rights, it’s more important than ever for everyone to support pro-democracy and anti-corruption legislation. We just released our legislative scorecard so you can easily see which members of Congress support these types of measures and we can continue to hold them accountable for their votes. You can view the whole scorecard and grading criteria **[here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78772020/454419664/-1809059087?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmY2E4NDc0LTNmYzgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g3LpYYOyyPshojgZZ1Wjw74MQ4Qc6c6qHCOhxPH_wkg=&emci=e04bab19-8fc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=7fca8474-3fc8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=14405814)**.We graded members on their support of bills like the _Freedom to Vote Act_ , the _DISCLOSE Act_ , the _John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ , and the _Democracy for All_ Amendment. Our democracy continues to be threatened, and these pieces of legislation, among others, are crucial to ensure our precious democracy lives far into the future. **[You know how important it is that our elected officials support voting rights and fight against corruption in all forms. Creating this scorecard is something that we couldn’t have done without all of your support, but we’re not done yet. Even with us firing on all cylinders to reach projections, we haven't seen the level of grassroots support that we usually do. It's thanks to you that we've been able to scare the socks off of the GOP establishment. They're terrified that Michael B. Moore will win this seat. We know he has what it takes to defeat Nancy Mace, but he can’t win alone. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for helping us turn things around. body:
I had to send you a message.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78772106/454419928/1743277108?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3463-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTFlYmQ5NS0zZmM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mcPpAW90lEje30vqvawktu0Z7fDQEB4vXi5F-nvFIXw=)
Ah sh*t, folks.
**Another loud-mouthed carpetbagger just launched his campaign for Montana’s Senate seat against Jon Tester. **

I’m not exaggerating when I say Montana is THE most important Senate race on the map. I’m also not exaggerating when I say we could LOSE if you don’t step up today.
**[It’s time to get serious. Rush a split donation NOW to help Jon and Jacky’s campaign fight back against a new wave of attacks. Any amount (not kidding!) makes a huge difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78772107/454419929/1743277108?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3463-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTFlYmQ5NS0zZmM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mcPpAW90lEje30vqvawktu0Z7fDQEB4vXi5F-nvFIXw=)**
The minute I heard Jon had a new opponent, I had to send you a message. The stakes could not be higher here. Experts rank Montana as a toss-up (yikes!) and polls are virtually tied (double yikes!).
To top it off, there’s been over $80 million reserved in TV ad buys. Let that sink in. **$80 MILLION** because Republicans know the Senate majority comes down to what happens here.

If I had any hair, I’d be pulling it out!
**Look, Jon doesn’t rely on wealthy billionaires or shady special interest groups, instead he proudly depends on grassroots supporters like you. That’s why I’m in your inbox:**
**[It’s critically important you make a donation today, if you can. Split a donation between Jon’s campaign and Jacky Rosen's so we can throw some punches, defend Montana, and protect the Democratic Senate majority. LET’S GO.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78772108/454419930/1743277108?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3463-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTFlYmQ5NS0zZmM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mcPpAW90lEje30vqvawktu0Z7fDQEB4vXi5F-nvFIXw=)**
There’s never been a more important time for you to step up. Thanks.

– James Carville
|
* * *

clean_body: Our campaign is made up of folks like you giving $5, $20, or $50.71 at a time. We’re counting on your support today. | | | In 2020, millions of people made small, individual donations to help take back the White House, protect our democracy, and begin the process of moving our country forward. It was a campaign made up of folks on this grassroots team chipping in what they could, when they could. And Peter, this campaign is no different. That’s why we want to share a number with you that’s important to us: $50.71. That was the average contribution given to our campaign last month. Just like in 2020, we’re relying on grassroots support to ensure Joe and Kamala have the resources to reach voters in every corner of the country and fight back against Donald Trump and his MAGA extremism. | | Dear Friend, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America’s baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, “Those were the days.” But this email isn’t about baseball. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you.

| | **Today,[I’m asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAQhX-NuRnhsY3xgUOyJKiHVaVsN1JPyGsPiVUMyJiN-PcVadTLHL558-Y9E-bB91tN1JEA3L1bCADhBwKwJn41n5_vcaMP0dJWXuG2L-GNAKRtxv_Kl0mOwfhhp6rJXC3AsN5mWDNVKFlpLWV2r5FhZY2SkhnmUGqlNcPKSMtcxUGKzNdQgCiAFaziADLXFjXKUgj3ZaV2jIji-SjvI2K6-_EPRmf8sOV2CtlQ31Oal2ewM4HzgnaNmD_8GNHtip0l_EZ6M_EbN9pPka4LXXA0CQmcVWmV4_2XLTVTQkjCz2sK3TKt0SLhzbFp6eV0JVDuOKDzayC8Ob2_iDVhNv42Et78K1JAd2za7qN9O3S_f7Y_usvp2n38OlzoPl5XCePu0ifHsli7-eGHwS-lIqK4PcvaKfwNAAD___jJgso)** Today, I’m asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that folks will be talking about for generations to come. Because when you think about it, those ‘good-ol’ days of the 1970s weren’t as good as we tend to first remember. Baseball was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy after another. I’m running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: \- Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter’s rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. **_Remember?_** \- Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. **_Remember?_** \- Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. **_Remember??_** Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, “It’s déjà vu all over again.” There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Steve, I’m afraid America’s best days are behind us.” But listen, here’s something I also want you to remember... **_We Republicans_ ****pulled our country out of that 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** **We put classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did.** **And America became a shining city upon a hill once more.** _**We can do that again**_**.** **It starts by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California.** **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.** **That’s why I’m asking you to rush in your $35 donation today** I’m sorry for the urgency but _the primary is in less than three months_ and here’s where things stand... In March, I need to be one of the top 2 vote-getters to get to the November general election. Adam Schiff will probably take the #1 spot. And polls have me hot on his heels for the #2 spot. Once we’re passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. Second... you know I’m not a career politician. But I do have the one thing a Republican needs to get elected in California... ...name recognition. I’m no Schwarzenegger and I’d certainly never dare compare myself to President Reagan. But California voters know me. And Adam Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race. As I’m writing you this email, there are just a few percentage points separating us. We’ve got a shot –- a very real shot -- of landing smack behind Schiff in the primary so we can go on to beat him in the general election. But there are just three months left until the primary. And the giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of that time trying to bury me and our common sense message. **[**When you rush back your _Garvey for Senate_ campaign contribution of $35 or more...**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAQhX-NuRnhsY3xgUOyJKiHVaVsN1JPyGsPiVUMyJiN-PcVadTLHL558-Y9E-bB91tN1JEA3L1bCADhBwKwJn41n5_vcaMP0dJWXuG2L-GNAKRtxv_Kl0mOwfhhp6rJXC3AsN5mWDNVKFlpLWV2r5FhZY2SkhnmUGqlNcPKSMtcxUGKzNdQgCiAFaziADLXFjXKUgj3ZaV2jIji-SjvI2K6-_EPRmf8sOV2CtlQ31Oal2ewM4HzgnaNmD_8GNHtip0l_EZ6M_EbN9pPka4LXXA0CQmcVWmV4_2XLTVTQkjCz2sK3TKt0SLhzbFp6eV0JVDuOKDzayC8Ob2_iDVhNv42Et78K1JAd2za7qN9O3S_f7Y_usvp2n38OlzoPl5XCePu0ifHsli7-eGHwS-lIqK4PcvaKfwNAAD___jJgso)** ...you’re helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free._ This race is the toughest in the nation. But they say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball. And you know I’ve done that plenty of times. Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win in California as a common sense Republican. But I can’t do it without you. I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. It all depends on you! You can do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can **[**step up to the plate with me and take a swing for the thrill of victory**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAQhX-NuRnhsY3xgUOyJKiHVaVsN1JPyGsPiVUMyJiN-PcVadTLHL558-Y9E-bB91tN1JEA3L1bCADhBwKwJn41n5_vcaMP0dJWXuG2L-GNAKRtxv_Kl0mOwfhhp6rJXC3AsN5mWDNVKFlpLWV2r5FhZY2SkhnmUGqlNcPKSMtcxUGKzNdQgCiAFaziADLXFjXKUgj3ZaV2jIji-SjvI2K6-_EPRmf8sOV2CtlQ31Oal2ewM4HzgnaNmD_8GNHtip0l_EZ6M_EbN9pPka4LXXA0CQmcVWmV4_2XLTVTQkjCz2sK3TKt0SLhzbFp6eV0JVDuOKDzayC8Ob2_iDVhNv42Et78K1JAd2za7qN9O3S_f7Y_usvp2n38OlzoPl5XCePu0ifHsli7-eGHwS-lIqK4PcvaKfwNAAD___jJgso)**. Please join me. Because when we win in California, we’re winning for all of America. Thank you and God Bless,

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 300
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kLtu6zAMhp-G3mJItOTLoOGcps5UFB0SdNWFioXKF1gyAr99kTTt-pP8-OHX4xKD3xU0_wFxCC4BIlT_AHHL1UWfz2_rfriJ0-EkL3i9D_EFEPO-0N_mE1LSqEO8p82xcEqg5t4WpHjDGtl2nZTFoDrByGgUaKzxZEzbVnXbeF9zZqU0VASFDAVDznhbIcqys9SRrIVwxsrOcRDs8aj0K1EewvRFq9Mh7qWdxyKqIeclPcR6wH52ppw2G2lLP1d2HgH7pzJgnzaT7BqWHOYpAfbb9EwMQdU_GqmOr8dPj-_8o1iVW24hxpDqBgS7_iK_AwAA__8UpWW7)
clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | Having you and all of America’s baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, “Those were the days.” But this email isn’t about baseball. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you. | | | Today, Today, I’m asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that folks will be talking about for generations to come. Because when you think about it, those ‘good-ol’ days of the 1970s weren’t as good as we tend to first remember. Baseball was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy after another. I’m running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: \- Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter’s rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? \- Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? \- Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, “It’s déjà vu all over again.” There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Steve, I’m afraid America’s best days are behind us.” But listen, here’s something I also want you to remember... We Republicans pulled our country out of that 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. We put classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did. And America became a shining city upon a hill once more. We can do that again. It starts by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California. But there’s no way I can pull it off without you. That’s why I’m asking you to rush in your $35 donation today I’m sorry for the urgency but the primary is in less than three months and here’s where things stand... In March, I need to be one of the top 2 vote-getters to get to the November general election. Adam Schiff will probably take the #1 spot. And polls have me hot on his heels for the #2 spot. Once we’re passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. Second... you know I’m not a career politician. But I do have the one thing a Republican needs to get elected in California... ...name recognition. I’m no Schwarzenegger and I’d certainly never dare compare myself to President Reagan. But California voters know me. And Adam Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race. As I’m writing you this email, there are just a few percentage points separating us. We’ve got a shot –- a very real shot -- of landing smack behind Schiff in the primary so we can go on to beat him in the general election. But there are just three months left until the primary. And the giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of that time trying to bury me and our common sense message. ...you’re helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free. This race is the toughest in the nation. But they say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball. And you know I’ve done that plenty of times. Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win in California as a common sense Republican. But I can’t do it without you. I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. It all depends on you! You can do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can . Please join me. Because when we win in California, we’re winning for all of America. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | P.S. It’s the bottom of the 9th and Republicans desperately need a homerun. We simply can’t let another election slip through our fingers while Democrats go on destroying our country. With your help, I know we can beat Adam Schiff in California and start the Republican Comeback Rally America needs. But the primary is in just three months. Thank you! –Steve | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE | | |

name: Mike Soboleski for Congress
subject: Team Soboleski Covers 5 Events in 4 Counties
body:
Our Team is Incredible
| | | | THANK YOU TO OUR INCREDIBLE TEAM!
---
|
---
| Team Soboleski Covers 5 Events in 4 Counties
---
| It was an exciting and busy day in the Second Congressional District! Early on we picked up two new endorsements from the Honorable Will Tuell of Machias and Speaker of the House for the 125th Legislature Representative Bob Nutting of Oakland. I am so thankful to have their support.
The momentum is building for our campaign!
I was able to hit the GOP Caucus in Fort Fairfield in the County. Always great to see old friends up north and make new ones. I was able to speak on two local radio stations and in between I had a great in-depth interview on WGAN's Inside Maine. You can listen to that here:

[https://wgan.com/podcasts/rep-mike-soboleski-segment-4/](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DwG1WVBT4IwFf7Mr9YU0XlovEm3PsO_9c07yzHrxu6RsoZPu1v0rbMUE-HfRL-AHLpWuBHKyfxXBiXlwQnPFxhjTJ-kXBXAPKBMlPyH-e02UXZ9NhM5cFQ2sF3JlV603iSdKyXOuP0lhaZ3-DSBFAYdIjDRcd9AnkBDwJkPuks7ISoe2XJ3GsfnAe1eY_kEO&c=itqoh3nRc1syELWBykoXQx3y6WHa5TxjO5vEQ4OJmEcre1oiV9C8DA==&ch=NL0ocxotVG92BJQWDiJVHDJgwskD_R82oUqWwayZPdlsHOQuXASvWw==)
It was then off to Farmington for a Lincoln Day dinner, and it was good to be among friends to catch up and end the day for me.
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The real news of the day is our team. Our team is incredible. We have over 30 endorsements and a few more on the way. The wins today are all about the great people who endorsed our campaign and stepped up to speak for us when we couldn't be there. I know these fine folks always have their constituents' backs in Augusta and today they had mine. I am honored to call them friends and the State of Maine is lucky to have them in the legislature.
Donnie Ardell represents Monticello in the Maine House. He is a long-time law enforcement officer and expert on firearms. Always quick with a joke and a guy you can go to for policy advice, Donnie represents his people very well. He spoke for us at the Houlton GOP caucus, and we thank him for his hard work!
Shelley Rudnicki represents Fairfield in the Maine House. She is tenacious and never quits on fighting for what is right. Her people are so lucky to have her in their corner. Her experience and leadership speak volumes about her. She spoke for us at the Skowhegan caucus, and we thank her for stepping up!
Reagan Paul represents Winterport in the Maine House. She may be one of the youngest members of the legislature, but she is also one of the most principled. Wise beyond her years, she is an asset to the people of her District. She spoke for us at a GOP event in Hancock County and we thank her for always being willing to help out!
Too many Washington, DC insiders think that money is the only thing that matters in a campaign. It's not, and that is why Congress is broken. Our campaign for Congress is about the people we serve and want to represent. You win because of the team you surround yourself with; they hold you accountable and make you remember why you are running.
Words cannot express my gratitude to my friends for going all around the state today to help the people of CD2 learn more about our campaign. An absolutely amazing day and a team win for sure.
Together we will do this!!!
---
| | SHARE
---
---
| |
---
| Connect with us
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DwG1WVBT4IwFf7Mr9YU0XlovEm3PsO_9c07yzHrxu6RsoZPu1v0rbMUE-HfRL-AH6TbAsIrG9qED5fYFFI6RXeSA1T5MmuT5Rb30t_-tBh3EO_1TDfoO3KgnjFJop9WrjBtCX_QxVjrHyAhRQurJfC8sL02GNr_ppneAmBmSeOHv2nI3SFA1sw==&c=itqoh3nRc1syELWBykoXQx3y6WHa5TxjO5vEQ4OJmEcre1oiV9C8DA==&ch=NL0ocxotVG92BJQWDiJVHDJgwskD_R82oUqWwayZPdlsHOQuXASvWw==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DwG1WVBT4IwFf7Mr9YU0XlovEm3PsO_9c07yzHrxu6RsoZPu1v0rbG5Z5ABda4fh91Gdta3gl-LM6iX0TTNCQd2VAPG9KO_rvzLKkDOLTtJA5VwKLlQ3AvOEj8zDhz8aObf54IcZStFtjwnsS3nX-X6XcovF7UkZ&c=itqoh3nRc1syELWBykoXQx3y6WHa5TxjO5vEQ4OJmEcre1oiV9C8DA==&ch=NL0ocxotVG92BJQWDiJVHDJgwskD_R82oUqWwayZPdlsHOQuXASvWw==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DwG1WVBT4IwFf7Mr9YU0XlovEm3PsO_9c07yzHrxu6RsoZPu1v0rbDJmpQq2Gsjv8Dv_FuWq6VgT8QAi-769xYzY4QwRE8oTPQhD0O5wK_6iWG7hvbs5QZRK8JMtE8hxhb0qtBeWLLFrtKLOn1zoQw==&c=itqoh3nRc1syELWBykoXQx3y6WHa5TxjO5vEQ4OJmEcre1oiV9C8DA==&ch=NL0ocxotVG92BJQWDiJVHDJgwskD_R82oUqWwayZPdlsHOQuXASvWw==)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley betrayed veterans like me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
A story about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
Before I ask you to **[add a donation of any amount toward my grassroots campaign,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43684?refcode=em20240210-4789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4789%2E614464%2EjTeSsq) I want to tell you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley betrayed veterans like me.**
**[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43684?refcode=em20240210-4789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4789%2E614464%2EjTeSsq)**
It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.
It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43684?refcode=em20240210-4789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4789%2E614464%2EjTeSsq)
Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.
For me, that was planning our routes and poring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.
**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**
When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.
Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.
So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43684?refcode=em20240210-4789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4789%2E614464%2EjTeSsq)
What they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.
Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.
These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**
I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country. That’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.[If you’re with me, please add a donation of $10 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign today so we can stay on track with our mid-quarter goal, get this message in front of Missouri voters, and defeat Josh Hawley.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43684?refcode=em20240210-4789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4789%2E614464%2EjTeSsq)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43685?refcode=em20240210-4789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=4789%2E614464%2EjTeSsq) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43685?refcode=em20240210-4789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=4789%2E614464%2EjTeSsq) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43685?refcode=em20240210-4789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=4789%2E614464%2EjTeSsq) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43685?refcode=em20240210-4789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=4789%2E614464%2EjTeSsq) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43685?refcode=em20240210-4789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=4789%2E614464%2EjTeSsq) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43685?refcode=em20240210-4789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=4789%2E614464%2EjTeSsq) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43684?refcode=em20240210-4789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=4789%2E614464%2EjTeSsq)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: NEW: “Possible Trump VP pick” attacked me on CNN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5430%2E5257348%2E_zDylA ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, the No.
3 House Republican and “possible Trump VP pick” Elise Stefanik attacked me
on CNN this week, but it was so much bigger than that:

Stefanik claimed she would have blocked legitimate votes on January 6,
2021, if she had been in Mike Pence’s position as vice president.

Stefanik is sending a clear signal to Trump — if you attempt an
insurrection a second time, I will help ensure it succeeds. It’s a recipe
for the greatest Constitutional crisis since the Civil War, and she should
be ashamed to ever show her face in public again.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240210_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1004&akid=5430%2E5257348%2E_zDylA ]There is no other way to say it — MAGA Republicans are determined to
destroy our democracy if they lose. Period. They have forsaken any
allegiance to the Constitution or their oath of office — nothing but power
matters to them — and they represent the most dangerous threat our
democracy faces. I’m personally asking for your
$10
contribution today to not only respond to this attack but to ensure we win
this primary in 24 days and defeat them this November.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240210_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=5430%2E5257348%2E_zDylA ]EXPRESS DONATE

$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240210_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1007&akid=5430%2E5257348%2E_zDylA ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240210_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1008&akid=5430%2E5257348%2E_zDylA ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240210_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1009&akid=5430%2E5257348%2E_zDylA ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240210_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=5430%2E5257348%2E_zDylA ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Here are a few things you should know about Elise Stefanik:

* When Liz Cheney said she would not propagate the Big Lie, a lie that
tore at the foundation of our free and fair elections, Elise Stefanik
put up her hand and effectively agreed to tell any lie the GOP
leadership wanted if she could have Liz’s job. They gave it to her.
* Last month, Stefanik went on The Roger Stone Show to smear the
impeachment hearings I led against Donald Trump — during which Fox
News called her the “main Schiff antagonist.”
* Stefanik’s campaign has run vile, racist digital ads saying that
“Radical Democrats” are planning “a PERMANENT ELECTION INSURRECTION
via AMNESTY” — some of the most extreme “Great Replacement” conspiracy
theory rhetoric we’ve seen from a member of GOP leadership, and the
kind more often espoused by white supremacists, Neo-Nazis, and Tucker
Carlson.

And the other night, she had this to say about me:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240210_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=5430%2E5257348%2E_zDylA ]Elise Stefanik on CNN with Kaitlan Collins, chyron reads: Rep. Elise
Stefanik on possibly being Trump's VP pick

“I’m proud to be one of the top surrogates for President Trump...I worked
with him on his impeachment defense team when the first witch hunt started
against him, perpetrated by the Democrats and Adam Schiff.”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240210_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1012&akid=5430%2E5257348%2E_zDylA ]Enough already. If Stefanik gives up her seat in Congress to lose
alongside Donald Trump, then I would be proud to have your support in
banishing this MAGA extremist from public life entirely. Chip in
$10 to
help us respond to this attack and finish our primary election sprint
through March 5.

24 days to go. Thank you for remaining by my side.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240210_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=5430%2E5257348%2E_zDylA ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

And the other night, she had this to say about me: [ ]Elise Stefanik on CNN with Kaitlan Collins, chyron reads: Rep. Elise Stefanik on possibly being Trump's VP pick “I’m proud to be one of the top surrogates for President Trump...I worked with him on his impeachment defense team when the first witch hunt started against him, perpetrated by the Democrats and Adam Schiff.” [ ]Enough already. If Stefanik gives up her seat in Congress to lose alongside Donald Trump, then I would be proud to have your support in banishing this MAGA extremist from public life entirely. Chip in $10 to help us respond to this attack and finish our primary election sprint through March 5. 24 days to go. Thank you for remaining by my side. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE WEEKLY 135 E. Friend, **Fidelity. Bravery. Integrity. **

_**These are the values at the core of who I am.

**_ This is former FBI Special Agent Mike Rogers, and those three words are more than just the motto of the agency I used to work for. **[They’re words that have guided my entire public service career.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=d90e0d4c893a497f8d1a90a44946b451&_e=G2LyecMUXBno4HgaCd1tCMLr75ctkTzxJaSDhdaE12Pk3uEdt4PChpQlVXNZ_xHZRFggK2hcsPfIo5dh7JY5TozJbuuY4tFZ1pxK8Y3NyvvGwMR3VonpWU520hJHe5-kjEKrtB368m8Frw6E38t1rMyN4_ekRnWHTf15ieJySeo6D4-nZsDGnHFe88SWGtkX8MzW92RIohXFzIWB42qURk8u9HaZqQ2MTUIcVbW5Eg7cKwLx0Pe6oBRGzJR1HJeoJCe8HhgWG-_fbWwSsjVJp_WQ87dQD5sFb1qCWF-s93g4foF0Whcd_90LQApL238GcikWaliu4aZ705EFyjAvPtnhtBfJjpnwH4sN8dSrTLc-QoqfskU5hbMgqzaCWyo4UQHBaa7XAon5e53qLnUzfWkeHMmcEMc92oJs6Rfy8F4%3D)** **[Fidelity:](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=d90e0d4c893a497f8d1a90a44946b451&_e=G2LyecMUXBno4HgaCd1tCMLr75ctkTzxJaSDhdaE12Pk3uEdt4PChpQlVXNZ_xHZRFggK2hcsPfIo5dh7JY5TozJbuuY4tFZ1pxK8Y3NyvvGwMR3VonpWU520hJHe5-kjEKrtB368m8Frw6E38t1rMyN4_ekRnWHTf15ieJySeo6D4-nZsDGnHFe88SWGtkX8MzW92RIohXFzIWB42qURk8u9HaZqQ2MTUIcVbW5Eg7cKwLx0Pe6oBRGzJR1HJeoR4MyIRNVHQBqsz-h1XWXY3ORSlo2mbBdf0FzP1z4jjfWXg5TXTDyr1j4FXkKLQKN3L3DlrQoDVvez5zDeR1F0k5abCgkGsDNSiD7axwyDyVmnj8lneTyXgwTU_2qafYJZkAApXxgUAljv6eU3XQWbC3AsMY0lPDbQ3iOR34njVo%3D)** I served my country in the U.S. Army and in the FBI, taking down some of America’s worst gangsters. I’ll always honor our American flag, our military, and all of the patriots who have served and sacrificed for our country.

**[Bravery:](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=d90e0d4c893a497f8d1a90a44946b451&_e=G2LyecMUXBno4HgaCd1tCMLr75ctkTzxJaSDhdaE12Pk3uEdt4PChpQlVXNZ_xHZRFggK2hcsPfIo5dh7JY5TozJbuuY4tFZ1pxK8Y3NyvvGwMR3VonpWU520hJHe5-kjEKrtB368m8Frw6E38t1rMyN4_ekRnWHTf15ieJySeo6D4-nZsDGnHFe88SWGtkX8MzW92RIohXFzIWB42qURk8u9HaZqQ2MTUIcVbW5Eg7cKwLx0Pe6oBRGzJR1HJeo3uxegNR_VcCD67njKs42RgrhaylOaSTvDqKzHBnusaljdsUdtWw8diRLc34kbbxdDrCWLWRUA2TIl4t2Gz2nJWKuISTXUzMvnr--zfLbq6-IY6z7fwk1n2wA0RWB6vNLa8c_6uEjZWBc-lpf_H9E_nPUuHqbn4SqcUw5iEof7TM%3D)** I’ve always taken on the hard fights. From murderous mob bosses in Chicago to national security threats in Washington, I’ve never backed down or bent a knee to anyone threatening our safety or our country.

**[Integrity:](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=d90e0d4c893a497f8d1a90a44946b451&_e=G2LyecMUXBno4HgaCd1tCMLr75ctkTzxJaSDhdaE12Pk3uEdt4PChpQlVXNZ_xHZRFggK2hcsPfIo5dh7JY5TozJbuuY4tFZ1pxK8Y3NyvvGwMR3VonpWU520hJHe5-kjEKrtB368m8Frw6E38t1rMyN4_ekRnWHTf15ieJySeo6D4-nZsDGnHFe88SWGtkX8MzW92RIohXFzIWB42qURk8u9HaZqQ2MTUIcVbW5Eg7cKwLx0Pe6oBRGzJR1HJeoSLcODr8C8Lzd0mzK86oO4ZEecknE6jeMgFAzzrRUamY32kv0I0VV1HGJh9hqfGYyv5fk6-39FMguijifw3X8ONSpURhRJrPbx7pd3FhVA45rbRTcUfjyrTxKdS_WDrf_5U_bvbO1hkolIlV1sbMlFQ_icFQchu-M4Kay1Jgez_o%3D)** I pride myself on doing my work honestly and ethically. As a father and third-generation military veteran, I always taught my kids that being honest and true to who you are are two of the most important qualities a person can have. Friend, I’m running for the United States Senate in Michigan because Washington could use a lot more _**fidelity, bravery, and integrity.**_ As a conservative, I’ll use my experience as an FBI Special Agent and former Chairman of the House Intelligence Committee to take on government corruption, the border crisis, and the growing threat of the Chinese Communist Party.

My home state of Michigan is also considered a **MUST WIN** if Republicans are to have any hope of taking back the Senate. Now that you know a little more about me, I’d be honored if you could **[contribute $5, $10, or even $25](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=d90e0d4c893a497f8d1a90a44946b451&_e=G2LyecMUXBno4HgaCd1tCMLr75ctkTzxJaSDhdaE12Pk3uEdt4PChpQlVXNZ_xHZRFggK2hcsPfIo5dh7JY5TozJbuuY4tFZ1pxK8Y3NyvvGwMR3VonpWU520hJHe5-kjEKrtB368m8Frw6E38t1rMyN4_ekRnWHTf15ieJySeo6D4-nZsDGnHFe88SWGtkX8MzW92RIohXFzIWB42qURk8u9HaZqQ2MTUIcVbW5Eg7cKwLx0Pe6oBRGzJR1HJeosRomFacPSpM-Mguyfz0LMpkCxTsdd-wgTq1aqQaykArIYJK6u7m-QdWPADpFLUutNMfam9JqNaDsjHPaWZujHIBHVkIeCCD36sVE8eCP8crwdhnGipopMaji3yeBFUGNOnDUUBpuUfOInrEQn82dq5YI_rD8g1g6CpYH78CKrfY%3D)** so that we can flip Michigan and get to work. Thanks for your support.

Sincerely,

Fellow Conservative,

In 2021, the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee **approved more than $70 million in federal funds to pay for healthcare costs incurred by illegal migrants.** More recently, the Committee approved more than $90 million to care for migrants crossing our border illegally.

Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to **illegal migrants** due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states.

**My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman.**

**Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price.**

t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal migrants over American service members.

[**STOP THE THEFT
SIGN MY PETITION->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a99d53a70a424692ae13ebacbd3e0fa0&_e=5tThZ3Rfwm3DtgAW9C1SII0X8DJRvYB1G3WX7DAUy4urVCxST9tLfOdom_AKSpsqlEXA-nYAyfm9ot1L_6thI0wQlBaDoPxf7o50nqdyyBdeoYkTHyBKwJ1vft1AuV5DqWNtiXPIrdQeNn1LCjjjX10UTcRfONNBuXCZ3YlkDIlhyTb7jFxzj6hKXERIHkB6uE8UF4eH4OP1jymx3zjHTTTOiQjQvBqa8l6k9QwB4HIfZ4jNaTow9A2gpezz1u2g3A1VonsbCc9N2JziR9fumI1n4tsbrdwTDa4cxW6k3NUJp6nTPhZuPQS5uqWFol7dj2aYMqctDSMxnAh6klPGxJwJ9QFHIWkAxtR6GrBsXneq-LL7JeVCJ6k3YmMsSndI77UwNfZ79uiIGQt5ts3spPZ4nDTKr24E3n4EyJVFqUWdhwiIsebPsVpEmZRHh1I69lMFgFg0l6s2MDcJuY30vPluNscMxTfexxSod5mnYEX5LFmTYOd9nv5Jw3b9pcv1)

**This Democrat-funded program** has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect _**they may never get the care**_ they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans.

**Fellow Conservative, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities?**

**[Sign my petition](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a99d53a70a424692ae13ebacbd3e0fa0&_e=5tThZ3Rfwm3DtgAW9C1SII0X8DJRvYB1G3WX7DAUy4urVCxST9tLfOdom_AKSpsqlEXA-nYAyfm9ot1L_6thI0wQlBaDoPxf7o50nqdyyBdeoYkTHyBKwJ1vft1AuV5DqWNtiXPIrdQeNn1LCjjjX10UTcRfONNBuXCZ3YlkDIlhyTb7jFxzj6hKXERIHkB6uE8UF4eH4OP1jymx3zjHTTTOiQjQvBqa8l6k9QwB4HIfZ4jNaTow9A2gpezz1u2g3A1VonsbCc9N2JziR9fumI1n4tsbrdwTDa4cxW6k3NUJp6nTPhZuPQS5uqWFol7dj2aYMqctDSMxnAh6klPGxJwJ9QFHIWkAxtR6GrBsXndzWRy8KjX_DlkC57ZBSPWhxGmZ9ZRAQg13GTc58eQV8TB_ckUF9dixpwdMdU5x9vOzW2ZUR42cajhVIq3zgeAfv2z7h_o16jsOn3j5G99_fqjAkKJ3LzrXq77LhOaaFYmRR_YF_40ZTeVuGyP23OQ-)** demanding my opponent and Joe Biden forgo their government-funded healthcare services until every veteran who needs to be seen by a doctor is taken off the waitlist.

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

clean_body: Illegal migrants are being seen by healthcare providers at the expense of our veterans. | | Fellow Conservative, In 2021, the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee approved more than $70 million in federal funds to pay for healthcare costs incurred by illegal migrants. More recently, the Committee approved more than $90 million to care for migrants crossing our border illegally. Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to illegal migrants due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states. My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman. Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price. t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal migrants over American service members. This Democrat-funded program has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect they may never get the care they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans. Fellow Conservative, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities? - demanding my opponent and Joe Biden forgo their government-funded healthcare services until every veteran who needs to be seen by a doctor is taken off the waitlist. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate P.S. If this news makes your blood boil like it does mine, let me know by to strip Democrats of their health care until this program is defunded. | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: Let’s make Galentine's Day one for the books! | Tick tock! Can you hear it? That's the sound of us inching closer — T-minus 3 days! — to our Galentine's Day extravaganza with the Grace and Frankie cast! This virtual event will stream live and feature a rare cast reunion and table read of two classic episodes of, let’s be honest, one of the greatest television shows to ever grace our screens. = | = So, mark your calendars for February 13th , and set your alarms for 9PM ET / 6PM PT. We can’t wait to see you there. Onwards! Warm Regards,Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | |

[_**I really need everyone reading this to chip in $10 right away. Let me explain why.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78776587/454429124/-256211126?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-02-10_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzZkODc0MS00N2M4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bD4njNqmUSpIDr7GoXwPB7bq3t_lnx9ntzhbfAZrS3o=)

body:
I wanted to take a moment to tell you how proud I am of Abigail and her run for Governor of Virginia.

| Peter,

It’s Adam Spanberger, Abigail’s husband. I wanted to take a moment to tell you how proud I am of Abigail and her run for Governor of Virginia.

From serving and protecting our country at CIA to delivering results for Virginia in Congress — I’m incredibly proud of Abigail’s unwavering commitment to helping others. She’s a remarkable role model for our three girls.

That’s why I know she’s the right person to lead our Commonwealth forward. Right now, we’re at a crossroads, and I know that Abigail is committed to bringing people together and addressing the issues that matter most to Virginians.

This campaign won’t be easy, but she’s won tough races before, and I know she will do it again. Early grassroots support has been a key to Abigail’s success in the past, and this race will be no different.

She’s a remarkable role model for our three girls. That’s why I know she’s the right person to lead our Commonwealth forward. Right now, we’re at a crossroads, and I know that Abigail is committed to bringing people together and addressing the issues that matter most to Virginians. This campaign won’t be easy, but she’s won tough races before, and I know she will do it again. Early grassroots support has been a key to Abigail’s success in the past, and this race will be no different. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Adam * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. **The ultra-conservative Supreme Court heard arguments on a case that could put an end to vital programs such as Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, and more. **

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: I wrote legislation to raise Tennessee’s minimum wage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
Because NO ONE can live on $7.25 per hour.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78777387/454432022/-849459103?refcode=ea.f041eeae-48c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.f041eeae-48c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQxZWVhZS00OGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RE1EJqslHECO_YcJsKzhKYJfr5_sovx_4EIDr-73-Z0=&emci=81bae4ec-7ac7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=f041eeae-48c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=46764483)
---
Peter — Tennesseans deserve a living wage, no ifs, ands, or buts. Except they’re only guaranteed $7.25 an hour under federal law! That wage hasn’t been raised since 2009, and it’s not enough to pay the rent (much less save for the future) here in TN or anywhere. **_[So I introduced legislation to increase Tennessee’s federal wage to $20 — and Peter, I want you to make a citizen endorsement of my bill.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78777388/454432023/-1879222806?refcode=ea.f041eeae-48c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.f041eeae-48c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQxZWVhZS00OGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RE1EJqslHECO_YcJsKzhKYJfr5_sovx_4EIDr-73-Z0=&emci=81bae4ec-7ac7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=f041eeae-48c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=46764483)_** | [**ENDORSE GLORIA’S LEGISLATION**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78777389/454432024/-1879222806?refcode=ea.f041eeae-48c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.f041eeae-48c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQxZWVhZS00OGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RE1EJqslHECO_YcJsKzhKYJfr5_sovx_4EIDr-73-Z0=&emci=81bae4ec-7ac7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=f041eeae-48c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=46764483)
