No one who works a full day should have to worry about keeping a roof over their family’s heads. Not in this country. But housing costs are high, and minimum wage workers are struggling.
_Meanwhile, corporations are making bank._
It’s time to do better by working folks, Peter. I’m fighting to deliver a higher minimum wage for Tennesseans, and I’ll fight for a federal minimum wage increase as your next Senator.
**_[Until then, I’m asking you to stand with me and make a citizen endorsement of my legislation to raise the Tennessee minimum wage.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78777390/454432025/-1879222806?refcode=ea.f041eeae-48c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.f041eeae-48c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQxZWVhZS00OGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RE1EJqslHECO_YcJsKzhKYJfr5_sovx_4EIDr-73-Z0=&emci=81bae4ec-7ac7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=f041eeae-48c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=46764483)_**
Thanks so much for your support,
Gloria Johnson

| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

subject: The Monmouth County Democrats just endorsed our campaign

body:
Despite our opponent's massive war chest and deep political connections, our campaign won the endorsement from the Monmouth County Democrats.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78777858/454433893/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDM5OWRjNi00YWM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jaaLR9vEgGmU8yhpvJ-tW8vlYIJE-Hr9e7t-K5wMSoM=&emci=13c221de-76c7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=d0399dc6-4ac8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=26261389)

| | I have some big news to share. Now here’s the good news. This year, DeWine has no reason to go to the Super Bowl, so your taxpayer dollars are safe (for now). **The even better news? name: =?utf-8?Q?David?=
subject: "I hope the pilot is a transgender refugee"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo]( "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo")
body:
said no one ever |
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=f39b129b73&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Peter,

[Check out this video. ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=e7acbf653c&e=273c9a71fb)

Have you ever boarded a plane and said:

_“I hope the pilot is a transgender refugee”?_

Have you ever gone to the hospital and said:

_“I hope my medical team is incredibly diverse”?_

Have you ever moved to a new city and said:

_“I hope the police department hit its equity goals for the year.”?_

**Heck no!** I think any sane rational individual just wants the best and most qualified person for the job but radical Democrats want everything to be decided by skin color, gender “identity”, religion, immigration status, and sexual orientation.

---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=bfe07e9bf2&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Peter, : Steve Horsford doesn’t believe in Martin Luther King’s vision of people being judged by the content of their character instead of the color of their skin, and that’s just plain wrong. Which is why I need your help.

Can you spare just [$25, $50, or $10](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=85f9662320&e=273c9a71fb)0 to spread our message of sanity, reason, and the rule of law?
---
| | For America,

clean_body: said no one ever | | | | Peter, Have you ever boarded a plane and said: “I hope the pilot is a transgender refugee”? Have you ever gone to the hospital and said: “I hope my medical team is incredibly diverse”? Have you ever moved to a new city and said: “I hope the police department hit its equity goals for the year.”? Heck no! I think any sane rational individual just wants the best and most qualified person for the job but radical Democrats want everything to be decided by skin color, gender “identity”, religion, immigration status, and sexual orientation. | | Peter, : Steve Horsford doesn’t believe in Martin Luther King’s vision of people being judged by the content of their character instead of the color of their skin, and that’s just plain wrong. Which is why I need your help. Can you spare just to spread our message of sanity, reason, and the rule of law? | | For America, | | David Flippo, Lt. Col. (USAF Ret.) Candidate for U.S. Congress, NV-4 | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo" | | Copyright © 2024 Committee To Elect David Flippo, All rights reserved.

name: John Padora
subject: Times are tough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Folks, There’s a lot going on in the world right now. Abroad, at home, and right here in this race, there’s a lot of nonsense and a lot of chaos. But the question we have to ask ourselves is:
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=d716f7e43dbe4bf89a46b514b9fc4569&_e=tq9gJtZ9XbGn3e3sQ36hqC4LbQmcJscjH8sZZCt6MqIgqoDf_0dg7tkBq3QcyIJ_XQMnA6Q6m8WUgxl92Kvqx7tZeZJo8BD87Jye_tKn5qPtILvbswL03RBpeCakFxRQwHk-fz4dvhZ30PyUZTYVPcjl34Qz60ExdMuwT88TbRrOo-ieSSXEuTrwUebFWIwJQtuwTH6SE_bNKwCHUha3FltCFCBYpBYcBYs_dcYUso79FP8oXS_cSPUWiihZ6w4o1coelWQFZABGdJ61BqRoYn-k4ZbOEO_QMo5axKEORS11T3DI9cmV4It0DebE1PcCkTzUniKfomn2YCF-nUDmbBf1yG5WGzOehTrwBgymUN_t5t7jpKbqrtbFNgiaMGpKeZZ6mHI6xNNmnmxqdjFgmA%3D%3D) [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=d716f7e43dbe4bf89a46b514b9fc4569&_e=tq9gJtZ9XbGn3e3sQ36hqC4LbQmcJscjH8sZZCt6MqIgqoDf_0dg7tkBq3QcyIJ_XQMnA6Q6m8WUgxl92Kvqx7tZeZJo8BD87Jye_tKn5qPtILvbswL03RBpeCakFxRQwHk-fz4dvhZ30PyUZTYVPcjl34Qz60ExdMuwT88TbRrOo-ieSSXEuTrwUebFWIwJQtuwTH6SE_bNKwCHUha3FltCFCBYpBYcBYs_dcYUso79FP8oXS_cSPUWiihZ6w4ovLDVWuY_1MX4pYT2A2t9vOIhiFjv-ujxS1-MtfZCwAusk1HLG6loo2Bsbbb5K2QRYce3scPpagbMcyP2ZFKgLsBLFQYYE3Y_n3xovG2e-oQiTHnp5k8OpofJL1ODkEG8r6Y07jqnI_uJeCUf2rlFBA%3D%3D) Folks, There’s a lot going on in the world right now. Abroad, at home, and right here in this race, there’s a lot of nonsense and a lot of chaos. **But the question we have to ask ourselves is: “who is trying to mitigate that chaos and bring some calm to our lives and who is trying to perpetuate further chaos because they benefit from it?”** Someone like Lauren Boebert unfortunately fits the profile of someone who doesn’t want the chaos to end. She doesn’t want a Congressional bill to pass addressing the border because if that happened, it would be harder for her to scream and yell about how Biden is allowing an invasion of Texas or whatever she’s on about right now. I feel as concerned for the future as you do, it’s why I decided to jump into this race. And yes, Boebert entering the race has changed the dynamics, but it hasn’t altered my motivation for wanting to represent our community. **Congressional Republicans hold an incredibly small majority, and nothing would be sweeter than flipping the House by beating Lauren Boebert.** [**So, if you can, please donate to my campaign today to bring us closer to making flipping the House blue a reality.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=d716f7e43dbe4bf89a46b514b9fc4569&_e=tq9gJtZ9XbGn3e3sQ36hqC4LbQmcJscjH8sZZCt6MqIgqoDf_0dg7tkBq3QcyIJ_XQMnA6Q6m8WUgxl92Kvqx7tZeZJo8BD87Jye_tKn5qPtILvbswL03RBpeCakFxRQwHk-fz4dvhZ30PyUZTYVPcjl34Qz60ExdMuwT88TbRrOo-ieSSXEuTrwUebFWIwJQtuwTH6SE_bNKwCHUha3FltCFCBYpBYcBYs_dcYUso79FP8oXS_cSPUWiihZ6w4oIYY6_t_eSBi5C_Jok34XGj-I1b3eDtvvoCbiwjb8khiPfcUh4sOnodbt6OLNoUSRRlDx1L-1ThlSoUco1pskL87pb1gQEES9MZUnsKsI6adEYs_7LM6tHGrcXZipKZA1BQoFNZObdedObUyqy5v_PA%3D%3D) **[DONATE](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=d716f7e43dbe4bf89a46b514b9fc4569&_e=tq9gJtZ9XbGn3e3sQ36hqC4LbQmcJscjH8sZZCt6MqIgqoDf_0dg7tkBq3QcyIJ_XQMnA6Q6m8WUgxl92Kvqx7tZeZJo8BD87Jye_tKn5qPtILvbswL03RBpeCakFxRQwHk-fz4dvhZ30PyUZTYVPcjl34Qz60ExdMuwT88TbRrOo-ieSSXEuTrwUebFWIwJQtuwTH6SE_bNKwCHUha3FltCFCBYpBYcBYs_dcYUso79FP8oXS_cSPUWiihZ6w4oxtCnWOVyUcFdxC57jGHlvxGMrmybljN6EtqXob3F_Zp4twgeJSauMdaMteqHvPEAT7Vjz7blCkTkXTVepMGjDW_f5fkLq96JWhKotKMckaM9cicWcGOZV6o6ZrNZH0p9eER5vN2wrhNiTC-9xrSOBQ%3D%3D)** Thank you so much, John Padora I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. [WEBSITE](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=d716f7e43dbe4bf89a46b514b9fc4569&_e=tq9gJtZ9XbGn3e3sQ36hqNLe4pHXqyB67EG0cqECapktL7nrQW2NCBLrNmWMYFeVYb0cVPhQP4o6iqOj-1XgSmOwDoaN_G-9CNoLsxXkmWz8FrmhFEAaSXwmC3HgVAEBC2DQ1U-Bx3tO5tVUYvNJtfqQESn36uc7SQo4_EN001wWkWb8PTH6IOmkQAhsWx-f51l3uUH9vXJCWB_j5Itl9Q%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=d716f7e43dbe4bf89a46b514b9fc4569&_e=tq9gJtZ9XbGn3e3sQ36hqC4LbQmcJscjH8sZZCt6MqIgqoDf_0dg7tkBq3QcyIJ_XQMnA6Q6m8WUgxl92Kvqx7tZeZJo8BD87Jye_tKn5qPtILvbswL03RBpeCakFxRQwHk-fz4dvhZ30PyUZTYVPcjl34Qz60ExdMuwT88TbRrOo-ieSSXEuTrwUebFWIwJQtuwTH6SE_bNKwCHUha3FltCFCBYpBYcBYs_dcYUso6zzWX7M_J0f4BKCZfY6Gf1fPGYg42CUQI4sn-_9znbDgykMUTgDeBG-IbQzyQtEhkfXW12hhXz_vhszkS6r4crOw8tGWAgcnTHz6MluwFnVC3T-Djz-GTqyatsnlz9Gz2y0sNoDbO1mOnh7rzulm5r9Yz1NUIBGjebo6pRBSAP2TpxT6jNY0njGmKtnV0zCNM%3D) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

| The FEC reports came out last week, disclosing the financial contributions of all candidates. My opponents are backed by some of the deepest pockets of Michigan Republican politics, including their own! Each of my opponents received financing from some of the most well-known Republicans or cut themselves a hefty check for tens of thousands of dollars.

For decades the ultra-wealthy in West Michigan have controlled politics–influencing gerrymandering, funding extremist groups at the Capitol, and efforts to restrict women’s reproductive choices.

_**But no more.**_

In 2022, we changed the course of history by flipping this seat and electing the first Democratic woman EVER from West Michigan to Congress. You know how? We did it with the support of small-dollar contributions from folks like you.

**I’m one of the strongest supporters of campaign finance reform you’ll find.** I don’t come from money or a political dynasty. I hate how much time I have to spend away from my legislating, parenting, and connecting with my constituents about their issues to...fundraise. It was never supposed to be this way. That’s why I support legislative efforts to reform the system and get us back to work for the people – but we need a Democratic majority to do it. So, until then, I’ll keep working with grit and determination to win again the way I won last year. But I can’t do it alone.

subject: Vets may never get the care they need
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:

Fellow Conservative,

In 2021, the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee **approved more than $70 million in federal funds to pay for healthcare costs incurred by illegal migrants.** More recently, the Committee approved more than $90 million to care for migrants crossing our border illegally.

Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to **illegal migrants** due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states.

**My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman.**

**Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price.**

t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal migrants over American service members.

[**STOP THE THEFT
SIGN MY PETITION->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a06a51cb8cd5463aa1af7f91a52aac7c&_e=VYp7Bygj4Xq2-8VUR15u_-nCKo8cG-1SWgWRalyJRMdkimEm_bI13SbIz57dAXeKFwVwNg3jXprfEPGlI0sd3GVbpD3npfSllX53XQQGKVl0OqeF9LEiVrRhBs4DK2LrtY71QoTMifqN_ZjHc_xANlUuWS7hZD4DeuIobgdIaUB_WfKbhtgV0TWLl-ewnCryRd9IiKcCY3LzV9l97682jAJuo1IdxIxRtbjZfzjbKUaYqyc8phFc-hrDHtZrIAc5QmKei3jdN70sp-jm2gOaVBa5nlsxl7dazTo5bLsVYCPL-fVCPh0N0LfVpmjRk_QMO_1QJdU7Y_iqN1i0ODF7LeqY8oqZh_YZncPWQ1TW-a0rkOzUpGcZ93OlUlXbbmh1DUaYagGoEgVZd6QI16WBuWNvrybHe4Kcsm-1jqjuXCtPQR_U_2nf0Ir1UOt-OLofbVk1Z2ObdG_vxmdxGZ6SZWlRMa68LxBmzeIP05bcR-kpjMoDjz-sK0Sc354Q38Pm)

**This Democrat-funded program** has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect _**they may never get the care**_ they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans.

**Fellow Conservative, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities?**

**[Sign my petition](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a06a51cb8cd5463aa1af7f91a52aac7c&_e=VYp7Bygj4Xq2-8VUR15u_-nCKo8cG-1SWgWRalyJRMdkimEm_bI13SbIz57dAXeKFwVwNg3jXprfEPGlI0sd3GVbpD3npfSllX53XQQGKVl0OqeF9LEiVrRhBs4DK2LrtY71QoTMifqN_ZjHc_xANlUuWS7hZD4DeuIobgdIaUB_WfKbhtgV0TWLl-ewnCryRd9IiKcCY3LzV9l97682jAJuo1IdxIxRtbjZfzjbKUaYqyc8phFc-hrDHtZrIAc5QmKei3jdN70sp-jm2gOaVBa5nlsxl7dazTo5bLsVYCPL-fVCPh0N0LfVpmjRk_QMO_1QJdU7Y_iqN1i0ODF7LeqY8oqZh_YZncPWQ1TW-a2cklreOc-p-5G2DzGOTxaJFIjQagEShg8WNqYOc77AeMs-WsxJIolQWWHictKRonz-buWfXnka51aqZhQqT1Qj1cpC1VeX1QOYQn9_nrroP6g6fy5FoXeefVGIQhHLfu7uRMO7G1s3nVr9_Cx_rwtj)** demanding my opponent and Joe Biden forgo their government-funded healthcare services until every veteran who needs to be seen by a doctor is taken off the waitlist.

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

clean_body: Thanks to Democrat Jon Tester, illegal immigrants are being given access to VA health care services before Veterans | | Fellow Conservative, In 2021, the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee approved more than $70 million in federal funds to pay for healthcare costs incurred by illegal migrants. More recently, the Committee approved more than $90 million to care for migrants crossing our border illegally. Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to illegal migrants due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states. My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman. Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price. t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal migrants over American service members. This Democrat-funded program has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect they may never get the care they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans. Fellow Conservative, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities? demanding my opponent and Joe Biden forgo their government-funded healthcare services until every veteran who needs to be seen by a doctor is taken off the waitlist. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate P.S. If this news makes your blood boil like it does mine, let me know by to strip Democrats of their health care until this program is defunded. | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. | | Dear Freedom Fighters,

First off, this weekly update is longer than normal. I am trying to keep you all in the loop at least once a week, and didn't want to send it during the Super Bowl game.

Earlier in the week, the Senate Committee on Elections passed out [Senate Bill 1374](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=362d9fd7db&e=a7ab36849c), a bill I sponsored to ban foreign donations in our elections administration 6-2 with one Democrat voting with us. When asked by the local [press](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7bffae7455&e=a7ab36849c) about this bill, I said, “SB 1374 is a bill in support of free, fair, and transparent elections. Leading up to the 2020 elections, billionaires and big tech played an outsized influence in Arizona’s elections. In 2021, the Arizona legislature passed a law prohibiting election offices from receiving private monies for preparing, administering, or conducting an election. In October 2023, in Louisiana, the voters overwhelmingly voted to ban foreign funding of their elections by a vote of 72.57% in favor. When SB 1374 is signed into law, it will send a strong message that Arizona’s elections aren’t for sale by foreign billionaires.”

At Tuesday's press conference I stood with [Paula Scanlan](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c4f8f527bb&e=a7ab36849c) and other lawmakers to protect women and girls. I co-sponsored [Senate Bill 1628](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=caa24ef9a4&e=a7ab36849c) because I believe it is crucial to protect the safety of women and girls in Arizona in private spaces, like locker rooms and showers, as well as sports teams. Under SB 1628, “sex” is defined as a person’s biological sex, either male or female, for all purposes of state law. [Here’s](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d7ecd5eafc&e=a7ab36849c) how a local news outlet reported on it.

Then, the following morning the Senate Committee on Government held a hearing on [SB 1370](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a3e2a767d5&e=a7ab36849c) (a.k.a. [free the lemons](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8bf6c1cc24&e=a7ab36849c) bill). I met someone from Libertas Institute in November 2020 who mentioned this bill to me about protecting youth entrepreneurship. After getting appointed to the State Senate, I was reconnected with the Libertas Institute and during the interim we worked on this bill together. On Wednesday, an eloquent 10-year-old named Aiden from Peoria came down to the Capitol to testify in favor of the bill. You can watch his testimony [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=09987829bd&e=a7ab36849c). It was voted out of committee on a party line vote. During discussion on the bill, Democrats spoke about the need for regulation even on kids’ lemonade stands. Later on Wednesday, while serving on the Senate Committee on Education the chairman allowed me to hear [SB 1369](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=edcb4cb512&e=a7ab36849c) which requires public schools to post its school safety data on its website that it already reported to the US Department of Education. That’s right, the schools don’t have to create anything new, I am just asking for them to display the same information on each public school’s website. Can you believe the Democrats are **all **opposed to this common-sense measure?

Finally, Thursday was a very busy day. I filled in for a Senator who was unable to serve on the Senate Committee on Judiciary, and the chairman had already assigned three of my bills, including [SB 1364](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=063d016bdb&e=a7ab36849c), [SB 1436](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e249d42ec4&e=a7ab36849c), and [SCR 1021](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4271c67272&e=a7ab36849c).
Here’s what happened in committee:
* SB 1364 would allow a probationer to be transferred to another county in Arizona if they have an employment opportunity or housing, caregiver responsibilities, or an offer of employment or housing. It was voted out of committee unanimously.
* SB 1436 amends [“Kayleigh’s Law”](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=cdb60145ba&e=a7ab36849c) to include victims of strangulation, voyeurism, and stalking as eligible for protection under this law. It was voted out of committee unanimously.
* SCR 1021 refers this to the ballot so an adult who is convicted of sex trafficking of a minor shall be sentenced to natural life imprisonment and is not eligible for any form of release. It was voted out of committee 5-2.

On Thursday afternoon, the House and Senate also resolved some election-related issues by passing HB 2785, and the brokered deal with the counties included moving up the primary by one week to July 30th. You can read some background about it at [Arizona Daily Independent](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f6f65d63c2&e=a7ab36849c), but here are some highlights from the Press Release circulated by the Senate Republicans: HB 2785 corrects unintended election deadline conflicts stemming from 2022 legislation signed into law with overwhelming bipartisan support to improve voter confidence on tight races. As part of the reforms outlined in HB 2785: County elections officials will be provided with an extra 19 days in the primary election calendar and an extra 17 days in the general election calendar in order to meet several important federal deadlines
* Men and women who are serving in our armed forces overseas will be guaranteed the opportunity to cast a ballot in our elections.
* For the first time since mail-in ballots were introduced in Arizona, signature verification standards will be enshrined into statute.
This year, a hard count of early ballots dropped off at the polls by voters on election day will be required to improve security and confidence that all lawful votes will be counted accurately.
* In 2026, voters may bring their early ballots to the polls on election day and have them counted
immediately after showing identitication, allowing voters to skip signature verification so that results can be tabulated in a prompt manner and the correct winner declared in a timelier fashion.
* In 2026, voters will have more choices for polling locations since state and county buildings will be designated as official sites

Next week, several of my bills are receiving a hearing in the Senate Committees on Finance and Commerce, Elections, Transportation, Technology and Missing Children, Government, and Judiciary. One bill to keep an eye on is SCR 1042 supporting the people and government of the State of Texas' constitutional right in its efforts to secure our nation's southern border against the current invasion.

**ICYMI**

I am sure you have seen the paid circulators near retail outlets and public libraries over the past few months collecting signatures for the abortion initiative. Sadly, when asked most of them cannot explain what is included in the language. There are countless individuals circulating the “Arizona Abortion Access Act” to place on the November 5, 2024, Arizona ballot to allow unrestricted, unregulated abortion on demand. You can read it for yourself [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=803708cf82&e=a7ab36849c).

To counter this extreme effort, a campaign called [“It Goes Too Far”](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0620b534b0&e=a7ab36849c) has been established. I recently attended a brainstorming meeting on their efforts, and here are some of my takeaways:
* This constitutional amendment if passed would amend the Arizona Constitution **and** cannot be adjusted by lawmakers to address any future concerns.
* The current safeguards and protections in place right now to protect girls and women seeking an abortion from an abortion clinic would be removed.
* If passed, it would remove the required medical doctor who is trained to handle and detect any complications.
* It prohibits punishment for people who take girls to get an abortion, so if a child is sex trafficked, her trafficker could take the victim to get an abortion to cover their crime, and her parents would never be notified, and they could not be prosecuted.

In 2022, the Arizona Legislature passed a 15-week (that’s almost four months) limit bill that was signed into law. If this initiative passes, it overturns the current 15-week abortion limit, while overturning the current common-sense regulations by allowing unregulated abortion on demand up until the moment of birth for the mother’s mental health, an undefined term that has included all factors related to the woman’s well-being, including stress or anxiety.

I agree with the counter campaign, this initiative **goes too far**. The way this initiative is drafted it no longer would require a medical doctor to perform or provide the abortion. The language would allow unqualified health care professionals to perform abortions, including chiropractors, podiatrists, and massage therapists, and so on.

**Important PC Info.**
Precinct Committeemen in Maricopa County can turn their nomination papers and nomination petitions in between March 2 - April 1, 2024. The primary has been moved up to July 30th to ensure our military and overseas voters receive their absentee ballots.

If you notice a theme in my bills, I care about the future of our children. I believe they are our most precious resource, and they are truly worth saving! I want to protect victims. And of course, I truly believe transparency is paramount in having fair and honest elections. You would think these action items would all be bi-partisan issues, but sadly, they aren’t. I need your help in securing a place on the primary election ballot. If you live in my legislative district, please sign my [online nomination petition](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e9a59b4a54&e=a7ab36849c). If you’d like to help us, write, post cards, please reply to this email and let me know you’re ready to write. If you can [donate](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8557e8e768&e=a7ab36849c), please consider donating to help us save the legislature in 2024. If I lose my race in November, there is a very good chance we lose the Senate and House. What does that mean? The Democrats will pass bills to turn Arizona into California overnight, including repealing Empowerment Scholarship accounts, eliminating Arizona’s “Right to Work” status, changing course over our current low flat income tax and drastically raising rates to levels higher than they’ve ever been, overturning our pro-Second Amendment laws, and of course, you can’t forget they want to raise our minimum wage while will be the death kneel for our small business successes. Let's not take that risk. _Please help us succeed in 2024!_

I hope you have a great weekend. I am just hoping for a few hours to canvass a precinct instead of getting drenched.

Take care,
Shawnna

We need to act fast, Peter

In 2022, Republicans came within just a few points of winning this seat — and 2024 likely won’t be any different. Extremist Republicans in DC know that. _That’s why they’ve already named Emilia one of their top targets in 2024._

**But that’s not all. Jim Jordan knows that winning in OH-13 is one of the Republicans’ best opportunities to expand their razor-thin majority in Congress.

And he knows that if he and his cronies are able to expand their grip on power, they’ll be in an even stronger position to advance their extreme agenda.

That means they’ll be one step closer to passing a national abortion ban, restricting voting rights, undermining our democracy, cutting Social Security and Medicare — _and so much more._

It’s not too late to stop them, Peter. **But we need to act fast and stand together,_now more than ever before._**

[**That starts with ensuring we have the resources we need to compete with our radical opponents. Can we count on you to help by chipping in $10 or more right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78779625/454439510/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.10_b1_ouvts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWQwYzUwZS01MWM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WQsii3pDvcxisTo5isBgWzzbV5Wb4g8rlt2Wnpg0mE0=)

name: Team Kennedy Faith Team
subject: Sunday Prayer Circle for RFK Jr.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
We are joining together on Sunday, February 11th at 2 pm PST to celebrate and hold high our great American Presidential candidate, RFK, Jr.!

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_7&n=1)
---
Peter -- What a potent kick-off of the Sunday Prayer Circle for RFK, Jr. last Sunday! Thank you for your enthusiastic support!

Just as Sunday, February 11th is the Super Bowl where many come together to celebrate the American sport of football, we are joining together on[ **Sunday, February 11 at 2 pm PST**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk-7Mb6lE5uIHFHjDzmPEvfZ2zm9HA1wiNemIxMpCx3pmuL06i6Nkym1HJbmUMnGa41XD0mwrJp_Ial68zgY3uoo&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_7&n=2) to celebrate and hold high our great American Presidential candidate, Robert F. Kennedy Jr.

Prayer is such a powerful technology! We gather every Sunday to surround our future President RFK Jr., future First Lady Cheryl Hines, their families, and
Team Kennedy in prayer.

An African proverb states, _"If you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together."_ As we are all united in support of RFK Jr. going all the way to the White House, your presence at the Prayer Circle and our collective prayers matter!

Below are details for Sunday's Prayer Circle for RFK Jr.:
**Day:** Sunday, February 11
**Time:** 2 pm PST.
**Zoom link:** (_this is the only Zoom link for you to use_)
[**https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZAqc-GgqzIoG9PGwGzQKvT_VA_56eeet5Rl**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk-7Mb6lE5uIHFHjDzmPEvfZ2zm9HA1wiNemIxMpCx3pmuL06i6Nkym1HJbmUMnGa41XD0mwrJp_Ial68zgY3uoo&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_7&n=3)
Please invite your friends and family to join us! A graphic for Sunday's Prayer Circle for RFK Jr. is below that you can share.
**Below you'll find the recording from Sunday, February 4th's Prayer Circle for RFK, Jr.**
[https://us02web.zoom.us/rec/share/ZzD6CkQUka_e57RrO0LpFGcF9grKQf_KKtIkX5jQh0CJYLKgzOkWJwCTRODZQ5Mo.NbrNWTizvUZ6TaAm Passcode: &xZ5*gT1](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk424bvP-RMDDDJpHo5rn5XF91qmL073QtH3fgkRwPjqBXub1-7Tf-v3L7NTYDX575sbqZX63YyJi7md2M2WWIWIFsiwmjLpT-s4dKDNcQxxio8vwx3-Azsl96Xfat7ubyWl5ttg-CsUiChHWp-ENJrkEDF4YK0QpzThncgvp20mj&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_7&n=4)

Stay connected to us at [faith@teamkennedy.com](mailto:faith@teamkennedy.com) for inspiration. We are here for you!

See you **[Sunday, February 11 at 2 pm PST](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk-7Mb6lE5uIHFHjDzmPEvfZ2zm9HA1wiNemIxMpCx3pmuL06i6Nkym1HJbmUMnGa41XD0mwrJp_Ial68zgY3uoo&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_7&n=5)**!

Peace and richest blessings! Team Kennedy
[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_7&n=6)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_7&n=7) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! name: Giffords.org
subject: We can’t let Donald Trump back in the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Electing Donald Trump would put the NRA back in the Oval Office and more guns in our communities.
#

Friends -
Last night, Donald Trump’s speech at the NRA’s Great American Outdoor Show made it very clear:
**Electing Donald Trump would put the NRA back in the Oval Office and more guns in our communities.**
[**Will you rush in a $3 contribution to fuel our work to defeat Donald Trump this November and send a clear message that our movement for gun safety is stronger than ever?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240210-1-30&t=1&akid=7629%2E3935704%2EnoIhwe)
**[CHIP IN NOW >>](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240210-1-30&t=2&akid=7629%2E3935704%2EnoIhwe)**
In his speech, Trump said gun dealers like him "more than anybody in the world."
That’s because he’d rather keep the NRA happy by advancing their “guns everywhere” agenda than keep our communities safe from gun violence. Trump has already shown us where his priorities lie: during his presidency, gun homicides skyrocketed by a whopping 34% while he did nothing.
**Lives are on the line. We can’t let Donald Trump back in the White House.**
[**Please, donate $3 today to make sure we don’t have four more years of Donald Trump.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240210-1-30&t=3&akid=7629%2E3935704%2EnoIhwe)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78780506/454441738/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk773-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGY2MjE4ZDgtNTNjOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D5uOK8QDyTs9JHxE4avjzRqclA3AU7ULyyD_pcRkL_w=)
**Listen, voters in Florida have a message for Rick Scott: _Ya no más._ Enough is enough.**
He's spent his time in Washington pushing a dangerous, out-of-touch agenda with absolutely _zero_ regard for the families that he swore to serve. Now, he's failing and trying to hide from his horrible record with lie after lie.
But he's not going to get away with it this time. **The tides are turning, and Florida has had enough.**
We’ve had enough of his attacks on Social Security and Medicare. _**Ya no más.**_
We’ve had enough of his radical schemes to ban abortions. _**Ya no más.**_
We’ve had enough of his hateful, self-serving politics. _**Ya no más.**_
We’ve had enough of his lies. _**Ya no más.**_
**We've had enough of Rick Scott. And this November, we're going to vote him out.**
**The latest poll shows that this race is already neck and neck; our campaign is polling 1 point ahead! But Rick Scott has already shelled out $3 MILLION to run attack ads to retake the lead. He's spent his time in Washington pushing a dangerous, out-of-touch agenda with absolutely zero regard for the families that he swore to serve. Now, he's failing and trying to hide from his horrible record with lie after lie. But he's not going to get away with it this time. The tides are turning, and Florida has had enough. We’ve had enough of his attacks on Social Security and Medicare. Ya no más. We’ve had enough of his radical schemes to ban abortions. Ya no más. We’ve had enough of his hateful, self-serving politics. Ya no más. We’ve had enough of his lies. Ya no más. We've had enough of Rick Scott. And this November, we're going to vote him out. The latest poll shows that this race is already neck and neck; our campaign is polling 1 point ahead! But Rick Scott has already shelled out $3 MILLION to run attack ads to retake the lead. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

Friend **– **I worked many jobs to put myself through college: painting houses, stocking shelves, and serving coffee. It took me seven years (and endless cups of coffee!), but I got that degree. **From serving coffee to serving OR-06 in Congress, I’ve never lost sight of what my parents taught me: that through hard work, better was possible.** **[So, can I count on you to chip in $5 (the price of a cup of coffee) today? clean_body: we have no time to waste | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | For over a year, the American people have faced chaos, crisis and confusion caused by extreme Republicans. Team Extreme spent months protecting serial fraudster George Santos. Now we have a real shot at bringing actual representation to New York’s 3rd Congressional District by electing Tom on February 13. Peter, we’re just 3 days away from the special election and although this is our first big test of 2024, our work doesn’t stop there. We’re off to the races all across the country building the groundwork to take back the House majority. We only need to win five more seats to take back The People’s House and helping Tom in NY-03’s special election can get us one closer. I’m counting on your support. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Tom Suozzi and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Keep the faith, Hakeem The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Team Swalwell
subject: 🔵 Project 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-feb2024-fr-february?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-feb2024-fr-february?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Friend,

Abortion rights activists for decades have chanted: “We won’t go back.” But thanks to Donald Trump, his extremist view on abortion, and his poorly chosen SCOTUS justices, we have gone back.

What’s worse? Donald Trump is traveling the country — with his criminal record following — bragging and taking credit for the reversal of Roe v Wade.

Friend, we know this is just the beginning for MAGA extremists when it comes to abortion. Across the country, state after state rushed to pass legislative abortion bans. Now, the news is frequented with story after story about the consequences of extremist bans on abortion access.

Well, we’re here to tell you that if Donald Trump is re-elected, a national abortion ban is at the forefront of the MAGA agenda — aka “Project 2025.”

Meanwhile, Eric is fighting tooth and nail to flip the House and elect leaders in Congress who will protect abortion rights — a.k.a. codify Roe v. Wade .

These are very different visions for our country, friend. But we know that right now, we’re much closer to an America that looks like some dystopian society when it comes to abortion rights, all thanks to the man who is leading the GOP presidential nomination...

Can we count on your support to elect Eric and other leaders across the country in 2024 who will protect our freedoms — like abortion — and simultaneously fight back against MAGA? [] Friend, Abortion rights activists for decades have chanted: “We won’t go back.” But thanks to Donald Trump, his extremist view on abortion, and his poorly chosen SCOTUS justices, we have gone back. What’s worse? Donald Trump is traveling the country — with his criminal record following — bragging and taking credit for the reversal of Roe v Wade. Friend, we know this is just the beginning for MAGA extremists when it comes to abortion. Across the country, state after state rushed to pass legislative abortion bans. Now, the news is frequented with story after story about the consequences of extremist bans on abortion access. Well, we’re here to tell you that if Donald Trump is re-elected, a national abortion ban is at the forefront of the MAGA agenda — aka “Project 2025.” Meanwhile, Eric is fighting tooth and nail to flip the House and elect leaders in Congress who will protect abortion rights — a.k.a. codify Roe v. Wade . These are very different visions for our country, friend. Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Peter, But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up. **[Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3252703da2c543c885e1d0ecc7fb2eaf&_e=MBJkMVzIEB5FWXjirxXDSi8_g91pwfmJkj1uYi5195gDp5u3CXxpXU3AeH84oBymnSsR67XDgNhCiD1GIekeBe7io9LKUbcf9yq2PJpIdWp7BwpK529XaI7LDInQQHfxaSaFpCki6NH7ysVH0_qWvK37tSro6WPU0M0GshPyALdUgj3CsPwwdG0xMbrtJaWXOi72nN65bZQP73Tfjjy4faOF8TY-D-WL7gPN9jVCKMYey5XEhUNJyYCjd9UgQMaa47S2FTQL7-OPuoTHgrxQJAsUjKKsL47E49rNFlYef-UZ8kF10PpPVPeJllDjb1bFP0tDKb5Sgpz810tmjnE5NZw1frPgxu74XREBMkClnUjpJzLpc045RRRsOWzPnCt9CBLx7oN75jAcrVafbx6pwpdOCQs0wtZARrBKoCtazYdgHtD2FUb_zp4SwiNbPVOt)** My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. **[Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3252703da2c543c885e1d0ecc7fb2eaf&_e=MBJkMVzIEB5FWXjirxXDSi8_g91pwfmJkj1uYi5195gDp5u3CXxpXU3AeH84oBymnSsR67XDgNhCiD1GIekeBe7io9LKUbcf9yq2PJpIdWp7BwpK529XaI7LDInQQHfxaSaFpCki6NH7ysVH0_qWvK37tSro6WPU0M0GshPyALdUgj3CsPwwdG0xMbrtJaWXOi72nN65bZQP73Tfjjy4faOF8TY-D-WL7gPN9jVCKMYey5XEhUNJyYCjd9UgQMaa47S2FTQL7-OPuoTHgrxQJAsUjKKsL47E49rNFlYef-XEPS8kMoWMtDPv0kgBF1kol2EOqFLM1fb-UJ5ohrJJ_TsaQ_ysfcjc_SPt1C5ZXBL0_XY975KKePyJEbjec9T5ltxkraBG57AFwkrRY2EAy8W0VYQj4szX_ZLxEdnQHF-G5o6NJIpwFL-s3xON-azN)**** ** Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. **[That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3252703da2c543c885e1d0ecc7fb2eaf&_e=MBJkMVzIEB5FWXjirxXDSi8_g91pwfmJkj1uYi5195gDp5u3CXxpXU3AeH84oBymnSsR67XDgNhCiD1GIekeBe7io9LKUbcf9yq2PJpIdWp7BwpK529XaI7LDInQQHfxaSaFpCki6NH7ysVH0_qWvK37tSro6WPU0M0GshPyALdUgj3CsPwwdG0xMbrtJaWXOi72nN65bZQP73Tfjjy4faOF8TY-D-WL7gPN9jVCKMYey5XEhUNJyYCjd9UgQMaa47S2FTQL7-OPuoTHgrxQJAsUjKKsL47E49rNFlYef-Vk9BcQYtUXrkcD0J4dappHA2u8OrlOBWIXjZ9KpZUl7ezQF3PS09Aiczdw7K8u92yQX7dtU0zML0h7o8WZ0VazZL9j9a3wDsNk41fCPrBOBj-fxS06t_eLiBxlfd9nyqpVBa4xYxwCL5EgJXLkN0_M)** The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. **[So please help me out this one time, Peter:](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3252703da2c543c885e1d0ecc7fb2eaf&_e=MBJkMVzIEB5FWXjirxXDSi8_g91pwfmJkj1uYi5195gDp5u3CXxpXU3AeH84oBymnSsR67XDgNhCiD1GIekeBe7io9LKUbcf9yq2PJpIdWp7BwpK529XaI7LDInQQHfxaSaFpCki6NH7ysVH0_qWvK37tSro6WPU0M0GshPyALdUgj3CsPwwdG0xMbrtJaWXOi72nN65bZQP73Tfjjy4faOF8TY-D-WL7gPN9jVCKMYey5XEhUNJyYCjd9UgQMaa47S2FTQL7-OPuoTHgrxQJAsUjKKsL47E49rNFlYef-WY01aCziOFdNTw6Qz8Kn0nnEmLaq2Bj_h33ZQnRcDdHBquSqp7_rG7o-QkZK-b2dG82gMBh8agEqR0gW29L-wunKM1s8-z478XRZ75NOzmacl7ZjtKgASBKbJnPz60HstseYeomp-2wr2dTutzNDV2) **

clean_body: Peter...| | | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Peter, But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | | Peter, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today. I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless,Jim Banks Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

I will never stop fighting for our great state, and I promise to never stop fighting for YOU, Peter. Our mission to RESCUE AMERICA from the disastrous Biden Administration is just getting started, and I’m grateful to have the support of such a great organization. Across our nation, the radical Democrats have ruined just about everything they’ve put their woke, corrupt hands on. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Happy Lunar New Year!
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78781225/454443853/240141381?refcode=AU_MKH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20240210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTIwMDc1Ni01N2M4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7PBvhu4QBJO_EhLZuI3uXsEB1de8BEekY_T9wsNK8jU=) Aloha Peter, This Lunar New Year we welcome the Year of the Dragon — a symbol of good luck, strength, and justice. In Hawaii, Lunar New Year has always been a great additional celebration to ring in a new year and celebrate cultures that have made Hawaii — and the rest of the United States — home. Referred to as Spring Festival in many Asian countries, Lunar New Year is celebrated with community activities and cultural performances. This is especially a joyous time for families to come together and celebrate the occasion. To all those who are celebrating, I wish you a healthy, prosperous and happy new year! Mahalo, Mazie | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78781226/454443854/240141381?refcode=AU_MKH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20240210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTIwMDc1Ni01N2M4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7PBvhu4QBJO_EhLZuI3uXsEB1de8BEekY_T9wsNK8jU=)

Fellow Conservative,

In 2021, the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee **approved more than $70 million in federal funds to pay for healthcare costs incurred by illegal migrants.** More recently, the Committee approved more than $90 million to care for migrants crossing our border illegally.

Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to **illegal migrants** due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states.

**My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman.**

**Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price.**

t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal migrants over American service members.

[**STOP THE THEFT
SIGN MY PETITION->**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=43a5287595b3415990bdb81feaf5d0c9&_e=u3aT0QTmj3qBdGleISkoIcWGq5I03wk4LJjidrFHNpe7JRUM8kbhYgUuaZARz2NXFFmAAEigAZ8dNfMHvpSjHnrvpW48DwzShEz1kAU6ODL2ReSiJT7Jnus8ZtBnWpcqyIjlWIscs5BiP9nk1Szlqfc3dzmw08l-4nS6cM5WcWsj_qjts3nyqOln_fPA2VYt0QxESFHwjBbdxBMNteZAZwGoUzkJQf4GQDi5OLwAGK_wiShHvpQqW3W-813ddpbAgXhku9G9rMgOjDS1O-1sKofNQZnucJptS14xiLf_NnQb8w7BqaHYNOnwlhH1AYVomcnRTZ3RwBulJfMdqa9ARBg9PXZouHXeSlyKzpv1DJ0_AMjMrYj4oMZdGOR670EXLyrTnIJo7pGxbJ_TarKN_COU_gqdzama85d55AnY2bNStrEA1dtWbjBJS4A2f6Hh_ViGpzVVZlaEg0pL7SUbba0nYi2oqWsWNylYfT8egOqJP0MOA5eecxjk61HUa1ST)

**This Democrat-funded program** has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect _**they may never get the care**_ they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans.

**Fellow Conservative, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities?**

**Liz Cheney just made our day!!!** Now that Trump has been removed from ballots in Colorado and Maine, _voters across the country are DEMANDING that he is removed from their state’s ballot._

**So we’re launching an urgent petition to show that local voters want Trump removed from their ballot!** [**We need you to make your voice heard! Add your name to demand Trump is disqualified from running for office »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/14th_amen_pet?source=FFR_20240210_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20781%2E4449941%2EYwsSDO) | [600 LOCAL SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND TRUMP IS DISQUALIFIED FROM RUNNING »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/14th_amen_pet?source=FFR_20240210_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20781%2E4449941%2EYwsSDO)

All the way back in 1870, Hiram Rhodes Revels, a pastor and State Senator from Mississippi, was elected as the first Black US Senator. Since then, we've come a long way as a country. **But representation – like our democracy – is a work in progress, and I believe we can do better.**
Black Americans have long faced _far too many_ obstacles like: discrimination, lower pay, higher job instability – not to mention the racist voter suppression laws that Texas Republicans like Ted Cruz have championed, which make it harder for certain folks to vote.
**The bottom line is this: It's essential that our government reflects the people it represents.**
I'm ready to defeat Ted Cruz this November and fight to build a more perfect union for my boys and every kid in Texas. But unlike Ted Cruz, I don't have corporate special interests footing the bill for my campaign.
**To win, I need a massive movement of grassroots supporters to step up and join me in this fight.[Please, will you split $10 between me and Tina Smith to power my campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, become the first Black Senator from Texas, and be the leader Texans deserve? → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78781952/454445893/1432755884?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDlkYjFiMi01OWM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8PbLtTM_u-b0zqqrXcTabZVLuM4srvxhMAYk3ZCb4E=)**

name: Team Stelson HQ
subject: Janelle fights for all of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson
body:
Scott Perry voted against the law to lower the cost of prescription drugs for seniors.

Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/57CdP-wFgkuQm58EpOgxvQ2?unsubscribedata=0f4IsfCyBtSqUoMu3v%2FavDJFuvJwBGRhV9Yps42Yj6WOzhDU5wfrleI4A6IHKkwgyeDjzs9iuoOR%2FEZOYCzUH10WSO1xPJ82GgiQKZrgHV8FvGyT2scxFVF3LLNpBk8B3AVJup90cmaelNe8rbnfaaPkLr1XllPm7MMRWashW5oYOtSuDrkIj2ETeK5oa7sO5I75GfjtF4c1n4m37hdAPLIAvkasn46O6QVBnj2D2AOSFfwA59KSSEbTwmJp%2Fs29ZC6T49H2YHbJArs975qOxSxugsRP23GYkpsN6DtVA7YYDCdp%2Fva32w%2BYqJcVeY84ijTSxwkwb35aLIiS0f%2FziFnjylNY45svrXUha4DKE%2FerDVrZv7sXGm0E79hXidCvBPFLmqK3PoQwmfqyu4hpmSAE5b1YfBtXbYYSJx4HTyi2Mvg9%2B5HFXH%2Bv8TUn8FJx)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78781972/454445971/174699550?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_021024_1_1_Medicare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWMzMzk2ZjYtNTljOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SXWcrgzL9INzJr5-ZRzpyuEBr84uwyHxdn7nY0sPixQ=) Team — With less than three months until Janelle's primary election, she has not wasted a second. She's been out in the field with our volunteers meeting and listening to the concerns and struggles of Central Pennsylvanians.

When elected to Congress, Janelle plans to lead with empathy, fighting tooth and nail for _all of her constituents_ — from working families to seniors right here in PA-10.

Just last week, Medicare began negotiating lower drug prices with pharmaceutical companies. **Scott Perry voted against the law to lower the cost of prescription drugs for seniors, while HE WAS TAKING MONEY FROM BIG PHARMA.** For all of Perry's talk of tax and government spending cuts, he seems too busy cutting costs for Big Pharma instead of lowering costs for his senior constituents (the people he's supposed to represent...).

Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Team — With less than three months until Janelle's primary election, she has not wasted a second. She's been out in the field with our volunteers meeting and listening to the concerns and struggles of Central Pennsylvanians. When elected to Congress, Janelle plans to lead with empathy, fighting tooth and nail for all of her constituents — from working families to seniors right here in PA-10. Just last week, Medicare began negotiating lower drug prices with pharmaceutical companies. Scott Perry voted against the law to lower the cost of prescription drugs for seniors, while HE WAS TAKING MONEY FROM BIG PHARMA. For all of Perry's talk of tax and government spending cuts, he seems too busy cutting costs for Big Pharma instead of lowering costs for his senior constituents (the people he's supposed to represent...). body:
| | |
_Rolling Stone_ reports Republicans want to "privatize Medicare - and FAST."
Instead of enrolling those newly eligible in widely accepted traditional Medicare, they want to push new enrollees to private, for-profit "Medicare Advantage" plans.
"Medicare Advantage" plans, notorious for denying care, boost private insurer profits at the expense of seniors and taxpayers.
**Democrat Derek Marshall will not only defend Medicare from privatization, he'll fight for universal healthcare for ALL.**

Instead of enrolling those newly eligible in widely accepted traditional Medicare, they want to push new enrollees to private, for-profit "Medicare Advantage" plans. Democrat Derek Marshall will not only defend Medicare from privatization, he'll fight for universal healthcare for ALL. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Humbly asking if there is ANYTHING we can say —
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Kari Lake is objectively one of the most extreme, most radical, most dangerous Senate candidates in the country this year
#

Peter,
We’re racking our brains over here. This won’t be the first email you’ve ever opened from us, but we’re trying to figure out how to convince you to make it the first email you make a donation to.
And we’re wondering if there is ANYTHING we can say that might make that happen.
What if we told you that Kari Lake is objectively one of the most extreme, most radical, most dangerous Senate candidates in the country this year? She’s called herself the “most dangerous politician in the world,” and she means it.
What if we told you that the clock is ticking for Kyrsten Sinema? She has to decide whether or not to run for re-election any day now — really — and we’ve got to be ready for that decision either way.
And what if we told you that this campaign runs on donations from folks like you? Less than 5% of Ruben’s supporters chip in, and we need you to join them.
Those donations will determine the future of this campaign. And that’s why we’re asking you, very humbly:
[**If you care about victory in Arizona, if you care about stopping Kari Lake, if you care about holding control in the Senate, please: Make a donation of $3 today.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240210-2-NOR&t=1&akid=1950%2E734936%2EqHI6xF)**

subject: Screenshot attached
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
We were looking at our ActBlue data.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1956%2E552475%2EVD1dOx)
Peter, we took a look at our fundraising report today, and _to be honest_ , _we’re worried._ Take a look for yourself:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240210-2?refcode=em20240210-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1956_552475_VD1dOx&akid=1956%2E552475%2EVD1dOx)
As you can see, our fundraising has slowed down significantly since January, putting this seat and our Senate majority at risk. With a billionaire-funded super PAC supporting David McCormick, we can’t afford to fall behind.
But it’s not all bad news. This is something we can get ahead of as a team, Peter, but only if we act now.
[**Will you chip in $5 to help turn this trend around?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240210-2?refcode=em20240210-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1956_552475_VD1dOx&akid=1956%2E552475%2EVD1dOx)
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240210-2?refcode=em20240210-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1956_552475_VD1dOx&akid=1956%2E552475%2EVD1dOx)**
David McCormick and his billionaire backers can write enormous checks at any moment (McCormick already has!) as they attempt to buy this seat.
**We can’t compete with their millions upon millions without your help.** Our grassroots supporters, such as yourself, are what will make or break this race.
[**Please chip in $5 or whatever you can to make sure we have the resources to re-elect Bob Casey and defend our Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240210-2?refcode=em20240210-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1956_552475_VD1dOx&akid=1956%2E552475%2EVD1dOx)

Peter,

In 2021, the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee **approved more than $70 million in federal funds to pay for healthcare costs incurred by illegal migrants.** More recently, the Committee approved more than $90 million to care for migrants crossing our border illegally.

Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to **illegal migrants** due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states.

**My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman.**

**Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price.**

t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal migrants over American service members.

[**STOP THE THEFT
SIGN MY PETITION->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=88c353be183a4c30a1bdcef14ffe2d3e&_e=uvfr5W_OsMyj3PsfZI86ZL9NEGzCgGlQ90FOeeyRoz0hIj_3QsbOm42OQNpYDczQdSNoxkg9tX1nXDjVdfyttqEWwNP9CVZgo2e70R5c01bm0wHIs9JZA7vE8VYI0yYcrraG1QPgIRdXuXp02yM_-VIup-0yn6eHtRJduGFwMw3tTJaDTv55vKBhIqe2Mcd8ReZ663sqfgItzeamIx2nU5BLJswmA6VXmNaYwKtRdczTrSUEoR5UUIF8uM0i_ttNx92qTLrANw4tjSGxmJiLla29g9_dGHNRMV2BEJny7oq1aTmKV-zeZXFD8fcji75LxYGK0JLEle6G8lHqTK24_TVA1MdLeV8-QZkNmxpR6CPT8NVThwr-oQuDao80bkrKpbxrU0CP98vPlrYFvgEqekQVvvc04v1moAyGbXBhyKzkR6NRt9WD0Z_ewT_TlHh0CEYKAP1d40B6LovPYBCYjurbMZfJE_t-XbZsFP1RFAhJwLlNs7dWedmJzI6sV9Iz)

**This Democrat-funded program** has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect _**they may never get the care**_ they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans.

**Peter, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities?**

**[Sign my petition](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=88c353be183a4c30a1bdcef14ffe2d3e&_e=uvfr5W_OsMyj3PsfZI86ZL9NEGzCgGlQ90FOeeyRoz0hIj_3QsbOm42OQNpYDczQdSNoxkg9tX1nXDjVdfyttqEWwNP9CVZgo2e70R5c01bm0wHIs9JZA7vE8VYI0yYcrraG1QPgIRdXuXp02yM_-VIup-0yn6eHtRJduGFwMw3tTJaDTv55vKBhIqe2Mcd8ReZ663sqfgItzeamIx2nU5BLJswmA6VXmNaYwKtRdczTrSUEoR5UUIF8uM0i_ttNx92qTLrANw4tjSGxmJiLla29g9_dGHNRMV2BEJny7oq1aTmKV-zeZXFD8fcji75LxYGK0JLEle6G8lHqTK24_TVA1MdLeV8-QZkNmxpR6CMUXdGnSjRttDEirPBviZKuE0BbpoDmPDHFDBFY94eRhn1zc0aDPHpGPK5oeJfH8FZDbmbsJntmxuFZv7X-CIND5Z6UdlzPZScBLdrXscXgOsFTGaGonNNXLRZNJ--fd3uY8vfgd3ESg_g0VvLYe9tZ)** demanding my opponent and Joe Biden forgo their government-funded healthcare services until every veteran who needs to be seen by a doctor is taken off the waitlist.

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

clean_body: Thanks to Democrat Jon Tester, illegal immigrants are being given access to VA health care services before Veterans | | Peter, In 2021, the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee approved more than $70 million in federal funds to pay for healthcare costs incurred by illegal migrants. More recently, the Committee approved more than $90 million to care for migrants crossing our border illegally. Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to illegal migrants due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states. My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman. Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price. t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal migrants over American service members. This Democrat-funded program has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect they may never get the care they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans. Peter, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities? demanding my opponent and Joe Biden forgo their government-funded healthcare services until every veteran who needs to be seen by a doctor is taken off the waitlist. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate P.S. If this news makes your blood boil like it does mine, let me know by to strip Democrats of their health care until this program is defunded. | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. subject: tough email to write

_Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him. We hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and Defeat Republicans._

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78783306/454449432/-1538229440?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240210_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0Y2RhNzg1LTYyYzgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yo12z0bAY0YhHJB6w_sS4T-r9PNeA4jKkh3jYPJUkbE=)

Hey Peter, Harry Dunn here.

This is a tough email to start – how do you talk about one of the darkest days of your life? Not to mention, an irreparable stain on this country's history.

So I guess I'll start with a question. Is this America?

Is attacking Capitol police officers – honest, good people dedicated to protecting and serving democracy – with baseball bats and spears, spraying them with WD-40, calling them hateful slurs – is that America?

Is a President of the United States emboldening a riot on the Capitol, encouraging people threatening to kill former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Vice President Mike Pence, who traveled to Washington ready to act on those threats – is that America?

**That's not America to me.** I believe in an America that protects its people, regardless of their political beliefs. An America that values democracy and those that are chosen to represent it. That's what I believed in while I served as a Capitol police officer during the January 6 insurrection.

[If that's the America you believe in, I'm hoping you'll chip in a split donation of $15 or more to Defeat Republicans and my campaign for US Congress. I protected this democracy as a Capitol police officer on January 6th and I'm ready to protect it as the next Congressman from MD-03. Please, rush a donation to become a Founding Donor of this campaign: ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78783310/454449436/-1538229440?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240210_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0Y2RhNzg1LTYyYzgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yo12z0bAY0YhHJB6w_sS4T-r9PNeA4jKkh3jYPJUkbE=)

Friend,

I apologize for asking you so many times. I absolutely can't ignore this anymore.

We're in for the fight of our lives in 2024. We're OFFICIALLY in the election year, and we've got to do everything we can to FIGHT and WIN.

Here's what's happening:

The left will be more nasty and more well-funded than ever before. They will do EVERYTHING and ANYTHING to take out our campaign. I need everyone's support if we're going to win in 2024 and SAVE AMERICA.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tristan=20Rader?=
subject: BIG Endorsements & March Fundraiser Announcement
body:
AFL-CIO, WFP & CCPC back Tristan Rader for State Rep, you can too. | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
### March 16th Fundraiser: RSVP Today!
---
| Dear Rader Base, I hope this message finds you well and inspired. As we move forward, your unwavering support has been the backbone of our journey toward a more equitable and just Ohio. Today, I'm thrilled to share some exciting updates and extend a special invitation to you. **A Milestone Celebration: Our Upcoming Fundraiser** First and foremost, we're gearing up for an event that promises not only to be a memorable evening but also a crucial step forward in our campaign. We're hosting a fundraiser that will bring together passionate individuals, dedicated activists, and key stakeholders in our community. This is more than just an event; it's a rallying call for those who believe in the power of collective action and shared dreams. 🗓 **Mark Your Calendar!** Please join us at our upcoming fundraiser. Your presence will make a world of difference as we bolster our resources to protect and defend the rights and progress we've fought so hard to achieve. A special thanks to our awesome hosts, Dr. Matthew and Sarah Badgett, who have volunteered their Lakewood home for the occasion. The event will be held on March 16th, 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM. For details and to secure your spot, please visit: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rader_march](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=468f0168b5&e=869bcf0641)

[](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=c836f3721e&e=869bcf0641) **Unwavering Support: Celebrating New Endorsements** We're honored to announce the first waves of endorsements from important organizations committed to the advancement of labor rights, community welfare, and progressive values. These endorsements not only symbolize a shared vision for Ohio but also strengthen our resolve to fight for the rights and dignity of every Ohioan. We're proud to have the backing of:
* **North Shore AFL-CIO Federation of Labor**
* **Lakewood Firefighters Local 382**
* **Bakery, Confectionery, Tobacco Workers and Grain Millers' International Union (BCTGM) Local 19**
* **Ohio Working Families Party**
* **Cuyahoga County Progressive Caucus**

[](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=f4c46e907a&e=869bcf0641) These organizations stand with us because they believe in our mission to uphold reproductive rights, labor rights to organize and collectively bargain, Universal Healthcare, and so much more. Their support is a testament to the strength of our collective efforts and the importance of our cause. **Together, We Stand Stronger** With your support and the solidarity of our endorsers, we are more equipped than ever to face tomorrow's challenges head-on. The upcoming fundraiser is not just a means to gather resources; it's an opportunity to unite, celebrate our achievements, and prepare for the work that lies ahead. [Your contribution](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=b873d9d8ba&e=869bcf0641), whether by attending the fundraiser, spreading the word, or continuing to champion our cause in your circles, is invaluable. Together, we can safeguard the progress we've made and continue to fight for a future where everyone's rights are recognized and respected. Thank you for standing with us. Let's make this event a turning point in our campaign and a beacon of hope for Ohio. In Solidarity

Tristan Rader
Candidate for State Representative
Ohio House District 13
(Cleveland & Lakewood)
---
|
---
|
#### [RSVP for March 16th Fundraiser Here](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=1ba6294f75&e=869bcf0641)

Or mail checks to:
_**Friends of Tristan Rader**_
14837 Detroit Ave. #141
Lakewood, Ohio 44107
---
|
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://us15.campaign-archive.com/?e=869bcf0641&u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=983f8e087c)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | _Copyright © 2024 Tristan Rader for Ohio, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this e-mail because you shared your address at some point, online or on a sign-up sheet.

**Our mailing address is:**
Tristan Rader for OhioFriends of Tristan Rader Committee14837 Detroit Ave. #141Lakewood, OH 44107
[Add us to your address book](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/vcard?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=202c64d24f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/profile?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=202c64d24f&e=869bcf0641&c=983f8e087c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=202c64d24f&t=b&e=869bcf0641&c=983f8e087c).

The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Biden Victory Fund does not accept contributions from corporations or their PACs, unions, federal contractors, national banks, those registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA, SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies, or foreign nationals.

name: Special Election Alerts via Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: BREAKING: SANTOS THROWS SUPPORT BEHIND PILIP WITH 3 DAYS LEFT UNTIL CRITICAL SPECIAL ELECTION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
humbly asking, friend [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] BREAKING: SANTOS RECOMMENDS VOTE FOR PILIP WITH 3 DAYS LEFT UNTIL CRITICAL SPECIAL ELECTION [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Team, we need all hands on deck.
In case it wasn’t already clear–Mazi Pilip will follow George Santos’s footsteps in Congress. He just threw his support behind her and predicted she’d win by 5-7 points!
Team, we have the chance to prove con-man Santos wrong once and for all, but we need to give this all we got in the last 3 days. The whole nation is watching the NY-03 special election, and we have to give Santos one final rebuke!
