Peter,

In 2021, the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee **approved more than $70 million in federal funds to pay for healthcare costs incurred by illegal migrants.** More recently, the Committee approved more than $90 million to care for migrants crossing our border illegally.

Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to **illegal migrants** due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states.

**My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman.**

**Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price.**

t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal migrants over American service members.

[**STOP THE THEFT
SIGN MY PETITION->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e0e85d6782ce4e0aab02bc48dfd2955a&_e=YGjEC2WSErPsgEcmubmJwvyAmVg3cyh1VryVQTl1GOZSNM4LVu6GkqgdpJ86XKXMQUGVAN9n0ZaZaXxynaWMFK6K5C4Ksqh2GS4ljUhzOmq-KAnuvQdrPDM5hWzO_KcTfk86tmlNz7jMLeMaLgIRjBESo_j72r5WWMM4VlF-MQfiWfIO6yvLjM60y6uRSubYuwuoDVkdP4fjJuerPDJ-G26RmbyJFw5xIcvVBeZ0QLtwUFwStLYy0XfZanpU6-M8o-c0gKva5D49x9fZ6qu5dsqQFT-pOSLZyK-3zggaN_GBJv6RZdR89YSizTNZsDYIX9nEPc_kwwbMWGeV4FOZlB69EnzdRk4SpwT1QtjsIc6uRtuQURRZFzvP3Pf6K5WgYP2ZaGPw-j-KeEeyPgKwTOxlA56QFI4hcjFWHxaaYCJkBbXx6XW_N-aBfcq3D-6lMezfLExHZ0fCWHFrdcoIxcfyb4bqjXF-axX8EHuJ9tp829r6tlVBfZEsHguzck76naMHpaQlhFZdouhPaqo3Lg%3D%3D)

**This Democrat-funded program** has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect _**they may never get the care**_ they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans.

**Peter, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities?**

**[Sign my petition](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e0e85d6782ce4e0aab02bc48dfd2955a&_e=YGjEC2WSErPsgEcmubmJwvyAmVg3cyh1VryVQTl1GOZSNM4LVu6GkqgdpJ86XKXMQUGVAN9n0ZaZaXxynaWMFK6K5C4Ksqh2GS4ljUhzOmq-KAnuvQdrPDM5hWzO_KcTfk86tmlNz7jMLeMaLgIRjBESo_j72r5WWMM4VlF-MQfiWfIO6yvLjM60y6uRSubYuwuoDVkdP4fjJuerPDJ-G26RmbyJFw5xIcvVBeZ0QLtwUFwStLYy0XfZanpU6-M8o-c0gKva5D49x9fZ6qu5dsqQFT-pOSLZyK-3zggaN_GBJv6RZdR89YSizTNZsDYIX9nEPc_kwwbMWGeV4FOZlB69EnzdRk4SpwT1QtjsIc6OQk-g__hvFI6poD7TPMAgBzijBS3LeUkwFN3fh7684dxl6uzhnV2mrZWzmNvozAugTCzL_AmGLvH4rzTRCO68bmLX0tqCRfqFgrY51X_PkEH9Z8IQch3R-GA-TPg6_xj8rXj-TUG_qOxQLEvo8KmI47ag7oZGIv7Fapok3vCkqw%3D%3D)** demanding my opponent and Joe Biden forgo their government-funded healthcare services until every veteran who needs to be seen by a doctor is taken off the waitlist.

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

body:
| Peter, the House GOP refuses to do what is necessary for our country and protect our communities. Democrats need your help to show that grassroots strength to deliver change. **_[Click here to sign Ami’s petition now to call for the reinstatement of the assault weapons ban.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78783849/454451098/-872666029?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240210_PT_1.2_1MO_website_NA_NA_gvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAyY2FhYy02OGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WftgxuTFm2kvRtTpQ68If-5TvNyDQmy9iPfLbA_Xyxg=&emci=29296147-6fc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=d502caac-68c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=32394541)_**
**[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78783851/454451100/-872666029?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240210_PT_1.2_1MO_website_NA_NA_gvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAyY2FhYy02OGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WftgxuTFm2kvRtTpQ68If-5TvNyDQmy9iPfLbA_Xyxg=&emci=29296147-6fc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=d502caac-68c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=32394541)**
* * *
**_Ami’s Original Message:_**

Peter,

Gun violence is the number one cause of death for children in America. American families are riddled by the possibility of a gun violence incident everywhere they turn.

We have a public health crisis on our hands while Republicans refuse to take the steps necessary to curb gun violence and reinstate the assault weapons ban.

**_[Will you add your name to show your support for gun violence prevention with common sense reform? Take action and be one of the 1,000 signatures I need by Sunday night.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78783852/454451102/-872666029?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240210_PT_1.2_1MO_website_NA_NA_gvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAyY2FhYy02OGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WftgxuTFm2kvRtTpQ68If-5TvNyDQmy9iPfLbA_Xyxg=&emci=29296147-6fc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=d502caac-68c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=32394541)_**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78783853/454451103/-872666029?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240210_PT_1.2_1MO_website_NA_NA_gvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAyY2FhYy02OGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WftgxuTFm2kvRtTpQ68If-5TvNyDQmy9iPfLbA_Xyxg=&emci=29296147-6fc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=d502caac-68c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=32394541)**
Next week is the anniversary of the Parkland school shooting. The loved ones of victims and the survivors of Parkland, Uvalde, Oxford, the 656 mass shootings in 2023 and countless others will live with that trauma forever.

**The last time meaningful gun violence legislation passed Democrats had the majority.** The Bipartisan Safer Communities Act strengthened background checks, funded school safety & mental health, and supported red flag laws.

Elected officials have a duty to address the gun violence epidemic but the GOP leadership ignores the crisis plaguing our communities to appease the gun lobby. So we’re taking action now:

**_[Stand up for gun violence prevention, Peter. Call on the GOP to cut their ties with the gun lobby and put the necessary measures in place to end the senseless violence in our communities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78783856/454451104/-872666029?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240210_PT_1.2_1MO_website_NA_NA_gvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAyY2FhYy02OGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WftgxuTFm2kvRtTpQ68If-5TvNyDQmy9iPfLbA_Xyxg=&emci=29296147-6fc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=d502caac-68c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=32394541)_**
**[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78783859/454451107/-872666029?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240210_PT_1.2_1MO_website_NA_NA_gvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAyY2FhYy02OGM4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WftgxuTFm2kvRtTpQ68If-5TvNyDQmy9iPfLbA_Xyxg=&emci=29296147-6fc7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=d502caac-68c8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=32394541)**

Ami Bera

Dear Peter,
We have the two most unpopular people running for president in modern history.
Americans deserve more than choosing the lesser of two evils.
The Democrat and Republican presidents go back and forth, taking turns in power, but nothing changes. It’s no wonder 8 out of 10 Americans say we’re on the wrong track.
That’s why half of U.S. voters no longer identify with any political party.
RFK Jr. is running for president to change the way we do politics and make a difference for Americans like you.

name: James Carville
subject: I need your opinion ASAP. -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m gonna level with you: **This might be the most important email I’ve sent your way in a while.**

See, in my decades working in politics, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.**

That's why I'm holding strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- but time’s running out before the interview closes, and **I don't see your response![So please click here to get started right now and take the survey:](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240210-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240210-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13522%2E9716520%2ElhtmRN)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240210-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240210-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13522%2E9716520%2ElhtmRN)
---

I’ll be honest: If we lose the Senate, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all President Biden's progress to a halt -- and that’ll just be the beginning!**

Republicans are out there taking away a woman’s right to choose, restricting the right to vote, flat-out denying climate change... **And unless Democrats get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans are gonna control the Senate pretty soon.**

That's where you come in. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political insiders -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you join my interview by completing a quick survey?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewFebruary/](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240210-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240210-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13522%2E9716520%2ElhtmRN)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240210-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240210-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13522%2E9716520%2ElhtmRN)
---

Thank you.

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240210-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240210-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13522%2E9716520%2ElhtmRN)

[CC BY-SA 2.0](https://go.dscc.org/go/1271?t=2&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240210-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240210-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13522%2E9716520%2ElhtmRN).
